name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: TWO Republican Senators resigning?!?
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Bruce Alt, Tippah County Election Commissioner
If you were asked to give a short answer to the question "what makes America's government different from other countries?", what would you say? One short answer is that America's constitutional republic was purposely created to be dramatically different from other European countries and their forms of government in the 1700's. Our government is defined by a constitution that features a unique separation of powers, checks and balances, the rule of law, and the right to vote for every citizen 18 years of age and older.
However, the question of "What is election integrity?" is not as easily answered. Simply put, "It depends on which state." First recall that Federal elections are administered by State and local governments, and the specifics of how elections are conducted differ between states. The Constitution and laws of the United States grant states wide latitude in how they administer elections.
[Continue Reading](https://substack.com/redirect/a59756aa-1244-4000-b3be-6c7e3594e5f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Team DNC
subject: A quick note to say thank you
body:
---
Happy New Year, Derek, and a huge thank you for sticking with us through our FEC fundraising deadline emails. We know they can be a lot, but they’re essential to building the strongest possible Party — especially as we prepare for all the work to come in 2025. Emails like this one are one of the Democratic National Committee’s biggest sources of individual donations. And because of supporters like you, not only did we reach our quarterly goals, but we surpassed them. **Thank you.** Now, as we kick off a new year, our focus turns to what’s next: electing Democratic leaders who will stop Trump’s destructive agenda. From school board members to city council members, state legislators, governors, and members of Congress — every Democrat we can elect is an additional check on Trump, his administration, and his allies in Congress. And with important elections coming up this year in states like New Jersey and Virginia, that work has to start _now._ [**If you’re ready to get involved, we hope you’ll join thousands of your fellow Democrats in getting your very own member card:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20250102_2478_fr&refcode2=2478_22930333_VA2gUR&akid=2478%2E22930333%2EVA2gUR) [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20250102_2478_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2478_22930333_VA2gUR&akid=2478%2E22930333%2EVA2gUR)
Democrats all over the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them as a reminder of the work we can — and will — accomplish together.
[**So don’t wait: Get yours now using this link.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20250102_2478_fr&refcode2=2478_22930333_VA2gUR&akid=2478%2E22930333%2EVA2gUR)
Thank you for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

When my colleagues and I return to the Senate floor tomorrow morning, the new Republican majority will be sworn in – **but just because Republicans will hold a slim advantage, it doesn't mean we get to throw in the towel:**
* If we're going to fight to stop a nationwide GOP abortion ban, **_I need your help._**

* If we're going to fight to stop them from giving more handouts to billionaires and mega corporations on the backs of working people, _**I need your help.**_

* And if we're going to fight to stop them from putting politics before science and facts, _**I need your help.**_

Now, you might be wondering: _"Can my $5 really help with all of that?"_
Well, believe me, Peter –**yes it can.**
Support from grassroots Democrats like you is how we elected a razor thin majority to make huge investments in our infrastructure, incentivize new manufacturing, lower prescription drug prices, and expand the Affordable Care Act.
**And s****tarting tonight, ****with help from grassroots supporters like you **–****_one $5 donation at a time _– **we'll be able to start our works to retake the Senate in 2026.**

---|---|---
**A New Year 's Challenge: Strengthening Our Churches and Nation in 2025:**
As we step into 2025, we are greeted with a fresh opportunity to reflect on where we've been and chart a course for where we're headed. The turning of a new year isn't just a time for personal resolutions--it's a call to action, a moment to consider how we can strengthen our churches and our nation for generations to come.

# [Against the Wind](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154034991&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MDM0OTkxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4NjQzMzYsImV4cCI6MTczODQ1NjMzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OTWad-kRIdXpcXKIUOXIpW9QkT8Mb30nV1599AA_Dto)
### A topline analysis of the deficit Democrats need to overcome in the heartland
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---
| Jan 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154034991&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MDM0OTkxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNTg2NDMzNiwiZXhwIjoxNzM4NDU2MzM2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nmTca2Jy7nfUbAC4RKpzLsRorcIOtbK50VKwA8sLn60&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154034991&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MDM0OTkxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4NjQzMzYsImV4cCI6MTczODQ1NjMzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OTWad-kRIdXpcXKIUOXIpW9QkT8Mb30nV1599AA_Dto&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=154034991&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MDM0OTkxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzU4NjQzMzYsImV4cCI6MTczODQ1NjMzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OTWad-kRIdXpcXKIUOXIpW9QkT8Mb30nV1599AA_Dto)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbHVjYXNrdW5jZS9wL2FnYWluc3QtdGhlLXdpbmQ_.vxt4Wtmlq3auvuhXLKnQntRBZtDBr3F7FXevu7QYosg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/against-the-wind?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

_I hope everyone had a great New Year!_
_As this year begins, my team and I wanted to share some of what we learned in 2024 so we can help inform anyone who wants to keep up the fight in 2025 and beyond. We 'll get into polling, advertising, messaging, media, and everything that worked (and didn't work)._
_To start, my 2024 campaign manager, Caleb, wanted to share some data points that show that the trends in Missouri aren 't unlike what we've seen across the country in the last 10-20 years. He thinks this will be a helpful foundation before we dig deeper this month!_
_Please let us know your thoughts and questions in the comments section and, as always, if you have the ability to become a paid subscriber to help us continue this work,[you can sign up here](https://substack.com/redirect/6eada3f9-05b1-42ca-9366-725a5e4cee64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
_-- Lucas_
\-----
Despite being outspent by millions of dollars and getting less support from outside groups than any Missouri Senate candidate has had in decades, Lucas was able to outperform the presidential ticket by roughly 5% -- a feat that meant [victory](https://substack.com/redirect/b863d0ab-d2d3-40e2-b1f4-fac1d2d7372e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for some in other states in 2024, but not as many as it should have.
Being outspent and getting less support meant making tough calls, but one thing it also showed us was how effective Lucas' message was with voters. In the media markets where we could afford to effectively fund our advertising campaigns, we saw Lucas' outperformance rise to even double-digit levels, including in working-class and rural areas like Jefferson, Iron, Carroll, and Linn counties.
That 10%+ overperformance stands in stark contrast to the outer markets where we didn't have the resources to get Lucas' story and message to voters. In those areas, the overperformance dipped to nearly 0%. In short, something worked! Where we could get the word out, we could close the gap with the Presidential ticket by around 10%, and where we couldn't get the word out, the gap didn't really close it at all.
In the coming weeks, we'll be diving into some of the research and messaging we found made that all possible, as well as the perspectives we heard from voters. But first, I wanted to give you a foundation for that info, starting with some data on the obstacles candidates are facing in the heartland, including: recent **voter resistance to splitting their tickets for down-ballot Democrats and Trump-driven turnout**.
Here is a chart showing the impact spending had on various "red" state races. You can see how big of a difference it makes for a Democratic candidate to be able to get their message out when starting from behind because of those two obstacles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b37753fa-3fde-438e-9a8b-716131e3dd02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_*Numbers are both rough and rounded for readability*_
Just as we saw in Missouri, several Senate campaigns in 2024 found that spending on their message had a positive impact on the race's margin -- especially for the few who were able to outspend their opponent and opposing outside groups.
All of these states have trended red in recent elections, meaning these overperformances weren't enough to win on Election Day. But while talking heads and election watchers obsess over overperformance percentages and race margins, an often overlooked detail is the raw vote counts behind them.
Here's one way to illustrate why that matters in Missouri:
In Missouri's 2016 Governor's race, Democrat Chris Koster got over 1.27m votes, falling roughly 5.5% short of winning. That same year, Democrat Jason Kander got 30,000 more votes than Koster, and his margin was just under 3%. Lucas got 1.24m votes, just 30,000 fewer votes than Koster -- but the margin of loss was a massively different story. Despite having a vote count in the same ballpark as Koster and Kander, Lucas lost by double digits while their races were close.
Turnout is stronger than ever, and it's largely due to Trump being on the ballot.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e224c9d7-ea5f-490c-97df-19f72b2c717d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Missouri was once considered the quintessential bellwether state, voting for the winner in U.S. presidential elections between 1904 and 2004, with one exception -- Stevenson beating Eisenhower by just 4,000 votes in 1956 in an electorate of 1.8 million votes.
The second half of Missouri's streak ended in 2008, when McCain beat Obama by 4,000 votes out of 2.9 million total votes. In 2012, Romney beat Obama in Missouri by 260,000 out of 2.75 million total votes. In down-ballot races, Democrats still outperformed in statewide elections, sometimes winning by double-digit margins.
But the shift from 2012 to 2016 confirmed fewer and fewer voters were open to the ticket-splitting Missouri elections had been known for in down-ballot races -- even voting against Democrats they've already elected statewide in the past. Democrats went from holding nearly every statewide office until 2017 to nearly none in a single election cycle. 2020 and 2024 then presented a new problem: Hundreds of thousands of previously "infrequent" voters showing up to the polls, largely backing Trump.
I just threw a lot of numbers at you, so let me put it more plainly: Traditional ticket-splitters more frequently rejecting Democrats, combined with new Trump-driven turnout as of 2020, has turned potentially single-digit races in Missouri into double-digit races.
The unfortunate reality for Democrats nationwide is Missouri isn't alone in this trend -- putting the possibility of passing pro-worker and pro-freedom policies in the U.S. Senate increasingly out of reach:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/98d02637-2041-457e-bc59-910f8636a80c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Going forward, a victory for candidates in heartland states will almost certainly take more than marginal improvements on the 2016 performances. It's going to take a seismic shift at the national level to bring things back into balance. In Missouri, that will mean a 50,000 to 100,000 vote improvement on Kander or Koster's 2016 performance won't be nearly enough -- it could take winning over 200,000+ additional voters.
So that's where we are at. And, fortunately, our campaign research found some pathways that candidates in Missouri and similar states might find helpful to connect with voters and outperform the top of the ticket.
Next time I've got an update for Lucas' Substack, we'll dig into our public opinion research to explore why voters from these two groups -- traditional ticket-splitters and infrequent voters -- say they're more hesitant than ever to vote for a Democrats down-ballot, even when they dislike the Republican. Then we'll look at what messaging drove tens of thousands of those voters to switch over to Lucas where we had the resources to deliver his message.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Lucas's Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/717e413f-b415-421d-a970-274f0ddcdd90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). clean_body: A topline analysis of the deficit Democrats need to overcome in the heartland | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A topline analysis of the deficit Democrats need to overcome in the heartland | | | Jan 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | I hope everyone had a great New Year! As this year begins, my team and I wanted to share some of what we learned in 2024 so we can help inform anyone who wants to keep up the fight in 2025 and beyond. We 'll get into polling, advertising, messaging, media, and everything that worked (and didn't work). To start, my 2024 campaign manager, Caleb, wanted to share some data points that show that the trends in Missouri aren 't unlike what we've seen across the country in the last 10-20 years. He thinks this will be a helpful foundation before we dig deeper this month! Please let us know your thoughts and questions in the comments section and, as always, if you have the ability to become a paid subscriber to help us continue this work,. -- Lucas \----- Despite being outspent by millions of dollars and getting less support from outside groups than any Missouri Senate candidate has had in decades, Lucas was able to outperform the presidential ticket by roughly 5% -- a feat that meant for some in other states in 2024, but not as many as it should have. Being outspent and getting less support meant making tough calls, but one thing it also showed us was how effective Lucas' message was with voters. In the media markets where we could afford to effectively fund our advertising campaigns, we saw Lucas' outperformance rise to even double-digit levels, including in working-class and rural areas like Jefferson, Iron, Carroll, and Linn counties. That 10%+ overperformance stands in stark contrast to the outer markets where we didn't have the resources to get Lucas' story and message to voters. In those areas, the overperformance dipped to nearly 0%. In short, something worked! Where we could get the word out, we could close the gap with the Presidential ticket by around 10%, and where we couldn't get the word out, the gap didn't really close it at all. In the coming weeks, we'll be diving into some of the research and messaging we found made that all possible, as well as the perspectives we heard from voters. But first, I wanted to give you a foundation for that info, starting with some data on the obstacles candidates are facing in the heartland, including: recent voter resistance to splitting their tickets for down-ballot Democrats and Trump-driven turnout. Here is a chart showing the impact spending had on various "red" state races. You can see how big of a difference it makes for a Democratic candidate to be able to get their message out when starting from behind because of those two obstacles. | | ---|---|--- Numbers are both rough and rounded for readability Just as we saw in Missouri, several Senate campaigns in 2024 found that spending on their message had a positive impact on the race's margin -- especially for the few who were able to outspend their opponent and opposing outside groups. All of these states have trended red in recent elections, meaning these overperformances weren't enough to win on Election Day. But while talking heads and election watchers obsess over overperformance percentages and race margins, an often overlooked detail is the raw vote counts behind them. Here's one way to illustrate why that matters in Missouri: In Missouri's 2016 Governor's race, Democrat Chris Koster got over 1.27m votes, falling roughly 5.5% short of winning. That same year, Democrat Jason Kander got 30,000 more votes than Koster, and his margin was just under 3%. Lucas got 1.24m votes, just 30,000 fewer votes than Koster -- but the margin of loss was a massively different story. Despite having a vote count in the same ballpark as Koster and Kander, Lucas lost by double digits while their races were close. Turnout is stronger than ever, and it's largely due to Trump being on the ballot. | | ---|---|--- Missouri was once considered the quintessential bellwether state, voting for the winner in U.S. presidential elections between 1904 and 2004, with one exception -- Stevenson beating Eisenhower by just 4,000 votes in 1956 in an electorate of 1.8 million votes. The second half of Missouri's streak ended in 2008, when McCain beat Obama by 4,000 votes out of 2.9 million total votes. In 2012, Romney beat Obama in Missouri by 260,000 out of 2.75 million total votes. In down-ballot races, Democrats still outperformed in statewide elections, sometimes winning by double-digit margins. But the shift from 2012 to 2016 confirmed fewer and fewer voters were open to the ticket-splitting Missouri elections had been known for in down-ballot races -- even voting against Democrats they've already elected statewide in the past. Democrats went from holding nearly every statewide office until 2017 to nearly none in a single election cycle. 2020 and 2024 then presented a new problem: Hundreds of thousands of previously "infrequent" voters showing up to the polls, largely backing Trump. I just threw a lot of numbers at you, so let me put it more plainly: Traditional ticket-splitters more frequently rejecting Democrats, combined with new Trump-driven turnout as of 2020, has turned potentially single-digit races in Missouri into double-digit races. The unfortunate reality for Democrats nationwide is Missouri isn't alone in this trend -- putting the possibility of passing pro-worker and pro-freedom policies in the U.S. Senate increasingly out of reach: | | ---|---|--- Going forward, a victory for candidates in heartland states will almost certainly take more than marginal improvements on the 2016 performances. It's going to take a seismic shift at the national level to bring things back into balance. In Missouri, that will mean a 50,000 to 100,000 vote improvement on Kander or Koster's 2016 performance won't be nearly enough -- it could take winning over 200,000+ additional voters. So that's where we are at. And, fortunately, our campaign research found some pathways that candidates in Missouri and similar states might find helpful to connect with voters and outperform the top of the ticket. Next time I've got an update for Lucas' Substack, we'll dig into our public opinion research to explore why voters from these two groups -- traditional ticket-splitters and infrequent voters -- say they're more hesitant than ever to vote for a Democrats down-ballot, even when they dislike the Republican. Then we'll look at what messaging drove tens of thousands of those voters to switch over to Lucas where we had the resources to deliver his message. You're currently a free subscriber to . body:
Maxine is a mom, physician, and relentless advocate. Now, as she prepares to be sworn into Congress, she’s making one final fundraising push. Maxine recently wrote a heartfelt message to her supporters. Did you see it?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756968/520813735/577006200?amount=25&refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=)
Hi Peter,

Maxine is a mom, physician, and relentless advocate. Now, as she prepares to be sworn into Congress, she’s making one final fundraising push. Maxine recently wrote a heartfelt message to her supporters. Did you see it?

[**If you don’t have time to read her note will you make a donation today to support her crucial end-of-year fundraising push?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756969/520813736/577006200?amount=50&refcode=TD_FR_2025.01.02_storybump_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=)

---
Read her message below.
Thanks,
Team Dexter
* * *

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756971/520813738/577006200?amount=25&refcode=TD_FR_2025.01.02_storybump_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=)
Hi Peter,

Tomorrow, I will be sworn in to represent the people of Oregon’s Third Congressional district. I am deeply honored and ready to get to work for you.

As I reflect on my journey to Congress, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude. Growing up in the Pacific Northwest, life wasn’t always easy—financial struggles and a tumultuous home environment shaped my early years. But thanks to the strength of my community, I found mentors, support, and opportunities that changed my life.

At 16, I got my first union job at Albertsons. The wages, benefits, and job security I had as a UFCW member helped me become the first in my family to graduate from college. From there, I pursued my passion for healthcare, earning my medical degree and building a career as a physician in Portland.

But my journey didn’t stop there. I’ve seen firsthand the challenges Oregonians face—from the housing crisis to the opioid epidemic, from attacks on reproductive rights to rising costs of living. Those experiences inspired me to step up, first as a state legislator and now as your Congresswoman-elect.

I know I didn’t get here alone. Your support made this possible. Whether you knocked on doors, donated, or simply believed in me, you’ve been part of this journey every step of the way. And I’m so deeply grateful for it.

[**Now, before I’m sworn in, I need your help again. Can I count on you to step up once more and make a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756972/520813739/577006200?amount=50&refcode=TD_FR_2025.01.02_storybump_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=)
****[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756973/520813740/577006200?amount=50&refcode=TD_FR_2025.01.02_storybump_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=)****
---
Thank you for believing in me and for being part of this movement. Together, we’ve already accomplished so much, and I know the best is yet to come.

With gratitude,
Maxine Dexter
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756974/520813741/829186069?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=&emci=879b3938-09c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=16e52174-76c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9506338) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756975/520813742/-1852105559?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=&emci=879b3938-09c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=16e52174-76c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9506338) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99756976/520813743/-872485808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTZlNTIxNzQtNzZjOS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j6NQwbXxMz4KZJowYjMDYQBAWx5NA8JMuAUX0NUoGuU=&emci=879b3938-09c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=16e52174-76c9-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9506338)

name: SAVE THE USPS!!! (via VPP)
subject: It’s time to oust Louis DeJoy >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
but we need your help!
| | Friend, we still haven’t received your signature on our urgent petition to save the USPS...

We only have **18 days** before Donald Trump takes office, _and Trump’s MAGA Postmaster General is running the USPS to the ground!_

**We need to take action BEFORE Trump takes office and makes things even worse! But we need YOUR support to get this done!**

[**Sign on to SAVE the Postal Service and Oust DeJoy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=18348%2E878179%2EJTcqjL) | [SIGN OUR PETITION TO SAVE THE POSTAL SERVICE FROM DEJOY’S FAILED LEADERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=18348%2E878179%2EJTcqjL)
---
**Criticism of MAGA Postmaster General Louis DeJoy Grows: “You Are Responsible for the Fall of USPS”**
Folks, Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is SO corrupt that _even some Republicans are calling him out!_

People DEPEND on our Post Office -- but DeJoy is running it to the ground. **NO!!**
**We know good Democrats like you care about preserving this amazing institution. So we’re _pleading with you_ to act:**
[**Sign on to SAVE the Postal Service and Oust DeJoy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=18348%2E878179%2EJTcqjL)
[SIGN OUR PETITION TO SAVE THE POSTAL SERVICE FROM DEJOY’S FAILED LEADERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps?source=VPP_20250102_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=18348%2E878179%2EJTcqjL)
---
Please, we need 2,000 responses from your state by MIDNIGHT tonight!

_The Voter Protection Project Data Team_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5b75upeeje5sp6fb9mncst1gh1h4qjsilv1sj7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c3ie1ob6chh2bs)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcjk8rupn3pkpb350a0coaua1jf6ah3suek5vj28_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z42ji65a2hgnr2n50eo3otlplf3bnnp4pmesrg4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zftav10umhscqsinu0866nal0sgdgt0phmdpclv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z44gcq9f501nmdqh1durhnnqa8ffi0epki2pmoi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z021p2ruu7vj98h8ht6gfm9q6cgfl0ll9mk8rmjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0spie0o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6nck07n9d3pesf9nl5jk1nloajujh4us3la81co_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb5vm5k0nuhr3a9hshqk7u6i1qstcjd5nvelm1h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: What Are Buffett, Dalio, and Druckenmiller So Worried About?
body:
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...

Dear Reader,
As the market hits new highs... and the general public is feeling "great" about the economy...
When you look closely at what billionaires and experts are doing, it's becoming clear that [something is very wrong with the U.S. stock market.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh96kv11mnr8b8tv7d4qqqj1arnbsn9lcce357ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)
* Billionaire Ray Dalio, who runs one of the world's most successful hedge funds, warns of a "reversal." He said: "Things are going to get worse for our economy."

* Billionaires Stanley Druckenmiller, George Soros, and David Tepper have all sold off massive U.S. stock positions, including shares of Nvidia.

* And billionaire Warren Buffett recently sold over half his Apple shares, worth about $75 billion. Then, he went on to sell a massive amount of his position in Bank of America as well.

[What are these billionaires so worried about?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8hicpk0ql4mkeqk25g3kkkpib1gbaiu3f9vhi3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)
Well, according to our senior analyst, Dan Ferris...
One possible reason could be that [a major crisis is about to hit the U.S. market, which will catch most investors completely off-guard.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ua3th4jn7hfctol4a5ehvf5slhk66h39rahl3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)
According to Dan, now is the time to prepare - and take steps to protect your wealth.
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...
[Dan explains everything in his recent video presentation on this subject.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ecqf7aqggr0up2diniahlmddu7d9ijm208bl90_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)
Specifically, he goes into detail on why this appears to be one of the most dangerous markets in 200 years... and what you can do to protect and even grow your wealth if (and when) the market turns against us.
[Click here to see Dan's new warning for America.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zii2ldotnf8ld6comrsm69b954g5icml9a083k28_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg64o32cjh2bs)
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research

* Billionaire Ray Dalio, who runs one of the world's most successful hedge funds, warns of a "reversal." He said: "Things are going to get worse for our economy."

* Billionaires Stanley Druckenmiller, George Soros, and David Tepper have all sold off massive U.S. stock positions, including shares of Nvidia.

* And billionaire Warren Buffett recently sold over half his Apple shares, worth about $75 billion. Then, he went on to sell a massive amount of his position in Bank of America as well.

[What are these billionaires so worried about?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl5s4o7v82nenj88d3rtv3sdi8k2lqvc40ovn67o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6co72c3h2bs)
Well, according to our senior analyst, Dan Ferris...
One possible reason could be that [a major crisis is about to hit the U.S. market, which will catch most investors completely off-guard.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z50ohgqsmhpf7sejqvcigab65caqo6ui9k95ldv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6co72c3h2bs)
According to Dan, now is the time to prepare - and take steps to protect your wealth.
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...
[Dan explains everything in his recent video presentation on this subject.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkl5ss73g06ij6ln98u2nqb361kck690s2bl4k70_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6co72c3h2bs)
Specifically, he goes into detail on why this appears to be one of the most dangerous markets in 200 years... and what you can do to protect and even grow your wealth if (and when) the market turns against us.
[Click here to see Dan's new warning for America.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5gvuuickdin55m9aork0qmtnrnv54tugcs7q3p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6co72c3h2bs)
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research
This ad is sent on behalf of Stansberry Research, 1125 N Charles St, Baltimore, MD 21201.

name: Update for America
subject: What Are Buffett, Dalio, and Druckenmiller So Worried About?
body:
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...

Dear Reader,
As the market hits new highs... and the general public is feeling "great" about the economy...
When you look closely at what billionaires and experts are doing, it's becoming clear that [something is very wrong with the U.S. stock market.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc4u0o4rg8mvbdu96l8adu6o3aob76t3a1heefko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6aor2clh2bs)
* Billionaire Ray Dalio, who runs one of the world's most successful hedge funds, warns of a "reversal." He said: "Things are going to get worse for our economy."

* Billionaires Stanley Druckenmiller, George Soros, and David Tepper have all sold off massive U.S. stock positions, including shares of Nvidia.

* And billionaire Warren Buffett recently sold over half his Apple shares, worth about $75 billion. Then, he went on to sell a massive amount of his position in Bank of America as well.

[What are these billionaires so worried about?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3qe2aem1cvvkc8gqbcbhcg8oe72g8qntfido6no_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6aor2clh2bs)
Well, according to our senior analyst, Dan Ferris...
One possible reason could be that [a major crisis is about to hit the U.S. market, which will catch most investors completely off-guard.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5lnl29is1ls0583l3vd7fi1a7brkbo15iimtjvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6aor2clh2bs)
According to Dan, now is the time to prepare - and take steps to protect your wealth.
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...
[Dan explains everything in his recent video presentation on this subject.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9trus9m5llcha1d1d569bbnsvsmpcsqtvrloi4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6aor2clh2bs)
Specifically, he goes into detail on why this appears to be one of the most dangerous markets in 200 years... and what you can do to protect and even grow your wealth if (and when) the market turns against us.
[Click here to see Dan's new warning for America.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z68qpqkapnvr15ved4rh48okc7fb1m7j1ejefhc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5cjg6aor2clh2bs)
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research
This ad is sent on behalf of Stansberry Research, 1125 N Charles St, Baltimore, MD 21201.

Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19584/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/58e22f673dc4c34aef41c7e32b351ba9d69bc9ab). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19584/6374453/6ce869e32a7f5350f0e5417ed24109580590c29d/58e22f673dc4c34aef41c7e32b351ba9d69bc9ab)
---
|
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19584/6374453/1f52fde9a10cc96909570fcaf7ed456b2c79b8df/58e22f673dc4c34aef41c7e32b351ba9d69bc9ab). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19584/6374453/1f52fde9a10cc96909570fcaf7ed456b2c79b8df/58e22f673dc4c34aef41c7e32b351ba9d69bc9ab).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19584/6374453/1f52fde9a10cc96909570fcaf7ed456b2c79b8df/58e22f673dc4c34aef41c7e32b351ba9d69bc9ab)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
|
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19584/6374453/1f52fde9a10cc96909570fcaf7ed456b2c79b8df/58e22f673dc4c34aef41c7e32b351ba9d69bc9ab)

A jubilee is one of the most significant events of the Catholic Church that occurs only every 25 years.With the beginning of the 2025 Jubilee Year of Hope, there are many questions the faithful may ask: What can the jubilee contribute to my life of faith? What is a Holy Door? What is a jubilee church? How can I participate if I don’t go on pilgrimage to Rome? The answers to these and other questions will help Catholics understand the value of this exceptional time of grace. P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Hillary Cassel was yet ANOTHER Democrat turned America First Patriot.

DENOUNCE her Jewish heritage.

And worst of all... put America _**LAST**_.

High Ranking Democrat Party Bosses are seething after reading this news.

name: Republican Majority
subject: What Are Buffett, Dalio, and Druckenmiller So Worried About?
body:
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...

Dear Reader,
As the market hits new highs... and the general public is feeling "great" about the economy...
When you look closely at what billionaires and experts are doing, it's becoming clear that [something is very wrong with the U.S. stock market.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLmu2zAQRb9m1MngkBKXgkUCRZ1SvCYlMeJiM9YGik6Qvw8UI_0r7zmY9cfkJspL3u7faY22rK6crqzunNtAW1viI1JtpUTHGe9bhi0TjjfBSsOVxiZaVKLXRvUdax5We4_MS8HDTFKYEClqilxT1BpNSk22Vx-GTDDdKYa3YNIcVDI9aqMFMehYicdrXrKnbaWfe8n1z22LtVnso9bjBPEF-Ah8rIX8M2_3m1-yf5615CPize8r8JFSch7EuKcUi8sBxMCxl8DlZf5lZKYDLs_9VXwEMXxbKS8XeM0IYgD1tRbaTvI179tVooa35SCGYz8YMuQ9vZkAMUiJ79CBGD6m9mNq_9_aFBuO33lZ8ikVdOx-zbpWbeqnX_7L8r8BAAD__38GghE)
* Billionaire Ray Dalio, who runs one of the world's most successful hedge funds, warns of a "reversal." He said: "Things are going to get worse for our economy."

* Billionaires Stanley Druckenmiller, George Soros, and David Tepper have all sold off massive U.S. stock positions, including shares of Nvidia.

* And billionaire Warren Buffett recently sold over half his Apple shares, worth about $75 billion. Then, he went on to sell a massive amount of his position in Bank of America as well.

[What are these billionaires so worried about?](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLmu2zAQRb9m1MngkBKXgkUCRZ1SvCYlMeJiM9YGik6Qvw8UI_0r7zmY9cfkJspL3u7faY22rK6crqzunNtAW1viI1JtpUTHGe9bhi0TjjfBSsOVxiZaVKLXRvUdax5We4_MS8HDTFKYEClqilxT1BpNSk22Vx-GTDDdKYa3YNIcVDI9aqMFMehYicdrXrKnbaWfe8n1z22LtVnso9bjBPEF-Ah8rIX8M2_3m1-yf5615CPize8r8JFSch7EuKcUi8sBxMCxl8DlZf5lZKYDLs_9VXwEMXxbKS8XeM0IYgD1tRbaTvI179tVooa35SCGYz8YMuQ9vZkAMUiJ79CBGD6m9mNq_9_aFBuO33lZ8ikVdOx-zbpWbeqnX_7L8r8BAAD__38GghE)
Well, according to our senior analyst, Dan Ferris...
One possible reason could be that [a major crisis is about to hit the U.S. market, which will catch most investors completely off-guard.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLmu2zAQRb9m1MngkBKXgkUCRZ1SvCYlMeJiM9YGik6Qvw8UI_0r7zmY9cfkJspL3u7faY22rK6crqzunNtAW1viI1JtpUTHGe9bhi0TjjfBSsOVxiZaVKLXRvUdax5We4_MS8HDTFKYEClqilxT1BpNSk22Vx-GTDDdKYa3YNIcVDI9aqMFMehYicdrXrKnbaWfe8n1z22LtVnso9bjBPEF-Ah8rIX8M2_3m1-yf5615CPize8r8JFSch7EuKcUi8sBxMCxl8DlZf5lZKYDLs_9VXwEMXxbKS8XeM0IYgD1tRbaTvI179tVooa35SCGYz8YMuQ9vZkAMUiJ79CBGD6m9mNq_9_aFBuO33lZ8ikVdOx-zbpWbeqnX_7L8r8BAAD__38GghE)
According to Dan, now is the time to prepare - and take steps to protect your wealth.
I don't want to make you read a long e-mail...
[Dan explains everything in his recent video presentation on this subject.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLmu2zAQRb9m1MngkBKXgkUCRZ1SvCYlMeJiM9YGik6Qvw8UI_0r7zmY9cfkJspL3u7faY22rK6crqzunNtAW1viI1JtpUTHGe9bhi0TjjfBSsOVxiZaVKLXRvUdax5We4_MS8HDTFKYEClqilxT1BpNSk22Vx-GTDDdKYa3YNIcVDI9aqMFMehYicdrXrKnbaWfe8n1z22LtVnso9bjBPEF-Ah8rIX8M2_3m1-yf5615CPize8r8JFSch7EuKcUi8sBxMCxl8DlZf5lZKYDLs_9VXwEMXxbKS8XeM0IYgD1tRbaTvI179tVooa35SCGYz8YMuQ9vZkAMUiJ79CBGD6m9mNq_9_aFBuO33lZ8ikVdOx-zbpWbeqnX_7L8r8BAAD__38GghE)
Specifically, he goes into detail on why this appears to be one of the most dangerous markets in 200 years... and what you can do to protect and even grow your wealth if (and when) the market turns against us.
[Click here to see Dan's new warning for America.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkLmu2zAQRb9m1MngkBKXgkUCRZ1SvCYlMeJiM9YGik6Qvw8UI_0r7zmY9cfkJspL3u7faY22rK6crqzunNtAW1viI1JtpUTHGe9bhi0TjjfBSsOVxiZaVKLXRvUdax5We4_MS8HDTFKYEClqilxT1BpNSk22Vx-GTDDdKYa3YNIcVDI9aqMFMehYicdrXrKnbaWfe8n1z22LtVnso9bjBPEF-Ah8rIX8M2_3m1-yf5615CPize8r8JFSch7EuKcUi8sBxMCxl8DlZf5lZKYDLs_9VXwEMXxbKS8XeM0IYgD1tRbaTvI179tVooa35SCGYz8YMuQ9vZkAMUiJ79CBGD6m9mNq_9_aFBuO33lZ8ikVdOx-zbpWbeqnX_7L8r8BAAD__38GghE)

These new stock market highs are built on shaky foundations.

# **A huge crack is forming in the US economy**
* * *
I'm a former advisor to President Donald Trump, and I've uncovered alarming information that could impact your financial security over the next few months.
These new stock market highs are built on shaky foundations.
A huge crack is forming in the American economy. The elites know all about it, but most ordinary citizens have no idea.
But I'm coming forward for the first time because this is too important. Everything you've worked so hard for could be at risk.
I can't sit back and allow hard-working Americans to be financially battered, while the elites make more and more money yet again.
So what's going on?
And how could it impact your life, and the lives of your children and grandchildren over the next few months?

subject: Early Warning: The economy isn’t as strong as it seems
body:
These new stock market highs are built on shaky foundations.

# **A huge crack is forming in the US economy**
* * *
I'm a former advisor to President Donald Trump, and I've uncovered alarming information that could impact your financial security over the next few months.
These new stock market highs are built on shaky foundations.
A huge crack is forming in the American economy. The elites know all about it, but most ordinary citizens have no idea.
But I'm coming forward for the first time because this is too important. Everything you've worked so hard for could be at risk.
I can't sit back and allow hard-working Americans to be financially battered, while the elites make more and more money yet again.
So what's going on?
And how could it impact your life, and the lives of your children and grandchildren over the next few months?
To get the facts, **[watch my latest free market briefing](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkL-OnDAQh5_GdKDxjI2hoEhEVkqxKXJFSmRsszc6Flu2yb1-RFZ5gJS_79P8_XVf7pZ3Ph4_7DNMXMqSy5KfS1nbT-bWcpvPVNte44KAugXZAi2y8ZNGOWxDEyZpSA_jSEDN-2RRazXgChJ6r-QQlNLaWeMlwLpa2fB09QEJBCMgYkfGjoo21a-Gghm9UHAmb2vo-CjsQ3ExphR3ruxKF_Oj2af3WlMR9EXgTeCtZus--Hh0bmf3UWrmFGTn4lPgzW7b4gTd4raFvLAXNKPURmB_mb9ZwqgE9iWe2QVB87en5f0C5yoFzcJ8rdkexbrK8bhKzPyyKGhOMYEEidq-GAmae42voATNP-_t97e39t_RTZ58-uR959IboeBxDbt2bep_fP_3hH8CAAD__4uZhdE)**.

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

body:
GOP-led Congress TAKES OVER today
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07675e2c-3bd9-4ec5-bbed-9264d5c871d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Ugh. We were dreading today, Peter. The 119th Congress, led by a razor-thin House majority, just took over Capitol Hill. That’s the bad news, but we have some good news: Because of MAGA Republicans Elise Stefanik, Matt Gaetz, and Mike Waltz leaving the House, Democrats have ONE MORE OPPORTUNITY to FLIP THE HOUSE. With the GOP unable to lose any votes, we need to take advantage and make a Democratic House majority the firewall to stop Trump and Project 2025. [So to help Democrats build momentum, we set a ONE-DAY goal of $50,000 to support Democrats in these three House races. Will you chip in $10 to help us reach this critical goal?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T435620a3-c158-4d20-99dd-aa8b94931eb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91c96402-5614-4605-a3b7-b41f016978f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ac3745c-ad75-48a2-9b3e-c9a57d6301dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Walmart, a company who’s known to be one of the biggest supporters of conservative causes, has just bowed to evil liberal demands.

Here’s what happened...

Several major companies (including Amazon, Walmart, Barnes & Noble and more) have decided it’s against Americans’ best interests to carry a new book on their store shelves.

And the reason why should have you fuming...

The book is called _The First 72 Hours._

_The First 72 Hours_ was written by one of the world's leading survival authors, Damian Campbell.

And the reason these companies **won’t allow you to buy his book** is because it exposes how the left is using the current political unrest to steal our freedom in ways we never imagined...

And it teaches you how to prepare for the coming collapse.

The secrets in this book are well-known by government insiders...

And Cambell has put them all in this book in an attempt to warn you about what is going to happen in the next few months.

Since Campbell isn’t allowed to sell this book in stores we convinced him to let us hand out a few copies at a **deep discount.**

Right now we have permission to give **50% OFF** copies to the [next 288 people who click here.](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19589/6374453/ba06ddc1add320cb3393126d160fbbbb3d4f9578/9ad65ca4545ca26e4ad1c0b21911c13f76d24f24)

However, once you get access to this book ** _you’ll need to review it ASAP._**

I can’t tell you when **the S will hit the F.** But I can tell you Jesus was right that no man knows the hour - and that we should be vigilant and prepared.

[Get your copy of _The First 72 Hours_ for **50% OFF** before they’re gone...](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19589/6374453/ba06ddc1add320cb3393126d160fbbbb3d4f9578/9ad65ca4545ca26e4ad1c0b21911c13f76d24f24) and before it’s too late.

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c24c532d7f47378e79e56247057580&_e=TLRZFzFU06-y5ya-ouC3xWd720NHqrtWU8-a01PHptrkgIp57Ou-QlISlAHQ8K2STcCMieuo5lp0pqPWU1K0fnjlTNCWn-mLxdONm4WKcfcbYRKF2U_GAJFPHWwfNI5hDpB4Sm2K8gjjkQ9lke0We2pzI94e5Di57hosWbOLmw1DP7Zrg0kfeYWB0az4PB8UMRGPQ9ivcZp6x0Jsd6kaiV1oYLZgOsCag9txosFuvnsGgJLXCW7i5phdik3S6rFNH0B4RAf0tObcac42qn9e4w3queZtZ_rmoWdoXuPZ1gtK43UjIKqZ7y7mY-qdVliu39TCv_i4YmfOqQGl1xv88LWZqXFHot2BnR_O34WyZaCBagBpgw-_l_kalwMG0NLZtJfOLb3WiNKIXJBLwxKnFw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10c24c532d7f47378e79e56247057580&_e=TLRZFzFU06-y5ya-ouC3xWd720NHqrtWU8-a01PHptrkgIp57Ou-QlISlAHQ8K2STcCMieuo5lp0pqPWU1K0fnjlTNCWn-mLxdONm4WKcfcbYRKF2U_GAJFPHWwfNI5hDpB4Sm2K8gjjkQ9lke0We2pzI94e5Di57hosWbOLmw1DP7Zrg0kfeYWB0az4PB8UMRGPQ9ivcZp6x0Jsd6kaiV1oYLZgOsCag9txosFuvnsGgJLXCW7i5phdik3S6rFNCi7BmfUhUxXNizxVk41_a8jHSObw-2518NwIZcZuG47J_xiACyyzTaPtOhWyr9xJbyTf9UajNSdCWrJrOA5q3Wgkaqre8Qq4-fQB5J-1KBWQzcCzho_VBulPoSKoGQNbSjmcltbuRhj85BbQNbgo9w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: $25,000 Christmas Lights Display, Smelly Algae, and Texas Comes in Second
body:
An elaborate Christmas lights display at a Dallas mansion drew a flood of onlookers over the past few weeks, forcing the city to allocate 71 police officers over eight nights to manage traffic in the Preston Hollow neighborhood.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQRp_GdCB7xhgoXERClrbItlsiYxtiaQgIm_y8_Yqb26adOTo6-v5dh6uNFO_zX7sEnV_TOgCHuuSi5Dh4G-k9yMLrkftOFEGLBuuOYyvb4qYxNOg74VqPY9M6hdDZ1uI4Odu4EUQR9SnjgqMQyLGuUAnloZtQ1s4p2TLJg4953at8Czm8bJrovT7CXrl1KUjfct4SwwsDw8Bsdg6pOrZnILqHlE6IgTlcOe8bHalMG1cniuZizJ-eYQ91LWXNQKVjjJ5hb4mivbuwLwyUO1JeFxMDeWTYfyy_BfvyKR9yIs6BgQqLjcSw99szEsWkGib5fB5_anf95ZG_7vrQ8D8AAP__H655BA) | |
# Friday, January 3, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1850, [Presidio County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFy6yAQgOHToM6ahQVZKiheo86vTalBsLJ2gsEDxLJun0n6XOD_5_u4LTfHkdP9v3uQbe8tLwqUuYC8AC7BcTwX3QW7QphkR1Ze0UyAox673a5yRDAr6GHdViK3SfDOB6MNjkpO2LH9iYEElBIBTY-DHIKaNtTG-0GPQgMFbrn0badGb1e3eOYXld7nRxft3tqzCvwn1CzUfBxH3-rucoqcqM_lLtS8uxTWnD-Fmim1wlSFmp-FKgfOF5-_Uju7YsPz4Bi5Dleh4f5wHH8X7U_zy6rvAAAA__-cV1n8) was established with Fort Leaton as the county seat. The area around the present town of Presidio is believed to be the oldest continuously cultivated farmland in Texas. A viral Christmas lights display in Dallas didn't bring joy and peace for some of the homeowners' neighbors, and it cost the police department over $25,000. Check out [this story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUBp8Gd1j8OriguI273HZLC8MhHAmbCNg4efuVt9_uKz7NSPN1X-8OMx6P_24H29-xrIIJTRmnTK7BYf6sagh2Y2HmA1h-k3pm0igzJGskhE3Pxm8TA7OpLW43ozU4zmXQWg5oLxjjTHIumdSjnPgUxByl0t5PyhDFIGAvdewJOrxdi_lTXlBHX_Yh29T7sxH5j4iFiOU8zzGWtzrgbNeBiOWaRCzB5ewa7QnoC6vLNJXvBtSniq3vrtGMj9Qb7dXFiJ76cnioRxuqDc8Tc8Y23Yhij91h_nX3P2O8rPgJAAD__zW-Y4s) and more in today's edition! Enjoy reading _The Texas Flyover_? We're sponsored today by [Upwellness](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQRp_GdCB7xhgoXERClrbItlsiYxtiaQgIm_y8_Yqb26adOTo6-v5dh6uNFO_zX7sEnV_TOgCHuuSi5Dh4G-k9yMLrkftOFEGLBuuOYyvb4qYxNOg74VqPY9M6hdDZ1uI4Odu4EUQR9SnjgqMQyLGuUAnloZtQ1s4p2TLJg4953at8Czm8bJrovT7CXrl1KUjfct4SwwsDw8Bsdg6pOrZnILqHlE6IgTlcOe8bHalMG1cniuZizJ-eYQ91LWXNQKVjjJ5hb4mivbuwLwyUO1JeFxMDeWTYfyy_BfvyKR9yIs6BgQqLjcSw99szEsWkGib5fB5_anf95ZG_7vrQ8D8AAP__H655BA). ## Authorities Search Home of New Orleans Terror Suspect
FBI agents and local law enforcement [conducted a search](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO3CAYhZ8Gd4y44yko0rjbtCmtH_g9kMVmBXi98_bRRKkibXl0LtL5fr2tb5BLPh4_YUc3vra6CiY0ZZwyuUbI5bmqKTrP4p1P6LiV-s7krOYpOaZmg0JpiDYCZ_fNeo4wex6tQe9xyu41xjiTnEsm9U0abqK4b1LpEIyaiWIY86jtNhIO_IK-lWf9xHYLdZ-KS2N8dCJ_ELEQsVzXdXtP9XyZRCzQRg4FiVgOvDoRS2h5f0lfz-brQftoiIPCGBDeiVh6gr2fkcZ80N_gPTT6X3Rga7X9a9BUzz7qQdP5SLRViEQsYtbUqBC4loayLQSqtI905tJQaay3mwKF0U7NxY8rl5K7sUSxxw65_H01vsX86cSfAAAA__9-nn_P) of Shamsud-Din Jabbar’s Harris County home on Thursday, the day after he used a rented truck to plow through a crowd of New Year’s revelers in New Orleans, killing 15 and injuring more than 30. Neighbors described the 42-year-old U.S. citizen and Army veteran as a quiet person who didn’t show signs of having been radicalized. Records show he [graduated from Beaumont Central High School](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vwyAYhH8N3rBevmwYGLp4S9eOFoaXGBWbyJA4-fdVqq4d73Q6PXq-LvPFpZz266fb0LZnLDMHrigwCmIOLuXXLLtgFwiGdWjZKJQBoaXuVjvquPARNYIHFDKq6BBMUAaUGPkQumTfZ8BAMCZAqF4MbAjcRCGV94PURAKG1MrRtxUbPl2N-VUeePS-bF22a2u3SsQH4RPh03mePeM7nnUv53tB-OSOlnxGwqd3T_jkj7T9RVqOjG6v1LXm_Dce1Jd7DvRWak1LftHVPZC2hJW2Qhd0963sjfBJAad6NJ5plNQwFql0OlIzgKJSROmMAm5w7A4bbmfKOdVhJBKum0v5F7396_Jh-U8AAAD__-EldEs) in 2001, was twice divorced with three kids, and had experienced recent financial struggles. Meanwhile, Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has called for the FBI agent in charge of the New Orleans investigation [to be fired](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2YzOZwPx4KELW7p2RBf7CFYNRsYKyb-v0s5dv096T3pf1-lKMcXt_kkru_qc84SAnQQlQU-BYnpNpgnuBsGqhp0adGdBX8ylWZzuEHEA4oHCzD0jAqLXvUV7I2-HJro3DBRopTTortW96gPaWZvO-95chAEOsebS1oUrP-mY0ys_uLQ-r01yS637IfSHwFHgeJ5n65eSt_crcNz4PASOVGr0if8GmUti2g5JtZL_lvMtSrrzViUCKLDWtPuyN8WF_YwpxaMfhIH7SjH9Ouu_ER4OfwIAAP__-eldng) after she initially declined to refer to the crime as an act of terror. Among the identified victims of the attack is [27-year-old Tiger Bech](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOpDAURL8GsouMbV6Bg03IetMN0cUPsNrYyL7bdP_9iNGkE5VKJR2Vzr_H8kAffNz-4mEVvV1aOOMdsBaYWAz68FlkbdTKzNTWVrWD6CYmRjnWuxpWtvbTwJkWbpDokDunNRuxG9fOOVl7dcNYy0TbCia6RvRtb_jkhOy07uVYSWaNp5Qb2i3ZNxYXPullc6PTUQe1E52lEn8qPld8vq6reb4x3mPF52ivcgeSTxED_HQ8ASNgOX32cYP4PxcLLiVaMQQohBkwGnBIu82QHHDAI8UNaLdgLBrw8WZBysFiLIBEqJ8Vn-uszHn5EHzph0qy7UAfvp_Sr-pein8FAAD__9G3czo), the brother of TCU wide receiver Jack Bech.
## More New Laws Take Effect
In addition to eliminating mandatory safety inspections for non-commercial vehicles, several other noteworthy laws [took effect on Jan. 1](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0T7tyhCAU_RrocHhcEAuKNNtt2pQO60Ulg7ijZNG_z7ipU51TnOfXvb_7mGKePv0SXDnGtZdcasYF46pHH9PZA0X34NgJGpxole64smDp7LQVFm2Lo9LcGjQC8QFgQXbaALSaRneFccGVEIor3SgjDMpuVKCHwYAlwAPGsm5NmUMJh9_HdK6vsDXDutDk5lKeO1EfRN6IvNVam3E9IIe6XwIibxf9A_a2s-Trzh5hijnHPLFvn3_8drJrB90cPmtMKe6mJcCnxcf0Lir_Pn85-RsAAP__uw5aNw). Texans can now prevent the collection of their personal data [using internet browsers and global device settings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1gXLj9mYOjClq4dLcwlMSqJI5vGydtXceduR-dInz6dr9N4iqWW2-UzXrNvz_MySpCag-CAI8VSX6PqyE9ATnTZC4vaAQ5q6GavQZNRFskpEIRoyU2DEai0yYROd8W_YSAAhUBA3aMRhqQ7o9IpGTUwBZlKW9a-zbnlZ9zO9bU88tqn5dpVP7d23xh-MBmYDPu-99_z8vMemQxxbSXVzGS45X1jMtQlxcpkOEB_NT8yr3Hf-NuFySAHzYU2WRqb-EQ5cqX1xAcVJ-4oGQPZCrDUrZ7ue6m1bMYyBZdrLPXwav8e9fDyNwAA__9UK2WY). This is a provision of the Texas Data Privacy and Security Act, which requires companies to disclose how they use customers’ personal data and provide an opportunity to opt out of its collection. New judicial districts were established for Denton, Edwards, Gillespie, and Kimball counties, and a new district will be established for Kendall County in October. For the next two years, appraisals for property without a homestead exemption and appraised for less than $5 million [cannot increase by more than 20% a year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnsTusw48JLihuky633dIinEPMLg4WoJC8_Srpt5_5Rpqvy3pxMcX77b_bybZnyKsAMTPgDOSKLqbXqka0V8CFj2T5Sc4LSKPMuFmDwhtEHlAjchkWIwCF8S4YOnnQY7RvDDhIziXIeZKaaxRLkGr2XiszKCCMLZepbdTo6WpIr_ygMvm8j8lurR11kP8GcR7Eufc-3anXTvTzDgzi_OmwLe-U-51KZTdqbHffubBrzrWxN8aOkg8q7cWae1JlAsAoJcdi8egxpVj1aVBw211Mn-H25xMPK34DAAD__1zEYhw).
## Viral Christmas Display Costs City $25,375
An elaborate Christmas lights display at a Dallas mansion [drew a flood of onlookers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUBp8Gd1j8OriguI273HZLC8MhHAmbCNg4efuVt9_uKz7NSPN1X-8OMx6P_24H29-xrIIJTRmnTK7BYf6sagh2Y2HmA1h-k3pm0igzJGskhE3Pxm8TA7OpLW43ozU4zmXQWg5oLxjjTHIumdSjnPgUxByl0t5PyhDFIGAvdewJOrxdi_lTXlBHX_Yh29T7sxH5j4iFiOU8zzGWtzrgbNeBiOWaRCzB5ewa7QnoC6vLNJXvBtSniq3vrtGMj9Qb7dXFiJ76cnioRxuqDc8Tc8Y23Yhij91h_nX3P2O8rPgJAAD__zW-Y4s) over the past few weeks, forcing the city to allocate 71 police officers over eight nights to manage traffic in the Preston Hollow neighborhood. While the display was initially well-received by neighbors, a Dec. 15 video posted on social media by the homeowners went viral, turning the quiet enclave “on its side” with visitors [coming to look at the house](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOgzAQheGnMZ2Rr1wKF9vQZdst0WAbGGliR9gKIU-_yvZbH-nT0f9zm2-AhGn7hnt09bXmWQlluZBc6DkA0jWbJrhFhFE20cle21HowQzN7qAbwVopO7uCMb5fFymDWAbthVjUGBt0H0xIoaXUQttWd7ILaly1sd53ZmBGxIA1H23dY40vKCtd-RmP1ud7Q26v9VGY_mJqYmo6z7NNiw_r-ZmZmlI8C1MTZQ_E1PTEA4gHIILCCbe98oDlQXDxAO83xcIx1XikWDmklK_CU8RtX_LxYXSvdN9ZpqbmcOFxIhGWrmdGbHdA-rtU_230dOo3AAD__-JIaaE). According to City Council member Gay Donnell Willis, the deployment of officers to manage traffic near the display [cost the Dallas Police Department $25,375](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHS2yAQhJ8GdXjgACMVKtKo-9Om9JzgsJicjQb4LevtM07qlDs7uzv7_fq6fWHm_Lz_xAfN_Z3KDRQ4qbRU5hYx83mzQ5xXFSc90Ky9cZMyox2HbQ4mWgMaxuhUnGxC8kHRGpx3dvXeD3n-lCmtjNZGGXcxV32NMCVjXQhXOwqrKOZe6qVv1OmNLfFZXlQvoTwGnrfe9ybMDwGLgOU4jsuRED-mgAVrz4FJwPKkowlYuARkAUtEZmwylO9nPwUsr1yRZdhqbv2BTXK-b73JmNvOeMpQ2kf9C3V873hSbRLcb7kXzoFkpVa-a6DPCIxerokMeGNltCNJGxLI0TiQRis9ubSOawhDneN-ZObcrl5YdX9g5r-3-n85v2b4EwAA__9Km3-E). "_That does not seem like the best way to deploy DPD resources, but it had to be done_ ," she said.

While the display was initially well-received by neighbors, a Dec. 15 video posted on social media by the homeowners went viral, turning the quiet enclave “on its side” with visitors . ## New Details Emerge on U.S. Terror Attacks
Authorities shared new details on the suspects in separate New Year’s Day attacks, confirming [no "definitive" link between](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAURp8GNqPrX2Dw0IUtXTsix74kboxBtonF21dUXbsd6ZOOPp2v23wzPvj4-DQr6rJsMwMmCVACfHbGh3MWrdMLIkPeoqY9lyMIqob2qRfHBgmCiVEYinJUUjmUwyiF4w4WaL2-bECBU8oV9B0oA5dC8B7MXdlGADpfttR9bz6WJy7h3N6YOrutbdDPUvbc8I-GTQ2baq1dvNuINV97w6YLGzYdmfxRxEq2FNDETEwpxr5ISce6k7JVTMSed0wlHfZF8pF3tCWT1QdfTDpJ8PFFko2GDnJU0Cbt9upD8Fn1jYDHanz4_VX-6_TW7CcAAP__L3drtA) the New Orleans assault and the explosion near a Trump hotel in Las Vegas. While both suspects were [stationed at Fort Bragg](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uwyAUxfGnsTesy4fBGRi6ZEvXjtY1XDs02ERAg_L2lbt3P_od6f91m28YYji2T9zJ1jXNAsTIgDOQs8cQ37PqvV2JBMmeLDdyvIDieurv1kmzTGRGqZeRe0QPWrlJLF6CB8CpD_bUgIPkXGowA2iEk1DSAC7adQrIh5ry8J3CUe-0xnd6UR5c2vto77U-Syc_OnHtxLW1NhzUSiN6nINOXF-0YWEHNZZyJDwKw1rRPQorP-VJrha2hxgq5jdbU65sybhtTABMF6X7bP2zhRhD0aZTsO0Y4t91_S_Fy4rfAAAA___aC2FW), North Carolina, officials said no records indicated they served in the same unit or during the same years. FBI officials said a [preliminary investigation indicated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFv8yAQQH-NvWEdYEM8MHyLt3xrR-sM54SWgAUkVv59RdW10z29k55O93Fdr-iDj7f_-CBT97QKEBMDzkCuDn14r2PvzE4kSPZkuJbTDCNXl_5u9KinXTmHerY4X7ZNwsSd5lwqsnam3ptWAw6yOdADKISWGKUG3JTtRiDna8rDZ_Kx3mkP7_SiPNj06IO513qUTv7rxNKJ5TzPIW420lnavhNLw04sz8J-qVLOKftSm2ApB8JYWM1P-8WwVmzDVnIMQ4rETiyMA7CDsqVYmY_l8JlYthH5RQEf-2zccfoQfFG6G-H2QB9-rqt_fetlxHcAAAD__zYNbXc) Army veteran Shamsud-Din Jabbar acted alone and was inspired by ISIS when he drove a truck into New Orleans' crowded Bourbon Street. Social media posts before the attack revealed he joined ISIS last year. In Las Vegas, authorities reported that decorated Green Beret Matthew Livelsberger [shot himself](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb8GOkfjGWNI4eI16fLaLZGxx8G7BiPjJMvfr9h-y6srHR2dj_t4tzHF9fHfLmxqyCMCdgKkABq9jekYVetNYEamlo3sqbuCknpoZ0NhkihDN-hhujIROcmDtxMPHLgHbKM5aSCBpCQN_QW0hROhqAc7adcoYB9rLpfPHNc6c0hHfnG5uLy0ycy1bntD_xq8NXiz28rv_bzOUWp0iRu81fJcNjHnyknw95byHvMqKu_JCndMXGp5ui_Ruc4OwUuyHTBOzrPSpwVfUXuFfVuM394xpbjrvlHwWGxMvx71ry4vgz8BAAD__6rqZFE) in the head shortly before detonating a Tesla Cybertruck outside the Trump International Hotel. The explosion resulted in minor injuries to seven people but caused no damage to the hotel.
## Mortgage Rates Spike, Demand Falls
A sharp rise in mortgage rates at the end of December [slowed mortgage demand](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uxCAQBOCnwR3WsmCcKyjSuLu0KS0Mi03Ez4lDZ93bR06fZpqRPo3m-77ebUyx7F82k-mhrgg4cRAc5OptTO9VDd4EIiQ5kBGznG6ghP4YDkMy2Gn2-rbdyGGgsJGalJAktN4w6CGaSwMBUgipYR5BW7gIJWewm3ZMAfnYaxt_aiz9oJDe9UVtdDUPyRy9P55MfjJcGC7neY6ubO4qGS4XzXABcQUyXHJtfbc7cU_ZFs99fNGTF7ItvTnig5qj0nmvnIrnCKj4ePSchmb844wpxaeemYI925j-FvT_HnkZ_A0AAP__Vf9glA) during the housing market’s typically quiet season. U.S. mortgage rates [reached their highest level since July](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAUBOCngc7R8Q8GChe3SZfbbokOeEy8MjgyFlHefsX2W45G-jSar8f04Jjivv7nDa6GPClSnSApSE-eY_pMpvUuAAq6hZO97kYy0g7t08HDLx2NsOPQQYdATFJD9rM1FIxto7s0kqSl1Jb6G1mmizC6J57t0hiCjzWX23eOe30ipE8-UW5L3trknrW-jkb_a9S9UXd-7XgfV3WFUuOS0Kj7lktdeYUoXHGIuIfENeZdBHgUTqLgQDkhZOhGHWhRapmNmSG7AD2wtKNiZfXQFudf75hSPGzfGFo3jul3Sf3rmdOpnwAAAP__J8RkPQ), with the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage climbing to 6.91%, up from 6.85% the previous week and 6.62% a year ago, according to Freddie Mac. Refinance applications, which are sensitive to rate changes, fell 36% compared to the previous month but remained 10% higher than a year ago. Purchase applications declined 13% during the same period and were 17% lower year-over-year, highlighting persistent weakness in the market despite increased housing inventory. Elevated prices and higher borrowing costs [have left many properties unsold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhSAUxvGngU1zOHBBB4YubLdrR4N4VFoUo9xrfPvG7p2_5Pfl__Xsnj6muE6ffiFbxtwh4KMCUYHsBh_T1Sk-2JEISXKywshHC0rohs_WBEMawFNL2ATZSkR69KEfmka1Zmx4tLcGAqQQUoOpQXu4CSUN-F4HpoCGWPJef-e4lpnGdOU37XXIC092LmU7mPxg6Bi68zzrsPbhHhk6BFQMnUCGTgqGbs6vI65Ttfj9h0p1vLYtXdVRfKJ6Lkviux22M6YUD22YgmnxMf09lf_K3xZ_AwAA__9F5lja).
## List: Income By State to Join the Top 1%
A recent study found that Americans need an [average income](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72O6yAQxfGngY5o-AiOC4rbuMttt7QmMMSssLHMbFZ5-5W33_pIv6P_x32-Y6lle_7HlQLnNhswVwVagZ0TlvqenUwhExmykoIe7HUEp_1NLsE7wBEox_EBpG-Q9ZUAcfRDimNOD1nCqYEGq7X1MFzAI5yEswPgw0fhgFLhdlw-W9l4oVzf7UXHJbZV1rAw713Yf8JMwkx9xYOxd-JzFmZKyKg6f6VCXZiJ26602umItLEqW2wrKQPGySOk_bvUWrofhIPniqX-XvBfya9gfgIAAP__2mlYKw) of $787,712 to be classified in the top 1% of salary earners nationwide. Financial site SmartAsset analyzed tax data from 2021, adjusting the figures to reflect June 2024 dollars, and determined that residents in [Connecticut, Massachusetts, and California](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtDAMBOCnCZ2Rk7DAX6T4G7q99koUErP4FAgCL4i3P7H9tfbo02i-n_3Tc-Ll9eVncjLm3qB5AGpA20fP6eqrIrqRyJAtyOnGPv5hpeu2mNyISI2xI7aDNQFbtKHVcRyGiOFBwRTsbg01Wq1tjU2JtcebqGyDfqiDqpAiS97Kn8yLTDSmKx-0lSHPRXKTyLor-1-ZTpnuPM_y4P3tU_Ari0-8yx1Uppv9ulIEmQh4CXkmWIjifclwy5-P5BU08AJ00HbBG3bYxQsp0xWbi-vJKfFeN6rC1-w5fUrIX6MczvwGAAD__-x-ZQM) had to earn the most—over $1 million a year—to enter the 1%. West Virginia required the lowest income for the top 1%, at $420,453, followed by Mississippi at $440,744 and New Mexico at $476,196. [See where your state ranks here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtDAMBOCnCZ2Rk7DAX6T4G7q99koUErP4FAgCL4i3P7H9tfbo02i-n_3Tc-Ll9eVncjLm3qB5AGpA20fP6eqrIrqRyJAtyOnGPv5hpeu2mNyISI2xI7aDNQFbtKHVcRyGiOFBwRTsbg01Wq1tjU2JtcebqGyDfqiDqpAiS97Kn8yLTDSmKx-0lSHPRXKTyLor-1-ZTpnuPM_y4P3tU_Ari0-8yx1Uppv9ulIEmQh4CXkmWIjifclwy5-P5BU08AJ00HbBG3bYxQsp0xWbi-vJKfFeN6rC1-w5fUrIX6MczvwGAAD__-x-ZQM).

While both suspects were , North Carolina, officials said no records indicated they served in the same unit or during the same years. FBI officials said a Army veteran Shamsud-Din Jabbar acted alone and was inspired by ISIS when he drove a truck into New Orleans' crowded Bourbon Street. Social media posts before the attack revealed he joined ISIS last year. In Las Vegas, authorities reported that decorated Green Beret Matthew Livelsberger in the head shortly before detonating a Tesla Cybertruck outside the Trump International Hotel. The explosion resulted in minor injuries to seven people but caused no damage to the hotel. Mortgage Rates Spike, Demand Falls A sharp rise in mortgage rates at the end of December during the housing market’s typically quiet season. U.S. mortgage rates , with the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage climbing to 6.91%, up from 6.85% the previous week and 6.62% a year ago, according to Freddie Mac. Refinance applications, which are sensitive to rate changes, fell 36% compared to the previous month but remained 10% higher than a year ago. Purchase applications declined 13% during the same period and were 17% lower year-over-year, highlighting persistent weakness in the market despite increased housing inventory. Elevated prices and higher borrowing costs . Financial site SmartAsset analyzed tax data from 2021, adjusting the figures to reflect June 2024 dollars, and determined that residents in had to earn the most—over $1 million a year—to enter the 1%.
