A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7685334da4604f62b99178052053594c&_e=OHK3a0BYbztuUwP3R_tufb3Mv2u7PdA-J5mgQ890irKcyzSRaKr_ATMXoVLs0Jc4VzO_42Lk4afJXKppXKjl54_8Kb-YmnV0Mbbxwuk0Ydh5mg23ihBXNSTmzWx-6-51tduuosMh9DkUd4Nzpngue5HgF0n2_RWo5oTIDGhZtAQh9l_vDQqG0QNxsPkXWhayf_Df-EvUJ4ZMNLg-tQ6f3i-OnQ7NUdzJlJGMsKwxHI0Oh7iU4WA4t6z8FN19X7IyKRj3tfiKgYJ_DC5NiCCrXMyxBVCiuk5gTkT7WoH7JPh2qmCoYubElDXb-311ouCy61b_jA2abBuRqHmNLemKZuT9VuRuXWr5RqDYGk0SA-Hsey4iI_sniFXN8IlBpqPY1DNUn5Dn_9CGNbH4oU15Bw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: History Facts
subject: How many people were there in the year 1?
body:
There are currently around 8 billion people living on Earth — more than quadruple the global population in 1920. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68celaij0bq3gmju3drafnkfiuvjgv8iaaibzebdfmysjtbqufgm51i6306p87oxowgx1z9hyfzjpgbnkckwespm7kw00klwl84eguyizehggmw0uthc0rq0urxydsio9vzneont0x5mel8f3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The global population in the year 1 CE was around only 200 million.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T here are currently around 8 billion people living on Earth — more than quadruple the global population in 1920. But before the planet hit its first billion people at the beginning of the 19th century, population growth tended to be slower. At the beginning of the Common Era (CE) — the year 1 — Earth was home to as few as 170 million people, [according to](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) a widely cited 1978 source, _Atlas of World Population History_ by Colin McEvedy and Richard Jones. That’s about the population of Bangladesh today. Of course, estimating a worldwide head count from 2,000 years ago isn’t an exact science; researchers suggest it could be as high as 400 million, and the United Nations typically puts the [estimate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) at 300 million.
---
Around 1 CE, the world was [at the tail end](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of a population growth cycle that started around 5000 BCE, when only about 5 million human beings roamed the Earth. Population growth then accelerated with the expansion of agriculture. According to McEvedy and Jones, the rate of growth peaked around 1000 BCE with the beginning of the Iron Age. The world population doubled between 1000 and 500 BCE, and nearly doubled between 500 BCE and 1 CE. Growth then slowed to a rate of 12% between 1 CE and 500 CE.
Population growth continued to be slow during the Middle Ages. The bubonic plague killed around 25 million people in Europe alone, and Mongol invasions in China killed around 35 million people and wiped out agricultural infrastructure. Growth rates picked back up around 1700, and continued to increase until the 1960s. While it may seem like the population is expanding at a breakneck speed, annual growth rates have actually been on the decline since then. The United Nations expects the population to stabilize around 10.4 billion and even start declining again around 2086.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spihox&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## About 117 billion people have lived on Earth.
To put in perspective how much the world’s population has grown in the last few centuries: The 8 billion people alive today represent around 6.8% of all human beings who have ever existed. Around 117 billion total people have lived since _Homo sapiens_ first appeared around 190,000 BCE. Put into the full context of the roughly 300,000 years of human history, 6.8% is a pretty huge chunk.

clean_body: There are currently around 8 billion people living on Earth — more than quadruple the global population in 1920. | T here are currently around 8 billion people living on Earth — more than quadruple the global population in 1920. But before the planet hit its first billion people at the beginning of the 19th century, population growth tended to be slower. At the beginning of the Common Era (CE) — the year 1 — Earth was home to as few as 170 million people, a widely cited 1978 source, Atlas of World Population History by Colin McEvedy and Richard Jones. That’s about the population of Bangladesh today. Of course, estimating a worldwide head count from 2,000 years ago isn’t an exact science; researchers suggest it could be as high as 400 million, and the United Nations typically puts the at 300 million. Around 1 CE, the world was of a population growth cycle that started around 5000 BCE, when only about 5 million human beings roamed the Earth. Population growth then accelerated with the expansion of agriculture. According to McEvedy and Jones, the rate of growth peaked around 1000 BCE with the beginning of the Iron Age. The world population doubled between 1000 and 500 BCE, and nearly doubled between 500 BCE and 1 CE. Growth then slowed to a rate of 12% between 1 CE and 500 CE. Population growth continued to be slow during the Middle Ages. The bubonic plague killed around 25 million people in Europe alone, and Mongol invasions in China killed around 35 million people and wiped out agricultural infrastructure. Growth rates picked back up around 1700, and continued to increase until the 1960s. While it may seem like the population is expanding at a breakneck speed, annual growth rates have actually been on the decline since then. The United Nations expects the population to stabilize around 10.4 billion and even start declining again around 2086. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Shortest time period (in years) in which the world population has doubled 37 | | Year Augustus became the first Roman emperor 27 BCE | Year Augustus became the first Roman emperor 27 BCE | | Estimated global births in 2023 1.32 million | | Population of the U.S. in 2024 ~337 million | Population of the U.S. in 2024 ~337 million | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- About 117 billion people have lived on Earth. To put in perspective how much the world’s population has grown in the last few centuries: The 8 billion people alive today represent around 6.8% of all human beings who have ever existed. Around 117 billion total people have lived since Homo sapiens first appeared around 190,000 BCE. Put into the full context of the roughly 300,000 years of human history, 6.8% is a pretty huge chunk. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91bc154d1da84b399ae211b8cac87edb&_e=u0B04at2YOGj_jfPbrTFdpCIjDz-Ll4jZww5kCx9lnlLxY89nl4aX7ocw_aob2hPzrTh54VIEchO7u9y9aj6dv2pW8axLK30xMMXZ42zG2vQBZLXx-McoVLEqfP8nZsUKkAFsumifC87s6fhKa2DNN9ZtBDEF3FMQ1Cj-3dR-pbl5MaEJrjhWFfUhga-9fHbrvt9EMfsnXhQ5Rkppn7IOj1EQpIEWE8ZbYgP9dYVvoc27neL7vxIc1bUseOFW0H9BYIIkFKTVjLG6Df_jP8yeGnqpxMU5wFWPqzW2Ysvps7OmZHNAlzaQU8tkBgBVEjHFvrlzsSQ_hVPptDTMiJEAeZ-az8YuyZPU--XcTtr9lQUzmb5fTn0jrQMmKSUiPKKd1SPmQ1QP84S7QMtI1oNdg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91bc154d1da84b399ae211b8cac87edb&_e=u0B04at2YOGj_jfPbrTFdpCIjDz-Ll4jZww5kCx9lnlLxY89nl4aX7ocw_aob2hPzrTh54VIEchO7u9y9aj6dv2pW8axLK30xMMXZ42zG2vQBZLXx-McoVLEqfP8nZsUKkAFsumifC87s6fhKa2DNN9ZtBDEF3FMQ1Cj-3dR-pbl5MaEJrjhWFfUhga-9fHbrvt9EMfsnXhQ5Rkppn7IOj1EQpIEWE8ZbYgP9dYVvoc27neL7vxIc1bUseOFW0H9gDOmpYKcU9VrKMqatOhO-QRf5QF96TozUAhVqD-cK_1JE5m7VHVCdKSE5iEfv54F3ptuWLoFHuk3uQQbgjyEkvKnSzy5QUQNum2mko04zNRoDyb_xwpk1RCh5FuSMkJVtF5gGdcclHR_TMqPkMFi7w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91bc154d1da84b399ae211b8cac87edb&_e=u0B04at2YOGj_jfPbrTFdpCIjDz-Ll4jZww5kCx9lnlLxY89nl4aX7ocw_aob2hPzrTh54VIEchO7u9y9aj6dv2pW8axLK30xMMXZ42zG2vQBZLXx-McoVLEqfP8nZsUKkAFsumifC87s6fhKa2DNN9ZtBDEF3FMQ1Cj-3dR-pbl5MaEJrjhWFfUhga-9fHbrvt9EMfsnXhQ5Rkppn7IOj1EQpIEWE8ZbYgP9dYVvoc27neL7vxIc1bUseOFW0H9mHx7xE27577ZhO01iRX6HO0_xKZmXH8oR-mYB_wtpwTM7uYpp3ZA8nY4pRH_SuiLMqX8VX2T0v4UQOMlD_0MB0nBzaQ5XiSTn4hEb3vPDlmTPzgO2VJzD-C9O7XExW6cT-Ebxxrc0Ka7DERf7c-VVw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

House Republicans are fixin' to make some noise in 2025, and _we need your help to make it happen._ **Our End of Year goal deadline has been extended for one more day, and we 've granted you a 2x MATCH to help us reach our goal.**

They're still reeling from their crushing defeat in November, and now _**they're more determined than ever to undermine our AMERICA FIRST agenda.**_

---
| | | [DOUBLE MY SUPPORT](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=752c31337aa244dc87bfd14c7685f9fd&_e=MjxSTasc5arinR-69s--zYlp1t8MjzqeCu3XfjFf4Ihuo-PPk5ga84wgL4ppFh7DqHHgDQH1SIOawFOQC6MsCyhzFPcR3zA3lpBrQ3uDw9cAQ_OySwPrCMU_96owsG8wWO9L7nNIjLN-lCMnDD4p7Ef-ZStWkznKqoW5yWcwyPqNlsflVdCOe5OLYOiIewjz-5Ny0aW6z-a6JhPHSLhWrtnRcuswD3zQv8XUpOj6mDxNrd2SC_k4WfwNAUEiTAl6tnTi77Aw6kXFTc7VcN34EhsSCBO1sB7SZyE9uue7_jGrE_E9LXglaOV6pr3jtuI_1wPA5riZUGZLEnrbw7a2OqNCN685JYsx2tbwk9tRuNssJTNK8QkCcT7XGQF0yWTBBXTHPz8fA41ht5NGaUOrk-vjpeb-uTqmgrNcZWzJH5osUgMZAgGY1ozWSwyV-m65LDUILAwBmi7Jt6TCwAA6ZlQr-DJESD4kzz7LyaLegC8%3D "CHIP IN $100 ")

The Radical Left is already plotting to block our agenda, from securing the border to rolling back the failed policies of the Biden-Harris administration. **But with your help, we can overcome their obstruction and make real progress.**

We can't let them succeed. We need your immediate support to fuel our efforts and ensure a strong start to 2025. House Republicans are ready to get to work, but we can't do it without you.

We're going to make America great again, but we need your support. **[Will you pitch in and help us reach our goal?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=752c31337aa244dc87bfd14c7685f9fd&_e=MjxSTasc5arinR-69s--zYlp1t8MjzqeCu3XfjFf4Ihuo-PPk5ga84wgL4ppFh7DqHHgDQH1SIOawFOQC6MsCyhzFPcR3zA3lpBrQ3uDw9cAQ_OySwPrCMU_96owsG8wWO9L7nNIjLN-lCMnDD4p7Ef-ZStWkznKqoW5yWcwyPqNlsflVdCOe5OLYOiIewjz-5Ny0aW6z-a6JhPHSLhWrtnRcuswD3zQv8XUpOj6mDxNrd2SC_k4WfwNAUEiTAl6tnTi77Aw6kXFTc7VcN34EhsSCBO1sB7SZyE9uue7_jGrE_E9LXglaOV6pr3jtuI_SVsqUmbZEV-FTdBAe49MBTRoS2K90onSwNHknkZnXGbs8p7nxFS7bmki8dzh0AQkxQwiQYPsL665zxSHK0jtFnpKqOZk13WM78yNYX3rKTqhdy0vWXQpmopqdf9Lkq1PkojIh-0t3OnsjA-oKChtsjyVV_GCyEmWNY1wR4QSeLk%3D "Will you pitch in and help us reach our goal?")**

name: Scott Jensen
subject: Clarence Thomas & Our Lawsuit
body:
An update | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/lawsuit-thomas?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

As you'll recall, I am currently involved in a lawsuit against the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice - in order to protect doctors' and professionals' free speech rights. No one's livelihoods should be threatened because they hold dissenting views. Trivia question: what do NBA legend John Stockton, the state of Washington, and Justice Clarence Thomas have in common when it comes to our lawsuit? Well, they all strengthen our case in Minnesota. Watch the [update video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=5704328243&e=9828080a05) on this encouraging news below:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d78afdd7fe&e=9828080a05)
---
| This is about free speech, protecting people's rights, and ensuring that everyone can hold dissenting views without being politically persecuted. Entrenched governmental powers have overreached for the past 4 years - and may have indeed been politically weaponized two years ago. We need to make sure this never happens again - which is why I won't stop fighting. [Watch this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=20efefd2c4&e=9828080a05), share it, and [help us in our fight](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e41f61d137&e=9828080a05)!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

body:
What Pres. Trump said next shocked us

| | | | [](https://secure.winred.com/america-first-fund/aff-prsp-email-hillary-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_tc=CGV2-20250103&utm_source=pop&utm_campaign=20250102_aff_thankhillary&utm_content=donate&amount=25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)

|

From President Trump: “Thank you Hillary!”

Hillary Cassel was yet ANOTHER Democrat turned America First Patriot.

**[But you won’t believe what the “inclusive” Democrat Party forced her to do before she made the switch to the GOP:](https://secure.winred.com/america-first-fund/aff-prsp-email-hillary-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_tc=CGV2-20250103&utm_source=pop&utm_campaign=20250102_aff_thankhillary&utm_content=donate&amount=25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)**

[STAND WITH AMERICA FIRST LEADERS:](https://secure.winred.com/america-first-fund/aff-prsp-email-hillary-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_tc=CGV2-20250103&utm_source=pop&utm_campaign=20250102_aff_thankhillary&utm_content=donate&amount=25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)
ABANDON Israel.

DENOUNCE her Jewish heritage.

And worst of all... put America _**LAST**_.

High Ranking Democrat Party Bosses are seething after reading this news.

They _**HATE**_ that Florida is the most free state in the nation thanks to bold Republican leadership.

But sadly, as you’re reading this, they continue to double down on their woke agenda.

Fellow Patriot, we have to hold the line at all costs so please - could we count on seeing your continued support for America First Leaders across Florida?

[KEEP FLORIDA RED:](https://secure.winred.com/america-first-fund/aff-prsp-email-hillary-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_tc=CGV2-20250103&utm_source=pop&utm_campaign=20250102_aff_thankhillary&utm_content=donate&amount=25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)
|
---
**We’re ecstatic that another Patriot can join the ranks, but we still have so much work to do.
**
The out-of-touch Democrat Party won’t give us an inch. We have to draw a line in the sand right now and we can’t do it without you.

|

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/3/2025
body:
David Weiss, the terminated Jeffco chief of schools, found dead in Maryland
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey everyone,
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
🏔️**Here in Colorado...** David Weiss, the recently terminated Jefferson County schools chief, was [found dead in Maryland](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Next, in preparation of his move to Colorado’s upper chamber for the 75th legislative session, [Marc Catlin](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) views his new role through a lens of humor, humility and determination. Attorney General Phil Weiser was the first to declare a run in the [Democratic field for governor](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And lastly, Colorado faces ongoing challenges with [ranchers filing $580,000 in claims](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for wolf-related livestock losses, threatening to deplete the Wolf Depredation Compensation Fund and sparking debates over the state’s reintroduction policies.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** The Trump administration doubles down on its firm stance [against sanctuary cities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with allies warning of legal consequences for jurisdictions that defy federal immigration laws. Meanwhile, the FBI continues its investigation into the Las Vegas Cybertruck explosion, focusing on [potential ties to Colorado Springs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, January 3, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[David Weiss, the terminated Jeffco chief of schools, found dead in Maryland](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Two weeks after ex-Jefferson County Chief of Schools David Weiss was [terminated](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), he is believed to have committed suicide, Fox 31 News is reporting.
He was found dead following allegations he had been in possession of child sexual assault material. Weiss was terminated Dec. 19 during an investigation.
The Jefferson County Sheriff’s Office is investigating Weiss, Fox 31 News reported.
The Jefferson County Sheriff’s Office was contacted by the Washington, Md., Sheriff’s Office on New Year’s Day that a death investigation into Weiss was taking place, Fox 31 reported. He was visiting family there.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Marc Catlin drawing on youth football, rafting and Bigfoot for inspiration as he ‘graduates’ to Senate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* As Marc Catlin transitions to the Colorado Senate, he draws on lessons from coaching youth football and navigating contentious issues like water policy and wolf reintroduction, emphasizing humility and collaboration in his new role.
* Catlin warns of difficult negotiations over Colorado River water allocations, criticizing the lack of credit for past over-deliveries and stressing the need to include ranchers and farmers in policy discussions.
* Known for his humor, Catlin joked about introducing a "Bigfoot protection" bill and highlighted the importance of small, realistic legislative changes to benefit Colorado communities.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[AG Weiser first in the Democratic field for governor: ‘I’m committed to fighting for the people of Colorado’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser announced his candidacy for governor, becoming the first Democrat to declare for the 2026 race as Jared Polis completes his final term.
* Weiser’s platform can be found on his website, focusing on making Colorado more affordable, protecting reproductive rights, protecting land, air, and water "for our kids and grandchildren”, and expanding access to education.
* The website also boasts several of his office’s more well-known actions, including the attempt to block a merger between King Soopers and Safeway, the Reproductive Health Equity Act, suing pharmaceutical companies and the prosecution of Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Ranchers hit CPW with $580k in compensation claims for livestock impacted by wolves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Grand County ranchers submitted claims for livestock losses attributed to wolf attacks following the first year of the state’s wolf reintroduction program, including missing animals, lower birth rates, and decreased livestock weight.
* If approved, these claims could deplete the Wolf Depredation Compensation Fund, forcing Colorado Parks and Wildlife to seek additional funding or reallocate from other state resources.
* Ranchers are urging the state to reassess wolf management strategies, including stronger definitions for “chronic depredation” and improved response protocols, to mitigate future financial and ecological impacts.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Trump ally America First Legal warns sanctuary cities of violating federal law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [NEWSMAX](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* America First Legal, a nonprofit linked to President-elect Donald Trump, has issued warnings to sanctuary city leaders nationwide, highlighting legal consequences for non-compliance with federal immigration laws.
* Sanctuary cities, which restrict cooperation with federal immigration enforcement, were described as violating federal statutes by America First Legal's president, Stephen Miller, and others in a formal letter.
* The letters are part of a broader push against sanctuary policies as Democratic leaders, including Colorado Governor Jared Polis, formulate strategies to counter anticipated mass deportation efforts under Trump's administration.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[FBI descends on Colorado Springs home as Cybertruck investigation continues](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Federal agents raided a Colorado Springs townhouse as part of the investigation into a Tesla Cybertruck explosion outside the Trump International Hotel in Las Vegas, which killed one person and injured seven others.
* The Cybertruck, rented via Turo, carried fireworks and camp fuel canisters. Investigators tracked its movements from Colorado to Las Vegas using Tesla charging station logs.
* Law enforcement has not ruled out terrorism as a motive and is investigating possible links to other recent attacks, including a deadly vehicle incident in New Orleans on New Year’s Day.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[In tight vote for Speaker, Johnson could potentially sweep four GOP votes from Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | JANUARY 1** _A slight Republican margin in the U.S. House will make Speaker Mike Johnson’s re-election bid later this week potentially a must-see._ __
__**[Top Stories of 2024: Elections, password leaks, Tren de Aragua, Trump visit and more](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | DECEMBER 30** _There’s one thing to say for 2024 in reflection — it wasn’t boring on the political front.****Along the way there were a dozen candidates for one highly coveted seat in the U.S. House, a once in three-decades special selection committee, a Secretary of State failing to keep passwords secure, the trial of Tina Peters, members of the GOP’s central committee unable to agree on leadership, a visit to the state from Donald J. Trump, gang violence in Aurora, Republican gains and much more.****_________
**[Boebert’s Fish Recovery Act saves endangered fish, secures water for future generations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | DECEMBER 30** _Last week, Rep. Lauren Boebert’s Fish Recovery Act passed, protecting four endangered fish species and empowering water use and development.___

**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** William Howard Taft, unlike most presidents, served as **governor of the Philippines and Cuba** before ascending to the White House. Despite his preference for a judicial career, Taft’s wife Nellie enthusiastically supported his political roles, including his tenure as governor-general from 1901 to 1903. Charlie Kirk **[shattered a left-wing college student's entire argument](https://substack.com/redirect/79340f4c-be48-4ace-8af6-067bc00b34ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about "systemic racism" being responsible for crime in the black community by bluntly stating a few hard-to-swallow stats.
"There's a reason that a lot of the black community doesn't have a father, it's because of systemic racism. Black men are more likely to be in prison," the girl told Kirk.
"Why do people go to prison?" Kirk asked in response.
**[Watch this girl's entire woke worldview come crashing down](https://substack.com/redirect/79340f4c-be48-4ace-8af6-067bc00b34ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as Kirk schools her on a very tense topic.

name: Pat Herrity
subject: I'm Running for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter,

As the last elected Republican in Fairfax County, I've seen first-hand what happens when liberal politicians are allowed to govern.

Since 2021, Virginia has been on the right track under the commonsense, conservative leadership of Governor Glenn Youngkin. In 2025, it is crucial that we continue that commonsense direction.

**That's why today, I'm announcing my campaign for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.**

Alongside Winsome Sears in the Governor's mansion and Jason Miyares as Attorney General, we will continue the commonsense, conservative legacy that Governor Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Sears, and Attorney General Miyares have established since their victory in 2021.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=e4e66988dd&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
Watch my announcement video here
|
---
| As a lifelong resident of the Commonwealth, public service and community engagement have always been an important part of my life. I began my career in business, repeatedly guiding small businesses and mid-sized companies to financial success and became a recognized leader in the business, sports and civic communities.

Eventually, I took that service to a new level by running for the Board of Supervisors. Despite the efforts of the liberal Democrat machine in Fairfax County, I successfully won re-election in 2023 in a district where Governor Youngkin received just 38% of the vote.

On the Board of Supervisors, I've been my liberal counterparts' worst nightmare. Not only do I stand in the way of their liberal agenda, **I get things done and deliver commonsense, conservative solutions for the voters who elected me.**

I stopped a meals tax that would have hurt our local residents and businesses. I funded our brave men and women in law enforcement. I reformed the county’s compensation programs to benefit employees and save money for taxpayers. And I was the only elected official to say no when they wanted to silence parents, close schools, and mask kids.

In Richmond, I am eager to continue pursuing the commonsense, conservative solutions that best serve our communities and our Commonwealth. I will lead efforts to lower taxes, support law enforcement, and advocate for our children. I’ll stand up to the liberal prosecutors releasing repeat violent offenders into our neighborhoods. I’ll crack down on localities that refuse to cooperate with ICE to enforce our laws, and I’ll focus education resources on students and quality teachers – not on political agendas.

Republicans can win again in Virginia this year, but it's critical that we improve in Northern Virginia. I've won here for years, and I'll do it again in November for our ticket.

I'm excited to share more with you over the coming months, and I look forward to the opportunity to connect in-person as I travel the Commonwealth! Ultimately, I hope to earn your support as we work to continue the legacy of commonsense, conservative leadership in Richmond.

Thank you,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor
---
|
---

Throughout 2024, we supported 80 pro-choice, pro-women women candidates from 23 states + 1 U.S. territory against their extremist, anti-choice, anti-women opponents. Across the country, many Her Bold Move candidates won their elections, including:

🗳️ Molly Cook, Texas State Senate

🗳️ Maggie Douglas, Nebraska State Board of Education

🗳️ Ruwa Romman, the Georgia State House

🗳️ Quantá Crews, Arizona House of Representatives

_...and so many more!!_

Plus, thanks to your support this past election, 44% of our _winners_ were women of color, and 47% of our _winners_ came from abortion-ban states (which many doubted was possible!) Almost ALL of our winners shattered glass ceilings with their victories!

[**As the fastest-growing support network for women candidates in the U.S., we are just getting started. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Day One
body:
#

Peter — today’s the day.
In a few hours I’ll be sworn into the United States Senate.
I’m proud to serve, and I’m especially proud that I’ll be the first Latino Senator to represent the state of Arizona in Washington.
And as I get ready to take my oath of office, I would be extremely grateful to know that I can count on your support over the next six years.
So, I’m asking you: [**Add your name here to personally endorse my work and be one of the first members of Team Gallego. There’s a lot to do, and we’ll get a whole lot more done together.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_jan25/?source=em250103-1-160&akid=3632%2E734936%2EtA78Yn) Thanks so much. Let’s make this count. Ruben

subject: Bumping yesterday’s message for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Only a few hours left to sign the card for George

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=5sYbwe9KnPmylKofT0wuqEM8EbXeKJ2bxsRHEo8dZxjvXATigdGTlooZP6ZNd9tdAWLUEHsFw13NBB6ib4o1vCiLVTbTPw2LFRVch3v5wcxiyYpTPV%2FqfwxUQbB8u037yzeuELP1knfZAPKLmIncID%2FP%2BoaWfjP8W7w04dWtm6yuiHudIGGYh7PoqybbG3DpzHuuSgiferOAzS9ck%2FUNY6C%2Fe8A%2FiJb%2BvWTHwRL6G0m0QiqTOXaspARyuXiI8Gu70k2gcHxEnyO9JA%2Fi5jkZKyebr2RkHJ09LHPYiyQZUMXWrk6rWamf4jbAbkE2RyyvBlKeMxNHo9nSKoSU9vkmwUQG6X6rEb93X00I%2BxruJlwdoEOgXiwrsj6AX1gQSlqukPbO4Nv3%2FiofUuMkssOyD1pJoywhTPqKH4Eiz7yuEwlqo5Bv3z6XWG8wSjt0kIv9)

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: Only a few hours left to sign the card for George George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, did you see this message from our team yesterday? We’re only a few hours away from George’s official swearing in to Congress, and we want to surprise him with a card signed by some of our top supporters. | Begin Forwarded Message: Hey Peter, team Latimer here! Tomorrow, George will officially be sworn in to represent New York’s 16th Congressional district in the 119th Congress, and we want to surprise him with a card signed by our campaign’s top supporters. You’ve been part of this campaign – from when George announced he was running for Congress in December 2023, to winning our primary in June, to our victory on Election Day. None of it would be possible without supporters like you. Now, as George prepares to be sworn into office, – Team Latimer | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Today, the new Congress will be sworn in
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now is the time to make sure our elected leaders listen to the will of the American people and take action to save lives from preventable gun violence.
#

Friends, today is the swearing-in of the 119th Congress. When this happens every two years, I look back fondly at my first swearing-in ceremony—a day where I was filled with hope and determination. I knew that as a Congresswoman, I was stepping into an important role where I had the ability to help enact meaningful legislation to improve the lives of millions across our nation.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=1&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)
I am so proud of the 140 gun safety champions GIFFORDS PAC endorsed last election cycle who will be members of the 119th Congress, and who are getting to experience the joy of their own swearing-in ceremony today. I know that all of these leaders will be steadfast partners in our movement to end gun violence.
But of course, there will be real challenges ahead. Both the House and Senate will now be under Republican control, and in just a few weeks, Donald Trump will be our president once again.
We are going to need to work harder than ever before to defend our gun safety progress from being dismantled by elected officials on the MAGA right who would rather advance dangerous gun lobby priorities than keep their constituents safe.
This is not a time to sit by the sidelines. This is a time where we all must come together and put in the work to defend the gun violence prevention movement we’ve worked so hard to build together.
[**So please, with the 119th Congress being sworn in today, will you please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to help fuel our work to end gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=2&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan25.3xfxGv&amount=3&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=21&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan25.xCIqU-&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=22&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan25.zfvo3C&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=23&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan25.YOf15l&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=24&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan25.Eu0hgI&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=25&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan25.3xfxGv&refcode=em250103-1-b&t=26&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945)**
---
****
Commonsense gun safety measures have widespread support from Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. Now is the time to make sure our elected leaders listen to the will of the American people and take action to save lives from preventable gun violence.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=9757%2E3935704%2EZBw945) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: BREAKING: Mike Johnson Wins House Speaker
body:

# **Mike Johnson Wins Speaker of the House**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vylcx-rcj2dg-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | folks, Moments ago, MAGA extremist Mike Johnson secured the House speakership, proving once again that the Republican Party is nothing more than Donald Trump’s personal playground. Johnson is not a leader—he’s a puppet who will bend to Trump’s will and Elon Musk’s billionaire agenda at every turn. Republicans have just handed Trump and his billionaire allies unchecked power to pass their reckless agenda. From slashing Medicare to pushing tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy, Johnson will rubber-stamp every disastrous policy Trump demands. Americans deserve leaders with backbone—Johnson’s spinelessness threatens to destroy everything we’ve fought for. [**_The time to fight back is now. The GOP has shown us who they are. Let’s show them who we are. Chip in today to help us hold these MAGA extremists accountable._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vylcx-rcj2dh-kyd76rh4/)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The next two years

body:
Today the 119th Congress begins, marking the start of my fourth term in the House
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1428%2E791427%2E_wbBOV)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3025?t=2&akid=1428%2E791427%2E_wbBOV)
Team — Today the 119th Congress begins, marking the start of my fourth term in the House of Representatives alongside the incredible team that makes up our progressive movement.
The next two years are certain to bring challenges and chaos. We’ve already had a look at how Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the far-right will be calling the shots for the GOP when we voted on the budget last month.
But there will be opportunities, too. Moments where we can block the far-right from passing their agenda, rally support for our progressive values, and even get big (and little) things done for our constituents.
So please, stay in the fight with me. Stay engaged in the movement we have been building together. Today is day one of our mission to take back the majority and deliver real change for our nation.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
* * *

**Don’t close this email just yet? 🙏**
Friend — We can't give up on our fight for the working class and justice for all. Ilhan needs all the help she can get as we kick off the new Congress. **[Please, make a contribution today and help us keep up the fight for our progressive agenda for the people >>](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan25.usI49z&refcode=em250103-1-gm&t=3&akid=1428%2E791427%2E_wbBOV)**

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Pennsylvania Forward Party January Newsletter
body:
New Year, New Opportunities!

|
## **Solutions, not Rhetoric;**
## **Forward, not Center**
In his recent appearance on the ‘Weekly Show’ podcast with Jon Stewart, senator Bernie Sanders said, “What does democracy mean? . . . It means that the government is supposed to represent me. I feel good about it. I have people there who know what I'm dealing with and are passing legislation that improves my life. Do you think most people in America believe that's the case now? They don't. They shouldn't.” The question is: how can this be changed? And what is the role of the Forward Party in that effort? If there’s one lesson we can clearly take from the last few years, it’s that partisan rhetoric is a much better tool for fundraising than for problem-solving. The major parties maneuver against each other, tugging power back and forth while the American people are stuck in the middle. But, after a 2024 election in which voters split for Trump or Harris in surprising ways, what is “the middle” now? And is that even the right question to ask? The antidote to partisan extremes isn’t to find the exact middle. That’s why it’s not quite right to call the Forward Party a “centrist party” (even though it’s often described that way). Instead, the Forward Party is about finding a solution that works, regardless of where it lies on the spectrum between Republican talking points and Democrat talking points. According to Stephanie Lepp (from ‘Faces of X’), it’s unlikely that the right solution to any policy problem is exactly in the center. Instead, “what's most likely is that most of us are partially right, and some of us are more right than others... which doesn't make for a great tagline, but that's what's up when you're contending with the full complexity of reality.” The Forward Party mission is to find and support candidates who uphold the ideal of “solutions, not rhetoric.” Those politicians don’t always find success in our current political landscape, which rewards party loyalty more than it rewards solving problems for constituents. There is a desperate need for an organization that can support good candidates without demanding their strict loyalty to a set of party talking points. That’s what the Forward Party can be, with your help. “Not Left. Not Right.” (And not “Center” either.) Just “Forward.” [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZWbwNLjI2OgEPmOvU5vPRV&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_january_newsletter&n=1)
* * *
### Support our 2025 Efforts
Please consider joining our monthly donors to help us build for the future. name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: Why Henry Kissinger Hated Lyndon LaRouche
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250103_sare_symposium&n=1)
---
| Friend – 2025 will surely be a year of transition, but to what? WIll we continue the endless war and genocide until the annihilation of us all? Or will we finally break free of this madness and join the global south in its anti-colonial revolution for economic development? It is clear that the British Empire and its associated American intelligence agencies (known by many as the "Deep State") are in panic mode about the potential for the incoming Trump Administration to change course. They are particularly terrified of two of Trump's nominees: Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel who have both expressed an intent to stop making policy based on lies and manipulation of the American people. There is a precedent for the targeting of American political leaders, and it was the case of former U.S. presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche. In 1982, Henry Kissinger wrote a letter to then-FBI Director William Webster urging that something must be done about “these [LaRouche] people...especially with respect to security”—and so the infamous "Get LaRouche" Task force began. On October 6, 1986, the Department of Justice ordered a massive raid on LaRouche’s Leesburg Virginia home and offices, involving over 400 U.S. Marshals, FBI agents, county police and others, in what was later revealed through an FOIA request to have been an attempt to assassinate LaRouche. The assault on LaRouche’s offices resulted in seizure of thousands of pages of documents, and a later-overturned “involuntary bankruptcy” of LaRouche-related periodical publications, effectively terminating the LaRouche movement’s communication with hundreds of thousands of his American supporters. But why? Just exactly _what_ was the "national security" risk that LaRouche posed to Kissinger and his policies? This week, I am joined by renowned election integrity expert and social media influencer Craig "Pasta" Jardula to explore this crucial issue which has huge implications in the current drive to finally bring down the entire "lawfare" apparatus that has been terrorizing Americans ever since.
* * *

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Tell the Senate to vote NO on conspiracy theorist Kash Patel as FBI Director
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand the Senate REJECT Kash Patel as Director of the FBI](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26b3a03d-2d09-4106-8d53-2b5539187e7e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d5bc495-0211-45b2-9bb0-82ebe924f312/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump has nominated known conspiracy theorist and MAGA extremist Kash Patel to lead the FBI. [**And if we care about America there's no way in hell we can let this happen. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa127256-d05d-4ab8-8457-83489773a2a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Kash Patel has spread dangerous lies about the integrity of our elections as well as QAnon conspiracy theories. He has made it clear that he will use the FBI to go after a list of political "enemies" that includes Bill Barr, Hillary Clinton, the current FBI director, and dozens of others, and has promised to "come after the people in the media who lied about American citizens, who helped Joe Biden rig presidential elections." Patel would be an absolute disaster as head of the FBI, and he would destroy the system of justice we've taken 200+ years to build. We need the Senate to vote NO on his confirmation and stop him from weaponizing the FBI against his "enemies." [**Sign your name to Demand the Senate REJECT Kash Patel as Director of the FBI >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcca3b468-7598-4fab-9ced-1a9829f91d7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Marina, All On The Line
subject: An update on our progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
A surge of donations put us in a strong position for 2025.
|
---

I hope your new year is off to a good start Peter, and that you had a chance to recharge and connect with loved ones over the holidays.
I wanted to quickly update you on the progress of our end-of-year fundraising efforts. I’m happy to report that the surge of donations from supporters like you put us in a strong position for 2025.
**This is great news — because there’s a lot of tough work ahead.**
2025 is not an “off year.” As A.G. Holder often reminds us, there is no such thing as an off year in the fight for our democracy. There is much work to be done this year — including energizing voters to engage in elections across the country that will decide the control of multiple state legislatures (special elections are taking place in Virginia next week!), governorships, and at least four state supreme court seats.
We will also need to be ready to seize opportunities for redistricting reforms this year — and we must be prepared to push back against the concrete threats ahead from Donald Trump and his allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and, of course, ongoing gerrymandering attempts.
It’s a lot. But we have a plan to get it done, we are laser-focused, and I deeply believe in the power of this organization and its supporters. I know if we stay focused and give it all we’ve got, we can move the needle on our mission to end gerrymandering — even during a Trump administration — just like we did the first time.
Thanks again — more from me soon.
Marina

Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, All On The Line

This is great news — because there’s a lot of tough work ahead. 2025 is not an “off year.” As A.G. Holder often reminds us, there is no such thing as an off year in the fight for our democracy. There is much work to be done this year — including energizing voters to engage in elections across the country that will decide the control of multiple state legislatures (special elections are taking place in Virginia next week!), governorships, and at least four state supreme court seats. We will also need to be ready to seize opportunities for redistricting reforms this year — and we must be prepared to push back against the concrete threats ahead from Donald Trump and his allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and, of course, ongoing gerrymandering attempts. It’s a lot. But we have a plan to get it done, we are laser-focused, and I deeply believe in the power of this organization and its supporters. I know if we stay focused and give it all we’ve got, we can move the needle on our mission to end gerrymandering — even during a Trump administration — just like we did the first time. Thanks again — more from me soon. Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director, All On The Line = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

**_IT’S ALMOST TIME, FRIEND!!_** Be part of history TODAY as Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. takes the oath for his second Congressional term! Watch the official swearing-in ceremony **LIVE!****at 12:00 PM.** 🎥 Tune in HERE: **[https://live.house.gov/](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=5d2a5a1997334d9e8ff1701ef14925b6&_e=hIjJpotSn-AjSzSHcAH06XZzwWudvNhzejSFuGYUD8T86AQxuin0v8JHNRriRqk365_jcU0RgNOQWmu9VkrjvtK_ljKxUvsab_fUP2l1Diu5jTYSYEE40Fnl1PJ65-W21Wc0so6E60WVcoV0UJ_tTuQGk4XFaMNC5nxSx7RnxAVXDs29eshznkFAMUAfbaL55RPvwDTm_QI4WUVNeMpW9A%3D%3D) ** Your support made this incredible moment possible, and it would mean the world to Tom if you joined us to celebrate this milestone. Thank you for everything. —Team Kean \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team KeanDate: Fri 12/27 Subject: Don’t Miss It: Tom Kean, Jr. Swearing-In Friend, Don’t miss this historic moment! On January 3rd, the 119th Congress will be sworn in, and Tom Kean, Jr. will take the oath for his **second term** as New Jersey’s Congressman. You’ll be able to tune in LIVE on January 3rd as Tom Kean, Jr. is sworn in for his second term as New Jersey’s Congressman! 📺 Save the link to join us live for the ceremony: [**https://live.house.gov/**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=5d2a5a1997334d9e8ff1701ef14925b6&_e=hIjJpotSn-AjSzSHcAH06XZzwWudvNhzejSFuGYUD8Tzmvo0FzCN4HNF_DsKJ63uYcaCHHC7vCthBCFUgzJlx5DOJxnon_5LQS93XWtpI2h-yiN1KjG8psZWlpRhSDDe1CYr2p9OX5Pvb2wd-29L-a4osbXxTf--wRmV_vL-qHLpQd9cm5QJNtoRX067XvGvdtE7YDHlba9NPSDBrQdI7Q%3D%3D) 📺 The swearing-in ceremony kicks off the next chapter of service for NJ-07. Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. and his team are ready to continue fighting for our district, and the D.C. office will officially reopen on January 3rd to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. Please reach us anytime at [**info@tomkean.com**](mailto:info@tomkean.com). We hope you will tune in to celebrate with us and kick off the new year together!

Cheers to 2025,Team Kean

Happy New Year, Peter!

You've already shown me there is reason to be hopeful this year. I am thrilled to announce that, thanks to your support of the Center for Reproductive Rights, we have _exceeded our year-end campaign goal!_

Your support will power our fight challenging abortion bans, expanding access to reproductive health care around the world, and challenging the regressive Project 2025 agenda every step of the way.

_And that is just the beginning of what we have planned for 2025._

Already, 2025 feels like a breath of fresh air. That may seem unusual, given the challenges we can already expect this year. But your generosity and support demonstrate _just how strong and dedicated_ our movement is. Now, we can move forward with clear eyes, recommitted to restoring, defending, and expanding reproductive rights across the U.S. and around the world.

We have a lot of work to do. But we have an amazing team behind us—all of you! Together, we are the vanguard of the movement for reproductive rights. Thank you for being with us!

Onward!

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

P.S. [**If you didn't have a chance to make your year-end gift, it's not too late! Your gift of any amount will fuel our work in 2025!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99786762/520869419/2141984067?sourceid=1150239&utm_campaign=25emjge-1223aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg4MjVhMC1lN2M5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtQVbQOyI2P6939iYvNu1ZjeomthSd35w3mg7ZbOJPk=&emci=685c9041-56c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=d58825a0-e7c9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=954237) | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99786763/520869420/2141984067?sourceid=1150239&utm_campaign=25emjge-1223aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTg4MjVhMC1lN2M5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtQVbQOyI2P6939iYvNu1ZjeomthSd35w3mg7ZbOJPk=&emci=685c9041-56c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=d58825a0-e7c9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

Now, we can move forward with clear eyes, recommitted to restoring, defending, and expanding reproductive rights across the U.S. and around the world. We have a lot of work to do. But we have an amazing team behind us—all of you! Together, we are the vanguard of the movement for reproductive rights. Thank you for being with us! Onward! Nancy Northup President & CEO P.S. | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

Join Us for the Patriot Stars
Inaugural Gala Reception
***
An Unforgettable Evening
Honoring Patriots

Dear Friend,

As we welcome a new chapter in American history, we invite you to join us for the Moms for America Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala
Reception in celebration of this historic inauguration.

This elegant evening will feature:
• Delicious food stations
• An open bar
• A variety of desserts
• Live music and entertainment

The night will culminate with our

Patriot Star Awards Program,

where we will honor exceptional individuals working toward a brighter future for our nation.

ENJOY SPECIAL PERFORMANCES BY:

• Jason Hewlett •
• Natasha Owens •
• Katey & Katie •

***

Hotel Washington, Grand Ballroom
In Washington D.C.

***
WHEN

Friday, January 17, 2025

***
TIME

7:00–10:00 PM
(Check-in begins at 6:30 PM)

***
ATTIRE

Cocktail

clean_body: Join Moms for America, Friday, January 17, 2025 for the Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala Reception in Washington, DC If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] Join Us for the Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala Reception * An Unforgettable Evening Honoring Patriots Dear Friend, As we welcome a new chapter in American history, we invite you to join us for the Moms for America Patriot Stars Inaugural Gala Reception in celebration of this historic inauguration. This elegant evening will feature: • Delicious food stations • An open bar • A variety of desserts • Live music and entertainment The night will culminate with our Patriot Star Awards Program, where we will honor exceptional individuals working toward a brighter future for our nation. ENJOY SPECIAL PERFORMANCES BY: • Jason Hewlett • • Natasha Owens • • Katey & Katie • EVENT DETAILS WHERE Hotel Washington, Grand Ballroom In Washington D.C. WHEN Friday, January 17, 2025 TIME 7:00–10:00 PM (Check-in begins at 6:30 PM) ATTIRE Cocktail TICKETS $500 General Seating $5,000 VIP Package Includes 5 VIP tickets, a photo opportunity, and access to a VIP reception with honored guests. * $10,000 Sponsorship Package Includes 10 VIP tickets, a VIP reception with honored guests with photos. Digital logo on screen and Recognition in Program. Purchase your tax-deductible tickets today to secure your spot for this memorable event! GET TICKETS TODAY! [] For additional questions, please contact Kyra@momsforamerica.net [Kyra@momsforamerica.net] We can’t wait to celebrate with you at this inauguration gala reception, as we honor the patriotism and spirit that make America great! [] In Truth & Freedom, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® P.S. Seats are limited – don’t miss your chance to be part of this special evening! GET TICKETS TODAY! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Join Team Baker: Building a Brighter Future Together
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://rushernbaker.com/announcement/ [https://rushernbaker.com/announcement/]
Friends and Neighbors,
I hope this message finds you in good spirits and thriving. Today, I am excited to share a unique opportunity to support an exceptional leader dedicated to fostering positive change in our community— Rushern Baker .
As many of you may know, Rushern has been a relentless advocate for progressive transformation in Prince George’s County. During his tenure as County Executive from 2010 to 2018, he implemented several groundbreaking initiatives aimed at enhancing our quality of life. Here are just a few:
* 311: A user-friendly hotline was created for county services, streamlining access to essential information, particularly for seniors.
* Branding Campaign: “Experience, Expand, Explore!” was launched to reshape the perception of our County and attract businesses.
* Broadband Initiatives: Dark fiber and broadband infrastructure were expanded along Route 1 in College Park, spurring economic growth.
* County Staff Dashboard: This tool ensured that agency heads were held accountable to the administration’s goals for service improvements.
* DPIE: Rushern streamlined the permitting process, bringing all services under one roof, resulting in efficient and faster project approvals.
* EDI: He established a $50 million revolving economic development incentive fund, which aimed to attract, retain, and grow local businesses.
* Enterprise Zone: Tax incentives were put in place to spur business growth in designated areas.
* Ethics Legislation: He enacted laws preventing developers with active projects from donating to council members during elections, restoring public trust and ending the culture of “Pay to Play.”
* Foreign Trade Zone: Rushern reduced tariffs on imported goods stored in designated areas, saving companies millions until products were exported.
* Metro Development: He focused on revitalizing underdeveloped metro stations in New Carrolton, Morgan Station, Branch Avenue, and Suitland.
* Prince George’s County Incubator: In partnership with the state and Maryland University, Rushern initiated a business incubator program, providing support for local and international startups, leading to numerous success stories.
* Public Safety Investments: Budget increases for Fire and Police added more personnel on the ground, improving community safety.
* TNI: Targeted funding and services were allocated to specific areas for revitalization—reducing crime through increased police patrols, enforcing codes to clean up neighborhoods, and providing grants to enhance storefronts.
* Workforce Development Training: Through innovative programs, thousands were trained for emerging industries, preparing them for the workforce of the future.
Rushern has tirelessly advocated for progressive policies that uplift families, enhance our schools, and create sustainable economic opportunities for all. His vision for a more inclusive community is not merely aspirational; it’s a commitment reflected throughout his career.
However, to sustain this critical work, Rushern needs our help. We are launching a fundraising campaign to empower his initiatives and ensure resources reach every corner of our community.
Here’s how you can contribute:
* Make a Donation: Every dollar matters! Your contribution will directly fuel Rushern’s campaign and the important work ahead.
* Spread the Word: Share this email and the accompanying video with your friends, family, and colleagues who resonate with Rushern’s vision. The wider the reach, the stronger our movement becomes.
Together, we can build a brighter future for our community. Let’s rally behind Rushern Baker as he continues to advocate for the change we envision.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our shared goals! By donating, you will become an official member of Team Baker, joining a growing community committed to making a difference for our future. With your help, we will win!
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
Warm regards,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
[https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463ce29079969a87cceda&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=k9YNeUUKMQWjIBCRjztQYqdudZw%3D] P.S. Let’s carry this momentum into the new year and hit our $100,000 goal! Your contribution of $25, $250, or $2,500 today will bring us closer to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]

clean_body: [] [] Friends and Neighbors, I hope this message finds you in good spirits and thriving. Today, I am excited to share a unique opportunity to support an exceptional leader dedicated to fostering positive change in our community— Rushern Baker . As many of you may know, Rushern has been a relentless advocate for progressive transformation in Prince George’s County. During his tenure as County Executive from 2010 to 2018, he implemented several groundbreaking initiatives aimed at enhancing our quality of life. Here are just a few: 311: A user-friendly hotline was created for county services, streamlining access to essential information, particularly for seniors. Branding Campaign: “Experience, Expand, Explore!” was launched to reshape the perception of our County and attract businesses. Broadband Initiatives: Dark fiber and broadband infrastructure were expanded along Route 1 in College Park, spurring economic growth. County Staff Dashboard: This tool ensured that agency heads were held accountable to the administration’s goals for service improvements. DPIE: Rushern streamlined the permitting process, bringing all services under one roof, resulting in efficient and faster project approvals. EDI: He established a $50 million revolving economic development incentive fund, which aimed to attract, retain, and grow local businesses. Enterprise Zone: Tax incentives were put in place to spur business growth in designated areas. Ethics Legislation: He enacted laws preventing developers with active projects from donating to council members during elections, restoring public trust and ending the culture of “Pay to Play.” Foreign Trade Zone: Rushern reduced tariffs on imported goods stored in designated areas, saving companies millions until products were exported. Metro Development: He focused on revitalizing underdeveloped metro stations in New Carrolton, Morgan Station, Branch Avenue, and Suitland. Prince George’s County Incubator: In partnership with the state and Maryland University, Rushern initiated a business incubator program, providing support for local and international startups, leading to numerous success stories. Public Safety Investments: Budget increases for Fire and Police added more personnel on the ground, improving community safety. TNI: Targeted funding and services were allocated to specific areas for revitalization—reducing crime through increased police patrols, enforcing codes to clean up neighborhoods, and providing grants to enhance storefronts. Workforce Development Training: Through innovative programs, thousands were trained for emerging industries, preparing them for the workforce of the future. Rushern has tirelessly advocated for progressive policies that uplift families, enhance our schools, and create sustainable economic opportunities for all. His vision for a more inclusive community is not merely aspirational; it’s a commitment reflected throughout his career. However, to sustain this critical work, Rushern needs our help. We are launching a fundraising campaign to empower his initiatives and ensure resources reach every corner of our community. Here’s how you can contribute: Make a Donation: Every dollar matters! Your contribution will directly fuel Rushern’s campaign and the important work ahead. Spread the Word: Share this email and the accompanying video with your friends, family, and colleagues who resonate with Rushern’s vision. The wider the reach, the stronger our movement becomes. Together, we can build a brighter future for our community. Let’s rally behind Rushern Baker as he continues to advocate for the change we envision. Thank you for your support and dedication to our shared goals! By donating, you will become an official member of Team Baker, joining a growing community committed to making a difference for our future. With your help, we will win! DONATE NOW [] Warm regards, Rushern L. Baker III Candidate for County Executive [] P.S. Let’s carry this momentum into the new year and hit our $100,000 goal! Your contribution of $25, $250, or $2,500 today will bring us closer to victory. [] [] [] By Authority: Friends of Rushern Baker III, Calvin Brown, Treasurer 9646 Marlboro Pike, Upper Marlboro, MD 20772 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Peter Willis — in a new
video, Bernie looked back on 2024 and spoke of the deepening divide
between the uber wealthy and the working class. Most importantly, Bernie
emphasized the importance of our fight ahead to change things.

Bernie said, “Either we fight aggressively all over this country to create
a government and an economy that works for all of us, or we will continue
to move rapidly down the path of Oligarchy and the rule of the super
rich.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20833?t=1061&akid=7466%2E5885482%2EHqqFdu ]As a movement, we must join Bernie in this uphill fight, because it
will take all of us to win a progressive future. Can you chip in today to
our Despair is Not an Option fund to make sure we have the resources to
fight back in 2025?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20833?t=1063&akid=7466%2E5885482%2EHqqFdu ]DONATE NOW

The Our Revolution team is doing everything we can to build a movement
strong enough to stop the rise of Oligarchs like Elon Musk and the
deepening divide in America between the ultra-wealthy (who are using their
millions and billions to buy yachts and mansions) and the working class
who are just trying to afford their monthly bills.

It’s the most important effort of our time. We can’t, and won’t, let Musk,
Trump, and the billionaire class win. As Bernie says, despair is not an
option. We know that to be true, and we know if we’re going to put up a
real fight we need the energy and resources from our grassroots movement
today.

donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

“We must stand together for democracy and justice. Let’s do it,” Bernie

It’s our movement vs. the Oligarchs. Can we count on you to help us fight

Bernie said, “Either we fight aggressively all over this country to create a government and an economy that works for all of us, or we will continue to move rapidly down the path of Oligarchy and the rule of the super rich.” [ ]As a movement, we must join Bernie in this uphill fight, because it will take all of us to win a progressive future. Can you chip in today to our Despair is Not an Option fund to make sure we have the resources to fight back in 2025? [ ][IMG] [ ]DONATE NOW The Our Revolution team is doing everything we can to build a movement strong enough to stop the rise of Oligarchs like Elon Musk and the deepening divide in America between the ultra-wealthy (who are using their millions and billions to buy yachts and mansions) and the working class who are just trying to afford their monthly bills. It’s the most important effort of our time. We can’t, and won’t, let Musk, Trump, and the billionaire class win. As Bernie says, despair is not an option. We know that to be true, and we know if we’re going to put up a real fight we need the energy and resources from our grassroots movement today. [ ]Can you chip in right now to our Despair is Not an Option Fund? We're organizing and mobilizing ahead of Trump taking office in just 3 weeks, and we need your support. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT While Musk tries to run the government with cuts to Social Security and Medicare — and entanglements between his private businesses and government agencies — we are working to preserve the government services people rely on. “We must stand together for democracy and justice. Let’s do it,” Bernie said. It’s our movement vs. the Oligarchs. Can we count on you to help us fight back, Peter Willis? [ ]Chip in today to our Despair is Not an Option Fund and join Our Revolution and Bernie in this fight. [ ]DONATE NOW When we organize, we win! name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: 💥 Breaking through the frozen middle ❄️
body:
Innovators everywhere lament the frozen middle
---
| | | | | |
---
| | 💥******Breaking through the frozen middle** ❄️
---
Innovators everywhere lament the frozen middle. These insidious members of your team are part of the middle management of an organization that squashes dreams, purges opportunities for change, and kills good ideas. They love the status quo and are resistant to any forms of change. Importantly, there are proven ways to melt the ice and provide the lubricant for progress! ** _Aspirational Statements_** A leader needs to use language that shapes the fundamental perspective of their organization. He or she must speak in ways that help everyone understand the critical importance of what they do and how every activity is part of something that is greater than themselves. After all, it is an innate human desire to be linked to higher purposes that are big, and good, and important, and lasting. Aspirational statements, woven into the fabric of an organization, provide a pathway to members of the team to understand who they are and what they do. These words provide a sense of pride, a sense of purpose, and a sense of priority. Experts say that such language is generative – it generates a future that is different that the default path. (SEE: “The Three Laws of Performance” by Zaffron and Logan). It puts a spring in the step of the members of your team and a compelling vision in their minds about a future that they can help create. It can even start to break through to those who would prefer to rest in the chilly but alluring safety of the status quo. ** _A Looming Crisis_** People are motivated to change based on a crisis. It shakes them out of their dominant worldview or prevailing paradigm. (SEE: “The Structure of Scientific Revolutions” by Kuhn). And instead of stumbling into a crisis, powerful words of warning that telegraph a looming crisis might be enough to avoid it. As much as I love innovation, there is no reason to do something different if there isn’t an upside (or a downside to be avoided). Speaking in ways that warn about a future fraught with danger is a way to shake a team and their most frozen middle-tier members out of a mindset that is complacent and defiant. ** _Relentless Socialization_** Aspirational statements and warnings of a looming crisis can’t just be provided on occasion. Without endless repetition, they will never seep into the psyche of an organization. They need to be provided again and again and again and again! A leader can’t overcommunicate and only after weeks of repeated emphasis, dozens of times a day, will a culture start to absorb those concepts into its core. This process of relentless socialization is the only way to change a culture and unthaw its frostier elements. (SEE: Gapingvoid Culture Design Group -- [https://www.gapingvoid.com/)](https://eufi5.r.sp1-brevo.net/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/fnVAUPsQG0i9)
**_A Squeeze Play_** Even with the relentless socialization of motivational aspirational statements and warnings of a looming crisis, there are still going to be elements of the frozen middle. Squeezing them from the top and the bottom is a necessary part of their transformation. It is important here to remember that innovation and cultural change doesn’t arise from the top down. It bubbles from the bottom up with a surge of energy and enthusiasm, but only when spurred by a leader who is willing to protect it and prioritize it. When a leader understands this important truth, then it provides a bi-directional forcing function that leaves those in the middle stranded if they don’t jump on board. ** _Aligning Incentives_** While the leader doesn’t provide the surge of energy and enthusiasm that prompts change, they can do more than simply protecting it. They can align incentives around it – promotions, awards, leadership positions, key project placement, funding, and facetime. For those frozen middle members who are hanging on as unhelpful vanguards of the status quo, this is the final straw. The leader has made it easier to change than to remain the same. The path of least resistance is to go along with the movement. It is in everyone’s best interest to do so, otherwise they will be left behind and marginalized. This five-step process is the secret to unthawing the frozen middle. It isn’t easy, but it is a necessary way to break down the natural resistance to an innovative culture. The toasty benefit is an aspirational future that is well within reach. \- John
| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://eufi5.r.sp1-brevo.net/mk/un/sh/SMJz09a0vkbXqU0NAdDsZ4A0AXaC/g25CVhZo8QJl)
---
