name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Fox News Op-Ed: How Trump can double down on price transparency for patients
body:
Trump can usher in an affordable and accountable health care system| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2e957f9a170849a5bf4cf4b75c24a5e4&_e=a8i-DOQERM5239QSu4KJv5WL8f7jSl4QcqRhrmQyeTNkWxoBTrL3VLKiQYXIKQrSV22ju84iu96MraeD7ughpC8pR4tQiQ5IRILPh20oueQO_n4VB2f_OpY3fFV_U63kjJHBJr_mLKb9AWFLgynowq0i7Twiv2GrOyu9Llujc5EudksnWJOl-fef91ggO7emt9R82XeQOSLIwO33TsfEAw%3D%3D)
---
How Trump can double down on price transparency for patients _Trump can usher in an affordable and accountable health care system_ [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2e957f9a170849a5bf4cf4b75c24a5e4&_e=a8i-DOQERM5239QSu4KJvx4fMTT6pfBjBBdBEGbPmrjRnr1f_UykJidLSV9PLDzeXg6l4RjsOGfXO7tcOuzxLQMfh2VVx1BIl_tV7O3x8JC_32SjvCCcFy8esenUSpoHQHNZU1x0Xa4_oVNkGUa9La7dBVEtJeF1YHMSwPt9CTo8oZaMI5kn_fe2WP_4sYTj6P1xFeGoNcBPo8k-vh8zskE90i0IFl7q1BSwnpJMyvI%3D "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi")Bobby Jindal And Newt Gingrich
---
When he returns to office, President-elect Trump has the opportunity to fix the broken American health care system by doubling down on his first-term agenda of delivering price transparency for patients. Instead of protecting American patients, the Biden administration rescinded or failed to fully implement the very basic requirements that patients should know the cost of their treatment before they get it. By finally removing the veil between medical services and prices, Trump can empower patients to shop for the right care at the right price, avoid overcharges, and give employers and unions a better idea of the costs in advance so that they can optimally design health benefits. Recommitting to this reform should be at the top of Trump's first 100-day agenda. **[**Finish reading on FoxNews.com**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2e957f9a170849a5bf4cf4b75c24a5e4&_e=a8i-DOQERM5239QSu4KJv4MTuFb4zBNNrGTiQxKRXas6tTJhAb9tsHqe4bwx41g8oUAzsRLrRRkE4n5EYKQbL_J8wdkOg0gHaeqNB5CMAwlaRxDD0eS1jXX43QAAAE8KCFKn80f7RdL8lWq9F1KQRup1C1EB1Z5vsQxo5mo7NIZNIFGzZ8PmC8SM_mUAbXkOPcmyyarNheVrqvT4WqSOm16QzdJ3WqYzOSek9VAVeX0gXjg1v3RPxBdZO3p7bQvOnPu3D06_zJKJp8bCUV8kqMYpotUV8ON-P7Lr0Bn07Mk%3D)**

name: Voter Action Project NC
subject: An assault on voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
To quote a reporter from Slate who is tracking this closely:
" The background here is that North Carolina voters just elected another Democratic governor, retained a Democratic state Supreme Court justice, AND broke Republicans’ supermajority in the legislature. GOP legislators are trying to undo voters’ decisions by stripping power from Democratic officials. "
This bill - like so many others - was about who has the power: The voters or the vote suppressors? RUSH $25 or more today to fight in North Carolina and against bills like this in state legislature sessions around the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010325_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010325_1&amount=25]
News & Observer: As protesters shout, NC Senate Republicans override Cooper veto of powers-stripping bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010325_1&amount=25]
Opponents of voting rights are already assaulting our democracy, Team. Vote suppressors here in North Carolina stripped the incoming governor of power to codify their control before they lose their legislative supermajority, all because they didn't win all the elections they wanted.
Check out what this bill did:
* Transfers the power to appoint members of the State Board of Elections from incoming Gov-elect Josh Stein (D) to incoming State Auditor-elect Dave Boliek (R).

* Restricts the governor's ability to fill judicial vacancies, forcing them to choose from a list provided by the unelected officials of the departing judge's party.

* Removes the seats of two County Superior Court judges (in Wake and Forsyth counties) after those judges repeatedly ruled against suppressive election law changes.

* Prohibits the State Attorney General from participating in lawsuits that would invalidate action by the state Assembly, even in the defense of citizen's rights.

* Reduces the ballot "curing" time -- where ballots with simple mistakes can be corrected by the voter -- from nine days to three.
That's not all -- this bill attacks the roles of the state education superintendent and the lieutenant governor, makes the State Highway Patrol an independent agency that the legislature controls, and more -- but you get the idea. If opponents of voting rights can't win at the ballot box they'll codify their power however else they can .
Please, we have to fight this bill on the ground and in the courts, plus be ready for whatever suppressive bills come when new legislative sessions start next week. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010325_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010325_1&amount=25]

Peter,
I wanted to reach out this morning to say thank you.
We not only met our end-of-year public deadline goal—we surpassed it. Thanks to you, we'll be prepared to defend our rights, freedoms, and way of life in Minnesota when Donald Trump takes office on January 20.
Make no mistake: We have a difficult road ahead of us this year. But as long as you’re with us, I know we will keep Minnesota on the path to progress, no matter what comes our way.
Thank you again for your support. It means the world to me to know you’ve got my back.
Happy New Year,
Tim Walz

Thanks to you, we'll be prepared to defend our rights, freedoms, and way of life in Minnesota when Donald Trump takes office on January 20. Make no mistake: We have a difficult road ahead of us this year. But as long as you’re with us, I know we will keep Minnesota on the path to progress, no matter what comes our way. Thank you again for your support. It means the world to me to know you’ve got my back. Happy New Year, Tim Walz ********=******

Hi there, Today is my first official day as Delaware’s newest Senator. I can’t wait to start making my mission of bringing Bright Hope to the Senate a reality. I’m excited to work across the aisle to implement policies that will make life better for Delawareans – and all Americans. There are many things I’d like to work on during my term: expanding access to affordable health care services so people don’t have to choose between putting food on the table and lifesaving treatment; reducing our country’s carbon emissions to slow the progression of climate change; and making sure that basic necessities, like groceries and gas, are affordable and accessible. **But I want to know what’s important to you, team.**[**Will you please take my quick, two question survey so I know what issues you’d like to see me make a priority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99791333/520881606/-1067209317?source=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.01.03_NewYear_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWM3YTlhMy1lZGM5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3dpg1RN8vTTcNwroCieeDaLSqLmW8ozc462VmZkeDY=&emci=4ff83ab8-a5bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=f5c7a9a3-edc9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=11913588) | | [**Take the Surv****ey »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99791334/520881607/-1067209317?source=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.01.03_NewYear_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWM3YTlhMy1lZGM5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b3dpg1RN8vTTcNwroCieeDaLSqLmW8ozc462VmZkeDY=&emci=4ff83ab8-a5bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=f5c7a9a3-edc9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=11913588)

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Please let us explain why a donation to the Democratic Party is so important...
body:
We know that many of you are tired, disappointed, burnt out, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.
---
We know that many of you are tired, disappointed, and burnt out, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. But today is the day we need Democrats to step up and chip in if you're in a place to do so. Let us explain why: Today, a new Congress will be sworn in. Shortly after that, Trump will become president. We’re already seeing how disastrous it could be. We need — America needs — a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under his control. We get that you may be tired or feeling tapped out. But we cannot sit back and let Trump take us backward without a fight. So we have to ask one more time: [**We're asking you, humbly, to make a contribution to the Democratic Party today. It can be $5, $50, or whatever you can afford. It will all add up, and we will use your support to mobilize Democrats in the weeks ahead to stop the far-right Trump agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250103_2485_fr&refcode2=2485_22930333_Y0VmIj&akid=2485%2E22930333%2EY0VmIj) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250103_2485_fr&refcode2=2485_22930333_Y0VmIj&akid=2485%2E22930333%2EY0VmIj)**

name: DOGE Survey via House GOP
subject: GONE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need your help to shrink the size of the government! Complete the DOGE Survey today >>

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

name: Jason Miyares
subject: My opponents have ONE big advantage…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Something big is coming—and if we don’t act, it could cost us the election. | | | Friend, On January 8th, the Virginia Legislature goes in session. I’m excited to enter this focused period of work for our Commonwealth. **But it poses a serious challenge to our re-election campaign:**_**[We’ll be on a mandated fundraising blackout for the duration of the legislative session.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a7839bef34e24eeeb34395e5b9602a15&_e=AOF_UeHGIKu6KdqOXMAtZh-67nvui74sF-Dmt0OlCTVI0TdK65p-iUk1rlyTmvzo6c3qt1B53gc6cWB1ZFhOXoQWI_3BejbMm4NKLVOI83hsjDeA07Cy2IxpcgavdGF3XBKCPz2xxxQojCDHTsDzWRh2EYQ46w2xyLoyI47eRAugSJEd-ia5D-R1y_-yzbQ4ett2eCbva5lO_FW-CIaTMzKKuJvAsYaekHz87sfDTrgjjqT1kQKwGfgwYI1Pg7fzKsY6fbjl0IW345Qyjfox6emwLXkIN3WZHaXmFhM1zkrbB7sZZRnpA1s38gALqEiDrRa0hqdsHZ_s1kiDdlXmI2PQJx4D9I81SeUOYprxRwEhO4aGefWs_AItDlITs0U_)**_ _That doesn’t just mean that I can’t send fundraising solicitations — I couldn’t even_ _accept_ _donations if I wanted to!_ **But do you know who is**** _NOT_****required to engage in a fundraising blackout?** _**My opponents****.**_ That’s right — while I’m working with everything I’ve got for the people of Virginia, they can fundraise to defeat me day in, day out. _And you better believe that they will press this advantage for all they can._ **Friend, both of my opponents are far-left, anti-police, criminal-rights progressives. I refuse to allow them to overtake us in this race for Attorney General.** **That’s why I’m writing to ask for one more contribution before the blackout period.**_**[**Help me hit our Blackout Goal of $10,000 to get us through these next few months.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a7839bef34e24eeeb34395e5b9602a15&_e=AOF_UeHGIKu6KdqOXMAtZh-67nvui74sF-Dmt0OlCTVI0TdK65p-iUk1rlyTmvzo6c3qt1B53gc6cWB1ZFhOXoQWI_3BejbMm4NKLVOI83hsjDeA07Cy2IxpcgavdGF3XBKCPz2xxxQojCDHTsDzWRh2EYQ46w2xyLoyI47eRAugSJEd-ia5D-R1y_-yzbQ4ett2eCbva5lO_FW-CIaTMzKKuJvAsYaekHz87sfDTrizTotGVjPRIPB1pP9z9Y2d6Oh5p4-SZq6E_BGSbgt28PPhnci3hyXzoZhbk9HaWBFQ1PgSkkh2UlULF06FmNbuOJVOvIfgdBVPpnqOcV6AhCOt4nBj8hQIMCcepoZbyUPtNtUQ0GTWYnqqO2qeNiTx)**_ Thank you, Jason Miyares Attorney General

name: Pastor Paula White
subject: Commit to Pray in 2025
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7695d391fca64cfc8188fe55a06f7c3e&_e=003_tUBkj1ueGkuCPrxHpqLRtFA4KuRH-UTEFNpi79ugOzrQNhTB1ib6OWeR_G9yAPLj8wSH0dug5DYe3yTdn9GYJxUEGDyUsR9-227qaSCeSXyyRV8jYLEhoaS6J9ZpgL_mzEcyOb_vvaWjODD1ZHYofHes6gTajgExmz1K4iBu8QnmSf5nNnsjtXiB1i4yZg_NVaQwgXrKtvFLCHnt8YDOYR6pPHW2nkGtdfZ4QlW1u5QydsmKJvfFsR5RkLKGD0ZjZpS3BS01FW8N-pJVlTfjzhKQNpds59_ib7b7GbJbBuOSzca51BxvfEKWO49BwFNWHl8TLiYPX3uvnsdsajpZ-FQ6xwgrTWQWOUQxsmDhlcMLApj_fmjIKd-QZPnz2QjklemJYBkbbdThcBhh_E2n4BdODfQsaOUw7jG6-Pk%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
As the holiday season comes to a close, we are reminded of the power of prayer to bring peace, hope, and unity into our lives. This sacred time offers us an opportunity to reflect on God's blessings and intercede for our families, communities, and nation.
At the National Faith Advisory Board, we believe prayer is the foundation for transforming hearts and healing our land. Now more than ever, America needs believers to come together in faith and lift our voices in prayer.
[WHAT ARE YOU PRAYING FOR?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7695d391fca64cfc8188fe55a06f7c3e&_e=003_tUBkj1ueGkuCPrxHpqLRtFA4KuRH-UTEFNpi79ugOzrQNhTB1ib6OWeR_G9yAPLj8wSH0dug5DYe3yTdn9GYJxUEGDyUsR9-227qaSCeSXyyRV8jYLEhoaS6J9ZpgL_mzEcyOb_vvaWjODD1ZHYofHes6gTajgExmz1K4iBu8QnmSf5nNnsjtXiB1i4yZg_NVaQwgXrKtvFLCHnt8YDOYR6pPHW2nkGtdfZ4QlW1u5QydsmKJvfFsR5RkLKGD0ZjZpS3BS01FW8N-pJVlYaoxouPVfTkZ9w5gSEry_FARr2o9nALclilmGPBTAgvimstetqjq4x82iXKcvg1AncHl-MQPd2Bt7gJZoD-4SPBdHJ8rR7HTGehCj3bNNSsQ2SQTf7jjKe5RSBuEeHg5wnf6fvLV-IAbaWlFcQtAEU%3D)
We are calling on all people of faith to **commit to pray daily** for:
* **Our Nation:** For unity, wisdom, and guidance for our leaders.
* **Our Communities:** For peace, kindness, and love to prevail.
* **Our Families:** For joy, strength, and God's presence in their lives

[JOIN THIS SPIRITUAL COMMITMENT?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7695d391fca64cfc8188fe55a06f7c3e&_e=003_tUBkj1ueGkuCPrxHpqLRtFA4KuRH-UTEFNpi79ugOzrQNhTB1ib6OWeR_G9yAPLj8wSH0dug5DYe3yTdn9GYJxUEGDyUsR9-227qaSCeSXyyRV8jYLEhoaS6J9ZpgL_mzEcyOb_vvaWjODD1ZHYofHes6gTajgExmz1K4iBu8QnmSf5nNnsjtXiB1i4yZg_NVaQwgXrKtvFLCHnt8YDOYR6pPHW2nkGtdfZ4QlW1u5QydsmKJvfFsR5RkLKGD0ZjZpS3BS01FW8N-pJVlcg3i_OTKcRdMOr6VX2XkeWVEEz9duMeEZjgqRMYjQY-Sv8bykqTSglkPbn6gpjqwrqTnE5QhCA6AZrSebfI4vgAOpiR__p71Nd36RwbkxgMTr1lv5tQPU8jdY21aJmfUr549VEfZTfpy4CDzyttYgE%3D)
Your prayers matter. Together, we can make a profound difference as we seek God's will and trust in His promises during this new year.
Thank you for your faith and dedication. Let us stand united in prayer, trusting God to move in powerful ways as we celebrate the birth of our Savior. With gratitude and blessings, **

Pastor Paula White** The National Faith Advisory Board _
"If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face...then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin and will heal their land." - 2 Chronicles 7:14_

Copyright (C) National Faith Advisory Board, All rights reserved. 505 E. McCormick Rd
Apopka, FL 32703 [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativeum.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_s=7695d391fca64cfc8188fe55a06f7c3e&_t=Sk_dGIZNFdbG5Ny7ddUhzNxpL1r8ZcFNBF5k6bAu-cBb1TACmze7dX8p2X76WYpl9SB6FChSLSPtIYaDu_ZjeuPm9FGbg2EsU-8EpZMFEGjj1zfqW3P0srGjzdgO8Ted) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativeum.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_s=7695d391fca64cfc8188fe55a06f7c3e&_t=Sk_dGIZNFdbG5Ny7ddUhzNxpL1r8ZcFNBF5k6bAu-cBb1TACmze7dX8p2X76WYpl9SB6FChSLSPtIYaDu_ZjeuPm9FGbg2EsU-8EpZMFEGjj1zfqW3P0srGjzdgO8Ted)

name: Katie Porter
subject: 10 Truth to Power endorsed candidates will be sworn in to Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39376%2E3422442%2E4Eg56t)
Hi, Derek! Katie Porter here.
The 119th Congress officially begins today. Once a Speaker of the House is chosen, 10 of Truth to Power’s endorsed candidates will be sworn in to Congress.
These new Members include folks like Sarah McBride, the first openly transgender woman to serve in Congress, and Derek Tran, who flipped a Republican-held seat blue in what was a tough year for Democrats.
Truth to Power supported these folks’ campaigns and that was only possible because of our dedicated grassroots donors from across the country.
**[If you want to make a difference in some of the most competitive races in the country, will you become one of our first grassroots donors of 2025?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250103?refcode=em20250103-39376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39376_3422442_4Eg56t&akid=39376%2E3422442%2E4Eg56t)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250103?refcode=em20250103-39376&refcode2=39376_3422442_4Eg56t&akid=39376%2E3422442%2E4Eg56t)
Thank you for everything you do to support our people-powered candidates.
More soon,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250103-39376&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39376_3422442_4Eg56t&akid=39376%2E3422442%2E4Eg56t)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39376%2E3422442%2E4Eg56t).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Targeting my husband and President Trump
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMFugzAQRL_GvgXZaxuTgw9pEU0PkaJIqdSjsZfg1hAChIh-fZU05Tp6u_M0tuliqGZD9AsBqIMfCAARGwJwHcWHPR53_bzC3bS6CcB7TOD1SU6wsK2zPzx1h8blw2US7zf-9TnxhR7nDhf2WZlgY0O8pzqn3kiwvHIUDddCrUEontHaZCBAgQQsJXpWWQSFKCqmRcak9ikNBhgoxpngqdJMJWpdYilk5VjpXIpAJHsUJVWPONah_cbe2xDnxJ0bGk09jt3wECsIFGdfJu3VRbwOf1fu3BAonsoEiolA4S_7fd6qw2FLRPGYTOS6fdtuTllDe-O7W4gxDKkmkp3-v9DJwG8AAAD___xWbbg)

Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7ED2GJuwYBHqkFZNNmlvqtsNcuxx4hYI5S9Knr4CoWxm8emTzswZXbeVd8-MJDkBuHnbEwDCtwRgHPhZf3wcu2eIxyl8cMAZE_iymhO83cboF5PmVBvV_5v4twf78zmxtz08W3y7a2SEtfbVTBMV2CwGzZwJMGMJFylwwTbBLRMXtJQBSx0DmRihRSphw2MtJUMrWOAzoCAoo5xJkVARifSCFx47Qy_GSAQS0yUoch3icPPNX-ys9tUzMvc6qLLbMLT9slhBoOjRjB1GukF7H2aDQFFhZR2BwnGgANqEzEoaxqiTMGVOhyzVHKk0lAtLeDEOdTlgVxOu3GAZATmT_j52BglXudqHp915xTVaP87q7rgSo-tW-2tDuFovgzJX-_KwO6iizH8dytPuXP74uT2F8yAgy6bylnB1vOJ399L55-8FLr_kKmn2X7fXTR10mW0fvqp8LxMS0-tSytzBlMH_AAAA__-iaptD)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc2umzwQhq_G7IjsGQxhwSL5HPJVCl3k9OSoK-TY48QtEMpflF59BULZzOLRI70z7-i6rbx7ZSzZM4C7tz0DYLhjAOOAF_35WXSvkIopfCLQjBn8t5oTvN3G6L8iNufaqP7PhN-e4tfPSbzt4dXS210jN1RrX800UYHNItDCmYAykaBMAaXYBveMG4wicKmT4oo64VsOiCQIrXRWWh34DDhILjiKWCZcbmR6pStGzvCrMTEBi_gStHEd0XD3zW_qrPbVa2MedVBl92Fo-2WxnEHekxk72uiG7GOYDQZ5RZV1DHKHwAG0CYWNeRiRTsJUOB2KVCPx2HCUlmE-DnU5UFczVG6wgkE8k_4xdoYYqr06hufDZcU1WT_O6qFYidF1q_2tYajWy6Dcq2N5OpxUXu6_TuX5cCk_fuzO4TwYxGVTectQfbnvvaPjR1EscPklqqQ5_r-7beugy2z79FXl-zhhEb8tpcwdTBn8CwAA__9F2Zur)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcGO2jAQhp_GuQXZM3ESDjlATWglkCrape0pMvYY3E1Cmhgo-_SrRBGXOXz6pH_mH910tXfPgmVrBnDxdmAADFcM4BbwqN_e9v0zpv09fiDQiBl8mc07vNzW6A-RmkNj1PDvjt8e4u-fu3jZ4dnRy50jF9RoX480U5EtEtDCmYgKkaFcAkqRR5fiRBLTXGa5Qy5QgjiJzNo8d0brBLSOfAEcJBccRSozLhdyeaITJs7wkzEpAUv4FLRwPVG4-Padeqt9_VyYaxPVxSWEbpgWKxmUA5lbTwvdkr2G0WBQ1lRbx6B0CBxAm1jYlMcJ6SxeCqdjsdRIPDUcpWVY3kJTBeobhsoFKxikIxmut94QQ7VW2_iwOc64Ietvo7rZz8ToptP-3DJU82VQrdW22m12qqzWv3bVYXOsfvxcHeJxMEirtvaWoQr4-3_3-HDf3yc4_RJV1m6_rs55E_WF7R6-rv2QZizh56mUsYN7AZ8BAAD__2l9nC8)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOozoQhp_G7IjsKi5hwSKJQ_pIyeJkujOaFTJ2ObgHCMMtyjz9CISyqcWnT_qr_lJ1Wzn7Slm8ZwClMz0DYLhjAOOAN_X1delePl0m_4lAM2ZwWM0J3m6j1V8R6WutZf9nwv-e4vvXJN728Grp7a6RG6qVq2YaS8-kAShhtUepiDFMAEOx9cpUGQVC2ViIeJugVQUUiSXLMQwDirbacylwCLngKKIw5uEmTAoqMLCaF1pHBCzgS9DGdkRD6Zrf1BnlqtdGP2qvSsthaPtlsYxB1pMeO9qohsxjmA0GWUWVsQwyi8ABlPaFibgfkIr9RFjli0Qh8UhzDA3DbBzqfKCuZijtYASDaCb9Y-w0MZR7efKvx9uKazJunNXjZSVa1a1y94ahXC-DfC9P-fl4llm-_3nOr8db_uNzd_XnwSDKm8oZhvLw-V3u_j-MH6cFLr9EGTenj919W3tdatqnqyrXRzEL-H0pZe5gSuFfAAAA___Xapvf)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU2PmzAQhn-NuYHsMZhw4BDqkFZKLmk3q56QsceJWyAsXxH59SsQymUOjx7pnXlH1W3l7JySOCMAd2d6AkD4ngCMA7-qj49zN_t4nvwnB1wwgR-bOcHbbbR6MaEvtZb918R_Pdm_vxN728Pc4tvdIgOslasWGkvPpCEoZrWHKYt5lACP2M67pzEqhiDAUoFclZYyzUuwGhKqd9ag51KgEFFGORNRTKMgSkoseWg1LbUWCCSka1BgO8Th7pr_2BnlqjnQj9qr0vswtP26WE4g71GPHQaqQfMYFoNAXmFlLIHccqAASvvMCOqHqGI_YVb5LFEcqdCUR4bwfBzqYsCuJlzawTACYiH9Y-w0Ei4zefQvh-uGazRuXNTDeSNa1a1yt4ZwuV0GRSaPxelwknmRfZ6Ky-Fa_P6zv_jLICCKpnKGcBln9rN8JXL-WuH6Sy7j5vhzf9vVXpea9umqyvUiJiG9raUsHUwpfAcAAP__R9ecZw)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7IjssTGwYJHUIbdSskl7U7Ub5Njj4BYI5S-iT1-BUDaz-PRJZ-aMrtvKuzkj8YEAlN72BIDwPQEYB37Tn5-Xbg7xMoUvDrhgAl82c4K32xj9j0lzrY3q_07864v9_jmxtz3MLb7dLXKHtfbVQmMV2EyAZs4EmLGYRynwiCVBmSWJiGViqAUhIpfKu9ROCyZE6oxM0ijwGVCIKKOcySim0S5K73jnwhl6N0YiEEHXoJ3rEIfSN3-ws9pX884866DKymFo-3WxnEDeoxk73OkG7XNYDAJ5hZV1BHLHgQJoEzIraShQx2HKnA5ZqjlSaSiPLOH5ONTFgF1NuHKDZQTkQvrn2BkkXB3UKbwebxuu0fpxUY-XjRhdt9o_GsLVdhkUB3UqzsezyovDj3NxPd6Kb9_313AZBGTRVN4SruL5-FH-2h9Kt8L1l1zFzelj_0jqoMts-_JV5XsZE0EfaylLB1MG_wMAAP__uXubGg)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7IjsGTBhwSKpQ1o1bNKbXHWFHHtI3AKh_EX06a9AKJtZfPqkM3NGV03piilh0Z4BPJztGADDHQMYerzqyyVrJ5-y0X8h0IwZfFvNEd5ubfR_Ic25Mqr7N-KPl_jzexRvu58aertr5IYq7cqZRsqzSQBaFMajREQYxoCh2HqPREdbHmBQhCayhqMAKcHGHMJAUhzIrecS4BBywVHIMOLhJoxvdMOgMPxmjCRgAV-CNkVL1D9c_Zdaq105bcyz8srk0fdNtyyWMkg7MkNLG12TffazwSAtqbQFg7RA4ADa-MJK7gekIz8WhfZFrJG4NBxDyzAd-irvqa0YqqK3goGcSfccWkMM1V4d_fPhuuKKrBtm9ZCtxOiq0e5eM1TrZZDv1TE_HU4qzfefp_x8uOa_PnZnfx4MZF6XzjJU20t2rz-y6fPnApdfoorq4_fdfVt5bWKblytL18mIBfy-lDJ3MCbwFQAA__8m65q_)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
––––––––

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. subject: Elevate Your Collection with the Exclusive Trump Knife Set
body:
Limited Edition Trump Knives – Claim Yours Before They're Gone!...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19593/6374453/d80172d3985d03776963b230fb9761b71e90ff75/29fdb22aaf9882e740a77c69ef486eaac583bf22)

_January 3rd, 2025_
---

---
Dear Reader, Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history. The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19593/6374453/d80172d3985d03776963b230fb9761b71e90ff75/29fdb22aaf9882e740a77c69ef486eaac583bf22)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship. Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19593/6374453/d80172d3985d03776963b230fb9761b71e90ff75/29fdb22aaf9882e740a77c69ef486eaac583bf22)
---
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19593/6374453/d80172d3985d03776963b230fb9761b71e90ff75/29fdb22aaf9882e740a77c69ef486eaac583bf22). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Why I push back on the haters, and the TRUTH about their lies
body:
| | | | |
---
| Peter, I hope you had a great holiday season spent with family, friends, and loved ones. This past year was incredibly hectic and at times exhausting, for all of us. But America enters 2025 with a lot of promise. President Trump will be returning to the White House with a Republican majority in Congress to help him undo the damage done to our country by Joe Biden. It’s going to be a busy year, but I am confident that we will make serious headway on the important issues facing American families - tackling the Mexican drug cartels, securing our southern border, getting our economy back on track, and restoring peace through American strength around the world.
I’m looking forward to this year, as it is the first time since I was elected to Congress that Republicans have control of the White House, Senate, and House.
But I thought it was worth starting this year by addressing my recent back and forth on social media with people who spread lies about me. So here it goes.
First, an explanation for why I even bother to do this: Primarily, it’s because you deserve to hear from me about serious allegations. You deserve the truth, straight from me.
You know by now that I do not shy away from these public fights. It is in my nature to push back forcefully when I am being lied about in such a public way, no matter who is spreading the lie.
Do I want to be spending my time doing this? Of course not. I would rather be spending my time on the issues that matter to me and to the country - coming up with a national strategy to combat the Mexican drug cartels, helping our veterans access the treatment they need to stop the unacceptable rate of veteran suicide, and making sure our country is secure from our foreign enemies. I would rather spend Christmas break relaxing with my daughter than worrying why thousands of people believe lies told by anonymous accounts on X. Nevertheless, people who profit off of social media engagement have discovered using my name in a lie gets them a lot of engagement and a lot of money. So they do it constantly. It is a feedback loop fed by money and outrage, which is the nature of politics these days, unfortunately.
But every time one of these lies gains traction on social media, I hear from people like you who reach out to me directly asking whether a specific allegation is true. When I respond by saying of course it isn’t true, you usually ask me why I’m not pushing back. So, that’s exactly what I do. Your support is invaluable to me, and I feel that my supporters are being slandered whenever I am being slandered online with no response.
Each of these allegations - insider trading, spearheading efforts to get a congressional pay raise, me making millions off of my public service - all of it is entirely false. Here’s the truth.
No, I have never engaged in “insider trading”
Yes, I have made investments in the stock market since I’ve been in Congress. It is not something I started when I was elected; it’s something that I’ve done since I was a private citizen - just like anyone allowed to save money and invest it for their future - and it is much less glamorous than you think. I have not made millions from the stock market. In fact, I’ve profited around $25,000 TOTAL since 2018.
Some misleading stories or graphics on social media report a percentage gain, not the monetary value, of my trading volume to make it seem like I am investing millions and getting millions in return. Other misleading stories take the public reporting Members of Congress are required to submit on stock trades and make dishonest interpretations of the report. They do this by inferring the highest possible dollar amount from those reports. Here is what you probably didn’t know: Each report doesn’t have exact values of the stock trade, but rather ranges of investment amounts. We have to click a box in the online reporting. The first range is $1,000 - $15,000 per stock trade. Of course, the stories (and more importantly the headlines) infer the highest possible total from that range. In reality, every time I have made an investment in the stock market it is near the bottom of the range. Right now, my only brokerage account has about $23,000 invested in the stock market TOTAL. It has been around this amount during my entire time in Congress. Shocking, I know, considering how extreme the accusations against me have been. But as you can see, I am not exactly the Wolf of Washington. Quite the opposite.
Now, to the allegation of “insider trading.” That is a serious allegation. In fact, it's a crime. Let me be clear: I have never once used non-public information from my committee work, legislative work, or congressional investigations to make gains in the stock market. Period.
And let’s apply some common sense logic: my records are public, which means everyone knows when I buy and sell stocks. This means everyone accusing me of insider trading knows I have only bought stocks ONCE in the last 3 YEARS. It’s hard to “insider trade” if you aren't doing any trading. I buy and hold investments, many of which are not even individual stocks, but ETF’s. That simple fact makes the claims against me all the more malicious.
I have said publicly, multiple times, that I would vote to ban Members of Congress from trading in stocks. I would be happy to rid ourselves of these BS claims about insider trading. I hope the bill to ban stock trading is one of the first we take up in the new Congress so I can be one of the first to vote for it.
No, I did not “spearhead the effort behind the scenes” to raise pay for Members of Congress
Before Christmas, there was a heated and public debate surrounding a government funding bill that included a pay raise for Members of Congress. The pay raise wasn’t nearly as much as some online claimed (the raise was actually 3.8%... $6,600 total... not a 40% pay increase as was claimed), but it was a raise nonetheless.
I was accused of “spearheading the effort behind the scenes” to have this pay raise included in the government funding bill. That, of course, was a lie. I never talked to anyone in Republican leadership about the government funding bill itself, much less the pay raise for Members of Congress, and I was listed as a NO on voting for the bill before it was tanked. If I wanted a raise, I would have fought for the funding bill to pass. But I was a no on that bill.
That lie grew legs from a podcast interview I gave before Thanksgiving, almost a month before the government funding fight. In the podcast, I pointed out that Members of Congress had not gotten a raise in 15 years and it is one of the reasons why much of Congress is populated by uber wealthy individuals. I did not say I would fight for a pay raise. I did not even say that I wanted one. I simply stated a fact - Congress is made up of a lot of rich people, in part, because Members of Congress have not even seen a cost of living increase in their salaries since 2009.
No, I am not a millionaire nor did I become one since taking office.
This is the easiest one to debunk. All of my finances are publicly reported. I honestly don’t know where some of the crazy numbers I see online even come from, which makes it hard to explain. We report ranges when reporting assets, so it’s possible that people wrongly assume the highest end of the range, I don’t know. In the end, some people get a kick out of spreading lies, what can I say.
Many Members of Congress can say they are millionaires (and they should not be shamed for that by the way... most of them worked for it, earned it honorably, and that’s the beauty of America!). I am not one of those members. I went straight from military service into Congressional service - not exactly a pathway to earn wealth. I wrote a book that was a best-seller, and it still didn’t make me a millionaire! I live in Atascocita, Texas, which is a middle-class community, not a gated one. I have not “profited” off my service in Congress. I am 40 years old, and my wealth is easily comparable to any 40 year old who has had consistent employment and good financial sense. I saved money while I was deployed to Iraq and invested in real estate as a young officer in the military. I wrote a best-selling book. Does any of this sound like I’ve profited unfairly? Of course not.
That’s the truth.
Of course, those aren’t the first ridiculous claims made against me and my character since I’ve taken office. And I know they won’t be the last.
I’ve debunked lies in the past that I was “part of the WEF,” and lies that I “voted for red flag laws.” There was even a viral tweet these last few weeks that listed the “kickbacks” paid to Members of Congress from Ukraine aid. All of it was completely fabricated. False. Lies. Not even a hint of truth.
Why do the haters do this? I’ve got plenty of theories. But it really comes down to this: the twitter trolls know they can’t control me, and they know I will call them out. Truth telling is a threat to people who make a living off social media engagement, often gained by exaggerating, twisting, or entirely destroying the truth.
In the end, that’s what this is all about. TRUTH. And I guarantee you that I will push back, at times aggressively, on smears against me. I simply won’t ignore lies about me, even when it would be politically convenient or beneficial for me to do so.
I tell you the truth and take the time to do it because I believe you deserve it. You are owed that as one of my supporters.
Politics is a tough business and it always will be. But I am a fighter and always will be. I fight back when lies are told about me. I fight back when you’re being lied to. And I fight back when politicians and those grifting off of politics deliberately try to hurt our country.
I am grateful for your dedicated support. Thank you for being in my corner and for reading these messages.
Here’s to a safe and prosperous New Year for you and all Americans.
In Service,
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
|
---

---

---

Team Crenshaw 5900 Memorial Drive Suite 215 Houston, Texas 77007
---

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: A new Congress is being sworn in today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, a new
Congress is being sworn in today, including one Democratic member worth
over $250 million — over 4000x the average salary of a worker in the
United States.

This comes after Democratic leadership ushered in a Republican trifecta
and another Trump presidency when they refused to stand up to the
corporations and billionaires that line their own pockets.

Instead of uniting us against the handful of billionaires and Super PACs
that stand in the way of our country’s most urgent priorities — like
universal healthcare, climate action, higher wages and lower costs, and an
end to forever wars — the Party has cozied up with them while letting
Republicans divide our communities against each other.

In any other sector of our economy, a failure this large would demand the
firing of those in charge. It’s time to clean up shop and purge the
Democratic Party of the same establishment donors, pundits, and
politicians that brought us this mess and usher in a new era led by and
for the working class.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250103?refcode=em20250103-36287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36287_1203867_SPRNMQ&akid=36287%2E1203867%2ESPRNMQ ]Will you help us elect a new generation of working-class leaders to
Congress by fueling our 2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund with a grassroots
donation now?

The Democratic Party has betrayed working-class people cycle after cycle
to serve the interests of the same billionaires and corporations keeping
working-class people poor. There are hundreds of members of Congress
getting sworn in today who will serve the interests of their corporate
donors rather than the needs of their constituents.

In fact, more than half of all Democrats in Congress...

* are endorsed and funded by AIPAC;
* take money from Corporate PACs;
* should lose their seats for serving lobbyists and Super PACs over
their constituents and everyday people.

Let’s make this congressional term their last for some of them and elect
people who will only fight for the needs of the working class, not the
wealthy few.

Justice Democrats is rapidly working to recruit and support progressive
candidates who reject corporate money and influence to send a clear
message to working-class people that Democrats are not for sale and will
always stand up to the wealthy elites raising our grocery, gas, and
healthcare prices.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250103?refcode=em20250103-36287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36287_1203867_SPRNMQ&akid=36287%2E1203867%2ESPRNMQ ]We can’t do it without you,
Peter. If you can, please rush
$5 to help us give working-class people the working-class
representation we deserve.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250103?refcode=em20250103-36287&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36287_1203867_SPRNMQ&akid=36287%2E1203867%2ESPRNMQ ]Contribute $5

As long as there are more millionaires in Congress than working-class
people, both parties will continue lining the pockets of the wealthy with
money from the wallets of people like us.

Let’s remind the Democratic Party that the power of the people will always
be stronger than the people in power.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250103-36287-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36287_1203867_SPRNMQ&akid=36287%2E1203867%2ESPRNMQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36287%2E1203867%2ESPRNMQ

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, a new Congress is being sworn in today, including one Democratic member worth over $250 million — over 4000x the average salary of a worker in the United States. This comes after Democratic leadership ushered in a Republican trifecta and another Trump presidency when they refused to stand up to the corporations and billionaires that line their own pockets. Instead of uniting us against the handful of billionaires and Super PACs that stand in the way of our country’s most urgent priorities — like universal healthcare, climate action, higher wages and lower costs, and an end to forever wars — the Party has cozied up with them while letting Republicans divide our communities against each other. In any other sector of our economy, a failure this large would demand the firing of those in charge. It’s time to clean up shop and purge the Democratic Party of the same establishment donors, pundits, and politicians that brought us this mess and usher in a new era led by and for the working class. [ ]Will you help us elect a new generation of working-class leaders to Congress by fueling our 2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund with a grassroots donation now? The Democratic Party has betrayed working-class people cycle after cycle to serve the interests of the same billionaires and corporations keeping working-class people poor. There are hundreds of members of Congress getting sworn in today who will serve the interests of their corporate donors rather than the needs of their constituents. In fact, more than half of all Democrats in Congress... are endorsed and funded by AIPAC; take money from Corporate PACs; * should lose their seats for serving lobbyists and Super PACs over their constituents and everyday people. Let’s make this congressional term their last for some of them and elect people who will only fight for the needs of the working class, not the wealthy few. Justice Democrats is rapidly working to recruit and support progressive candidates who reject corporate money and influence to send a clear message to working-class people that Democrats are not for sale and will always stand up to the wealthy elites raising our grocery, gas, and healthcare prices. [ ]We can’t do it without you, Peter. If you can, please rush $5 to help us give working-class people the working-class representation we deserve. [ ]Contribute $5 As long as there are more millionaires in Congress than working-class people, both parties will continue lining the pockets of the wealthy with money from the wallets of people like us. Let’s remind the Democratic Party that the power of the people will always be stronger than the people in power. In solidarity, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: Let's Get Ready For 2025!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
Your voice matters, and we’re here to ensure you have the information and resources needed to shape Pennsylvania’s future.
Thank you for doing your part to stay informed and engaged!
NPPEF on the Ground
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg]
We are back at work!!! Did you know PA has another upcoming election on May 20, 2025?
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg] Judges are on the ballot, including three PA Supreme Court ones!!!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg] That's why we're back on the ground just two weeks after Election Day.
Do not miss the opportunity to elect who makes the final decisions in courts.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/?org=nppef]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B757A4769663336315672517864344A36556B5051776F754936633751355163356B41436A59722B52696153696D47736432525348706A2B6D7A514472396162/editor_images/-_%20DAYS%20LEFT%20TO%20REGISTER%20TO%20VOTE%20NPPEF%20%281%29.jpg]
Inspiring the next generation
NPPEF's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, participating at one of Senator Hughes’ See Me-Imagine YOU! Career Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202024-11-21%20214123.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202024-11-21%20213852.png] This experience is designed to empower 6th-8th grade students by exposing them to potential careers and jobs through professionals that look like them.
NPPEF in the News
Eight Temple affiliates listed among Philly’s most influential figures [https://temple-news.com/eight-temple-affiliates-listed-among-phillys-most-influential-figures/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/505A7834704C4B39726533563351566F766E4965417A712F6A684E30756E696159776F565850693535724C7848346132716B76554E4169625550396E2F683466/editor_images/unnamed%20%284%29.png]
In the lead-up to the 2024 election, hundreds of election-related lawsuits brought across the country present a complex litigation landscape well before all ballots are cast and counted.
In a top 10 list [https://www.justsecurity.org/103478/2024-election-litigation-top-10/] , Just Security identifies the most important of these hundreds of cases for their rule of law implications and to convey an overall sense of the election litigation landscape. At the top of their list, is our case regarding mail-in ballots.
While it’s disappointing that our motion for review was denied, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court still has not ruled on the merits of our argument that enforcing the handwritten date rule violates voters’ constitutional rights. We hope that, when the next case is before them on this issue, they’ll consider the important constitutional issue at stake.
Make no mistake: That day could and should come very soon. The next appeal raising this issue is already working its way up from the Philadelphia Court of Common Pleas.
READ FULL ARTICLE [https://temple-news.com/eight-temple-affiliates-listed-among-phillys-most-influential-figures/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/505A7834704C4B39726533563351566F766E4965417A712F6A684E30756E696159776F565850693535724C7848346132716B76554E4169625550396E2F683466/editor_images/AP22263596446736-e1700149066801-jpg-e1707319768500.webp]
image: Keystone Newsroom
[https://www.cbsnews.com/philadelphia/news/pennsylvania-court-mail-in-ballot-issues/] IN THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA [https://www.google.com/url?rct=j&sa=t&url=https://electionlawblog.org/wp-content/uploads/rnc-v-67-counties.pdf&ct=ga&cd=CAEYACoTMjIzMTY0Njg4MTg4MTgwNDI0MTIaMmRlYjgzYjE2NTIzNDAwZTpjb206ZW46VVM&usg=AOvVaw31UqzB7lO_NZVtbTKZsPPU] [https://www.cbsnews.com/philadelphia/news/pennsylvania-court-mail-in-ballot-issues/] State Supreme Court ducks mail-in ballot enforcement [https://www.chestnuthilllocal.com/stories/state-supreme-court-ducks-mail-in-ballot-enforcement,33945?]
The Election Law Blog also made a summary of top suits mentioning our organization. "The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has declined to step in and immediately decide issues related to mail-in ballots in the commonwealth with early voting already under way in the few weeks before the Nov. 5 election. The commonwealth’s highest court on Saturday night rejected a request by voting rights and left-leaning groups to stop counties from throwing out mail-in ballots that lack a handwritten date or have an incorrect date on the return envelope, citing earlier rulings pointing to the risk of confusing voters so close to the election."
READ FULL ARTICLE [https://electionlawblog.org/wp-content/uploads/rnc-v-67-counties.pdf] READ FULL ARTICLE [https://www.chestnuthilllocal.com/stories/state-supreme-court-ducks-mail-in-ballot-enforcement,33945?]
Social Media of the Week
https://www.instagram.com/p/DAjsLitSdta/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DAjsLitSdta/]
SHARE ON TWITTER [https://x.com/PAStateDept/status/1859719058171797611]
#CourtsMatter
Pennsylvania Undated and Wrongly Dated Mail-in Ballots Challenge (RNC) [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge-rnc/]
“The Republican petitioners claim that some counties — including Bucks County, Centre County and Philadelphia — chose to count undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November 2024 general election. They argue this violates the state Supreme Court’s orders in two related [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-philadelphia-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge/] lawsuits [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-undated-and-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge-new-pa-project-education-fund/] , which prohibited the counting of undated or wrongly dated mail-in ballots in the November election.”
Republicans Try to Block Counting of Undated Ballots in Pennsylvania [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/republicans-are-trying-to-block-counting-of-undated-ballots-in-pennsylvania/]
“On Thursday, the RNC and McCormick filed [https://www.democracydocket.com/cases/pennsylvania-centre-county-undated-or-wrongly-dated-mail-in-ballots-challenge/] a lawsuit in Centre County, challenging [https://www.democracydocket.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/2024-11-14-Petition.pdf] the Centre County Board of Elections’ decision to count three mail-in ballots submitted with undated or wrongly dated outer envelopes in the general election. The plaintiffs argue that this violates the Pennsylvania Supreme Court’s decision in a similar recent lawsuit, which prohibited undated or wrongly dated ballots from being counted in the general election.”
New York Judge Strikes Down State’s Voting Rights Act [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/new-york-judge-strikes-down-states-voting-rights-act/]
“On Thursday, a New York trial court judge struck down the state’s 2022 Voting Rights Act (NYVRA), which was created to make up for deficiencies in federal law following Congress’s 2021 failure to pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act... Citing the 2023 U.S. Supreme Court ruling that determined race-based affirmative action in college admissions was unconstitutional, Vazquez-Doles wrote that the NYVRA similarly “provides enhanced rights” to protected classes, in violation of the Constitution. ”
After Court Order, Ohio Attorney General Approves Pro-Voting Amendment Proposal [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/ohio-voters-sue-state-attorney-general-over-most-recent-rejection-of-pro-voting-amendment/]
“Ohio Attorney General David Yost (R) approved [https://www.ohioattorneygeneral.gov/Media/News-Releases/November-2024/Summary-of-Petition-to-Amend-Voting-Laws-Accepted] the petition summary of the Ohio Voters Bill of Rights, a proposed pro-voting constitutional amendment that would greatly expand ballot access in the Buckeye State.”
News You Can Use
[https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/] [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/11/17/us/pennsylvania-election-ballots-recount.html] In Pennsylvania, the Election Litigation Continues, With a Twist [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/]
In an election defined in part by a tsunami of litigation before polls even opened, few states saw as much legal haggling over which ballots should count as Pennsylvania... In at least four counties — Bucks, Philadelphia, Centre and Montgomery — local election officials are acting in open defiance of a ruling from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court that arrived weeks before the election. The court found that mail ballots that are missing the date on the outer envelope, or have the wrong date, cannot be counted for this election... The commissioners were advised that they were likely to be sued no matter how they ruled. “So we’re going to get sued either way, I’d rather be on the side of counting ballots than not counting them,” Mr. Harvie said.
5 Takeaways From This Year’s State Supreme Court Races [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/5-takeaways-from-this-years-state-supreme-court-races/]
“This year’s general election saw dozens of candidates win seats on state high courts, with Democrats and Republicans securing respective majorities in Michigan and Ohio. One new justice even made history. Although most of the supreme court races weren’t partisan, the two political parties vied for the opportunity to control the court’s ideological balance, which can impact how high courts rule.”
Two Black Women Make History in U.S. Senate, Here’s How They’ll Fight For Democracy [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/two-black-women-make-history-in-u-s-senate-heres-how-theyll-fight-for-democracy/]
“Though a woman of color will not be heading to the White House this year, history was still made with the election of Angela Alsobrooks (D) in Maryland and Rep. Lisa Blunt Rochester (D) in Delaware – marking the first time ever that two Black women will serve together in the U.S. Senate.”
An Overlooked — and Increasingly Important — Clue to How People Vote [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2024/11/09/social-media-traditional-news-elections-00188548]
“Latinos, young men, non-college-educated white people, suburban women. The exit polls and political analysis invariably focuses on the changing behavior of demographic groups. That ignores a big determinant of political behavior: where people get their news and information. It’s odd how little attention has been given to this, given that in the past decade we’ve had a revolution in how information flows.”
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/58424E4F2F44684678414D614879785778552B485333725833465A534B7974636C7649323270705A4565412B5A4E4F6D376B316E306633463464394C69626D4C/editor_images/Yom%20Kippur%20Instagram%20Post.jpg]
Next week the U.S. will celebrate Thanksgiving
Super voters vote twice a year, every year!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPPEF%20newsletter%20dates.gif]
05/05/2025 is the last day to register before the 05/20/2025 election.
Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025
Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025
Last day to register to vote: Monday, October 20, 2025
Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025
General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025
Important Links:
PA Department of State Website [vote.pa.gov]
Return Your Ballot [vote.pa.gov/Voting-in-PA/Pages/Return-Ballot]
Track Your Ballot [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/ballottracking]
Find Your Polling Place [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo]
Voter Hotlines:
Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTE
DOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA
Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTA
Asian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE
Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/8.16.24/NPPEF%20polaroid%20email%20tag.png]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4D702F6773506D674B4A437847415641695A426A316179624C2B3677737251617655506E376A782F346845434F6737676F4370636A6E7039516A6B506E423945/editor_images/3430447.png]
Help Us Expand the Vote
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate
Every dollar helps us host more events, reach more people, and ultimately, register more voters ahead of this incredibly high-stakes election!
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed.
In Solidarity,
The New PA Project Education Fund
Invest in Year-Round Civic Education [https://bit.ly/NPPEFDonate2024]
Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund (C3) are tax deductible.
Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
New PA Project Education Fund
PO Box 453
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/eTvv1eYlREi8TFpa7DUshg2?unsubscribedata=xPj2a6Nb6iz0vQKFyYrDhMglXHkCQeX%2F7NUFxlrNkI0LXxqEOI9v%2BfALNO4nNJ1Z8Woyg9qcyD9%2FkuTWpWlHAJ%2BWZYigZgcKRu7U95VU%2BJdHsdIbzw2J8hgwOppwBpyXxyWhOZ9bxAJCvCxpBciejMZMYizmSxQ66dK4HWGt2KCN2hpQiBuyw5SlBimtpW7O%2BMtH0eMDivHAQDxzCQuSA7ha9BMgEOQW3m4CXuZun48BohzP%2BCqWYzANpVcbaUGODjTgMGZIx%2B44cbOXTrl1z3qN3Zqd86JWNXUf5TpGHPNfPibWbxIIAyWXUZRb6VoQ%2BkUc8aFGCJc3eHt8If6KIdDp0s4UuG7xma4S9u%2BnNQgbxXv4B0ybrSDi7WBhyZzKdfP%2Fq8Fwekbi94AdWduBfxLP1N%2FsfLD6vI1OHc%2BGE7A%3D .

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: Have you heard about Roots Camp 2025?
body:
**
------------------------------------------------------------

** Join us in supporting Roots Camp 2025!
------------------------------------------------------------

Friends and Partners,

The challenges ahead require bold action and investment in our people. That’s why I invite you to send your team to RootsCamp 2025 — the premier gathering for progressive organizers and activists.

** What Is RootsCamp?
------------------------------------------------------------

RootsCamp is an “unconference” for elections, advocacy, and democracy professionals. Unlike traditional conferences, attendees create the agenda, ensuring every discussion is relevant and impactful. It’s where ideas spark, strategies form, and collaborations thrive.

** Why Now?
------------------------------------------------------------

The 2024 elections are over, but the work continues. RootsCamp provides a space to reflect, recharge, and prepare for the next fight. With key elections ahead, this is the time to sharpen skills, expand networks, and reignite passion.

** Event Details
------------------------------------------------------------
* Location: Maritime Conference Center, 692 Maritime Blvd, Linthicum Heights, MD 21090
* Dates: January 23-25, 2025
* Format: In-person with a hybrid option
* Register (https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/31200476/apcampaigns-com.jmailroute.net?p=eyJzIjoiTmV4bzV2bFk4QnhIVEp5MWlPU09FWF91bGFVIiwidiI6MSwicCI6IntcInVcIjozMTIwMDQ3NixcInZcIjoxLFwidXJsXCI6XCJodHRwczpcXFwvXFxcL2FwY2FtcGFpZ25zLWNvbS5qbWFpbHJvdXRlLm5ldFxcXC94XFxcL2Q_Yz00NDEwODQ1NSZsPTBhNTI4NjI2LTM4MmEtNDZhNS1hOWFhLTAyNWE2OTE3YmI4ZiZyPTU2YWFmZGY4LTE3OWMtNDczNC1hNjgxLWE1ZTZkY2FjNmU4N1wiLFwiaWRcIjpcIjExYzJkYmJmNmNhYzQ5MDNhZGQ3NmRmZmQ0OGU3MTBkXCIsXCJ1cmxfaWRzXCI6W1wiZDMyNGUwYzY4MTY1Y2EwMjQzZjE0N2M2Y2Y3NTc4ZWI5MTZlYTNmY1wiXX0ifQ)

Who Should Attend?
* Campaign Staff & Volunteers: Share lessons from 2024.
* Progressive Leaders & Advocates: Connect with peers.
* Nonprofit Organizers: Strengthen community efforts.
* Tech Innovators: Showcase empowering tools.
* Funders & Allies: Support progressive infrastructure.
* Students & Professionals: Build skills and networks.

** Why Send Your Team?
------------------------------------------------------------
* Skill-Building: Equip your team for success.
* Networking: Connect with top progressive minds.
* Inspiration: Return with fresh ideas and energy.

RootsCamp thrives because of its community. Beyond attending, you can:
* Sponsor Roots Camp (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/rootscamp-tickets-1109526105449?aff=gainpoweremail12-16&utm_source=GAIN+POWER&utm_campaign=2dc65a251a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_12_13_10_33_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1580c18b71-&mc_cid=2dc65a251a&mc_eid=UNIQID)
* Partner with organizers
* Volunteer or organize panels

If you have any questions, please contact Roberto Nava at roberto@solidaritystrategies.com.

In Solidarity,

Chuck Rocha
Partner Organizer, RootsCamp

clean_body: Join us in supporting Roots Camp 2025! Friends and Partners, The challenges ahead require bold action and investment in our people. That’s why I invite you to send your team to RootsCamp 2025 — the premier gathering for progressive organizers and activists. What Is RootsCamp? RootsCamp is an “unconference” for elections, advocacy, and democracy professionals. Unlike traditional conferences, attendees create the agenda, ensuring every discussion is relevant and impactful. It’s where ideas spark, strategies form, and collaborations thrive. Why Now? The 2024 elections are over, but the work continues. RootsCamp provides a space to reflect, recharge, and prepare for the next fight. With key elections ahead, this is the time to sharpen skills, expand networks, and reignite passion. Event Details Location: Maritime Conference Center, 692 Maritime Blvd, Linthicum Heights, MD 21090 Dates: January 23-25, 2025 Format: In-person with a hybrid option Register () Who Should Attend? Campaign Staff & Volunteers: Share lessons from 2024. Progressive Leaders & Advocates: Connect with peers. Nonprofit Organizers: Strengthen community efforts. Tech Innovators: Showcase empowering tools. Funders & Allies: Support progressive infrastructure. Students & Professionals: Build skills and networks. Why Send Your Team? Skill-Building: Equip your team for success. Networking: Connect with top progressive minds. Inspiration: Return with fresh ideas and energy. RootsCamp thrives because of its community. Beyond attending, you can: Sponsor Roots Camp () Partner with organizers Volunteer or organize panels If you have any questions, please contact Roberto Nava at roberto@solidaritystrategies.com. In Solidarity, Chuck Rocha Partner Organizer, RootsCamp ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2025 Solidarity Strategies, All rights reserved.

## Real-Life Mowgli Survives Among Lions
An 8-year-old Zimbabwean boy, Tinotenda Pudu, [survived five days alone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80L2O6yAUBOCnOe5iwQH8U1Dc3Mhd0m5pYTgkRNhEmMTyPv3K-wDbjfRJo9F8XcerCTEs95uZSfu7H4tPIzJUJ8ZPTIzOhLiPsnLaEyGJijRvhepRyY5XD82JlEWPE7dSomXYO_Td1AneoWskq4I-2hhngrfYKayNZUq0ojc9ysbTBJKRCyXl-pnCUh7k454-lGub5irqRymvFcQ_wAFw2LatniZ7GOCw0LYCDiaXYCMd0eZ5yXFn309KIIZ3mcc1vbMlEBcfw2tKJjvA5gCblkJLAXF5r5QBFQ7n8_8bbWuVtXttIcawNi1Idp9NiL97yl8ffTT-BAAA__-VpWsP) in a dangerous game park after straying 14 miles from his rural home, surrounded by approximately 40 lions and passing elephants. The boy demonstrated [remarkable survival skills](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LHOnDAQBOCngW6RvZgDCoo0SJFyf6SkiJQGLXgNmzP4ZAzo3j76T6nTTDUafZpf9-FO4mWbP2jlzs1uSC4MqLACpUGVgyXxr8HktnPMyGXOna7LqsXKNDpfurYd1aSwGcvGMaGtxsbxpC0S3WxtOZfuc01pVeoamwoLmlRV1mVLLZqb4zEziq2kEIs_Qba0sPOvcHIsprDmvltSeu5Z-SXDPsP-uq7iTVpJfDGF4nhk2G987Rn2FJNMnkEbNEbXOsP-B5MHL47hHq7ZC7DMS4JVIk2HD8fuX0BeTgb3GZZeO-xHjOHYLFswCr59_f7xE37LOtJ4Mcy0MjwpPiAttD3e7VNO8pDkCYmOeUnFklafx84-L_Fe9ludGTX_E695-t_PZ4d_AwAA__8mBIU_), sleeping on a rocky perch, gathering wild fruits, and digging small wells in dry riverbeds for water—a drought-survival technique common to the region. Local community members beat drums daily to guide him home until Park rangers finally spotted his footprints and rescued the exhausted child.
## Drone Saves Stranded Pup from Frozen Lake
Local resident Kishan Patel [used a drone to help rescue](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLHOpCAURp8GOybcC8pYUGxjN9tuaVAvygwKAZyJ-_Sb2Qf4q6_4kpOT8-cxPqwP_lh_252MW91YXRxRYMsFcCHHxfpwjapZjCNCkg0Z0LLtsVV3aDazCJDdpB2QuqNeJgUkZqUAWqVBStt486UJEBI03lu82Vm0Usve9qg6RxNTghZfY749oz_qRi5c8U35Nse9CWarNRUmfzEcGA52mgG-D8MhxVK_c6Z08VLP-cVdjn_p4MG-iCebi0_JHhc_6MOflAtdfItnLnzK8Vy3yre4Ey_WUb34RiHxJceDGA7Qauyh0wyHJpslfXwIvnSaKbHu1of_cvWnYG-D_wIAAP___JJvQg) a 20-month-old sheepadoodle named Brooklyn after she spent nearly 24 hours stranded on frozen Lake Parsippany in New Jersey. The dog, who had escaped from her dogsitter on Christmas Eve, repeatedly evaded rescue attempts until Patel used a drone equipped with chicken bait to help locate her. [Watch a report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1u6yAYQJ8Gb1jw8RcGhrt4y12qqqOFzYdNSyDCyFH69FX6AJ2PdI50Pq7z1aecyvbf39DFLc491hkYKMo4ZWIOPuXnLIfgIiKgGNBxI5QFJS982N1qxWJA2GXhGqSVELjV2ngdo7QG1ZDcy8Y4E9zARcHoV6aEEdZbkDriQiTDkHpt42dNpe8Y87Oe2Ma13obs9t7vBxH_CEwEJr-sBR_HuNUXJjC9vxGYzhSwEphCqwVpfRRsdMd8P-jhT6ShbjS2-o2FZv-FlHPDhRYGhubC_ZFyToc2RLLt5lP-7fa_XpwOfgIAAP__EoBhCw). After police officers determined the ice's safety, they managed to [spook Brooklyn off the lake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLHOpCAURp8GOybcC8pYUGxjN9tuaVAvygwKAZyJ-_Sb2Qf4q6_4kpOT8-cxPqwP_lh_252MW91YXRxRYMsFcCHHxfpwjapZjCNCkg0Z0LLtsVV3aDazCJDdpB2QuqNeJgUkZqUAWqVBStt486UJEBI03lu82Vm0Usve9qg6RxNTghZfY749oz_qRi5c8U35Nse9CWarNRUmfzEcGA52mgG-D8MhxVK_c6Z08VLP-cVdjn_p4MG-iCebi0_JHhc_6MOflAtdfItnLnzK8Vy3yre4Ey_WUb34RiHxJceDGA7Qauyh0wyHJpslfXwIvnSaKbHu1of_cvWnYG-D_wIAAP___JJvQg), and she was later found hiding on someone's front porch.
## Photographer Marries After Viral Prediction
In December 2023, wedding photographer Darian Kaia went viral after posting a humorous video on social media, [predicting that she would be married](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLuOqzAYBp8Guj-yzb1wcZp0Oe2WyNif4d8YjIxz4e1X2QfYeqTRaL5u481w4G3-b1ZoP_sx-zgqoRoSkkQ1OsPhHOvSaQ8oVCW07KpmUE3dy3LRRk4TYJXtO-9V66wwg2paCdSyh_Al649NSFHJTvWNuhgrmqqrBjOouvWYilrAcY7p8h15ywt8OOMT6WLjWga95LwfRfWvUNdCXXfEPeCDCnV9wTneZtqXmOOczL4g0WruOGiKwdGe4NhmjhvFjTLfc7wTUwg0gVaTEsPRdNKGd6YTJpHZHHEmG1cclNMDhLcNj4OfoL5rOyGbMmm3vzgEPtquqMW8Gg6_rfmvf0-tfgIAAP__DY13aw) by the end of 2024. At the time, she had been single for nearly five years. Her unexpected journey to the altar began when she lost a bet that required her to join the dating app Hinge. On a whim, she set her location to Montana, where she matched with John Chelini, a local custom home builder. Their whirlwind romance culminated in an intimate wedding ceremony in December 2024, held in her grandmother's living room. The couple moved up their original January 2025 wedding date to ensure her grandmother, who had been diagnosed with brain cancer, could attend. [See a photo here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8Fq6zAQheGnkXcx0siK7IUWF3K9S6GE0qVQrBl7iiwFR8TN25f0Abr_OIf_8-zPgRPn-S2s6GgmX6l4kGAOUh2k9jFwevquiY4QAXWDTlltBjBdr5rFIQVLA8FkLRnCbpLBDmbqrxj7oIxt2L3WpJJaWegNtGGSRls9hAG6I-FVdBIj17K1X4VzXZDSszxwa6eyNskttd7uQv8TMAoY931vOd9rmLewvoSA8SZgPP2_ZLqMl_eP8oJ6XJLQJ8wCjrzOnnPEb6FPqtlcvO2cEt-PVnRyXgOn36f6V_3DwU8AAAD__5rEXJ0).
