name: Team AOC
subject: The 119th Congress officially begins today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
It’s Team AOC. Today, the 119th Congress officially begins!
One thing that distinguishes Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez from most other members of Congress is that she doesn’t take a single cent of corporate PAC money or curry favor with billionaires — she relies virtually entirely on grassroots donations.
With Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and White House for the next two years, we need a strong champion like her fighting for us in Congress.
[With that in mind, if you’re able, please chip in $5 today to support our fight for working Americans, not special interests. Every contribution will make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250103.gWd6oG&refcode=em20250103-7847-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250103.gWd6oG&refcode=em20250103-7847-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2)**
Whether or not you can donate today, thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250103?refcode=em20250103-7847-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=21&refcode2=7847_2526796_nxyDH2&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250103-7847-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=22&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7847%2E2526796%2EnxyDH2)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: John Fetterman
subject: This morning at the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Even though Republicans now hold the majority, my mission isn’t changing.
#
Hi Derek,
This morning at the Capitol, newly elected Senators were officially sworn in by VP Harris. But even though Republicans now hold the majority, my mission isn’t changing.
➡️ I’ll _**always**_ fight to make unions stronger
➡️ I’ll _**never**_ abandon the LGBTQ+ community
➡️ I’ll _**always**_ do my best to make government work for working people
Look, this new majority (and the incoming administration, for that matter) is gonna try to do a lot of stuff I disagree with.
But just because we’re in the minority now doesn’t mean we’re gonna lose every fight. If we stay focused on what’s in the interests of working people, we’ll win a lot more than you might think.
**I’m hoping I can count on your support in the months ahead, Derek.**
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in to help us keep this campaign going? Even $10 makes a huge difference, and I’d be hugely grateful.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250103?refcode=em20250103-9754&refcode2=9754_434096_iomS5Y&akid=9754%2E434096%2EiomS5Y)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250103?amount=5&refcode=em20250103-9754&refcode2=9754_434096_iomS5Y&akid=9754%2E434096%2EiomS5Y)**
Thanks,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250103-9754-footer&t=1&refcode2=9754_434096_iomS5Y&akid=9754%2E434096%2EiomS5Y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9754%2E434096%2EiomS5Y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9754%2E434096%2EiomS5Y)

"Complete the Official DOGE Survey and let House Republican leadership know what should be first to go!" | | | "COMPLETE DOGE SURVEY" DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY PATRIOT: Friend STATUS: INCOMPLETE | The American people put their trust in President Trump when they elected him in a LANDSLIDE victory. And he has pledged to cut wasteful spending and reform the government into a lean, mean, patriotic machine. The American people have FULL faith that Elon and Vivek will deliver. subject: We’re coming back to Los Angeles on Jan 11th!!!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=972573ab6e2f4cfcb647c45739e27381&_e=lW0rhDglSykWa9SnJ2WkwM9Ec77HsVF6swiA1LeqswnCpg2aaBf_oMMMHh60kJlDx5C8ff3mCr4yV6S_mdUE9c62eGRIdLStOv-oYzMJCBJ712JBjdqKgeyFEk5ZXezW9WbuIE7VbbzVfXjNNuuS3gzdpysdqVwmrIC7ut7Jjt8hIr6Osh4OGlsnCYB22JzbS1S-a0p2PXBrc79RbdmkuvVfIjBCpspGFdfJfpBwIzhNZXmt6oo0Pr9dwJVDaHAQR-SrgsWrRLuPmYomPNIFnYk6VnSrHuQp9fkJqk4pl2jVoBFig0urRVKdACyjYfk7)

Dear Friend,
---
You asked, and we answered!! We heard from a lot of West Coasters who couldn't make it to Florida for our epic New Year's Eve Revival, and we decided that California needed to kick off the new year in the presence of the Holy Spirit too!! So we are holding a massive one-night-only revival on January 11thin Los Angeles!! The location will be at the historic Angelus Temple, **[a place where Let Us Worship has worshiped before](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=972573ab6e2f4cfcb647c45739e27381&_e=lW0rhDglSykWa9SnJ2WkwPxkDT0hFBEZStWsrbtXAo9DtMnQbGPUOO9r6bu8YsrD7nvsqxcAXFof4MgE81bNV7eOoNNszMP69Ls_WoUdjy1Rauo7ioCpnU-W3br1LYKGECP_R90HZZE3x8ZofgJ9B5UE3Kand6fKe6kVtd_NoYTzcmmvonnJNJyxE_wkZ18k_rDEshDCOAMp2wcBkQaUIY_cSQyAEFL7EbHrzeT5KN7vQjpOOaoJ5aWkjHRy1ys9hM7XWDn2q5ykGXNx1puomu5iwjImiBNflX9yojdDAaASkniMB1NVi0tsP1DWZ1fQ31e3Rrvn5qTRT-hidX2NOd5MpcECrPbq1VFvs_neHA-6chJpkPA1HFLMuQP6KBfnXsd1RQS-tgGrjlJOVE2DvTygaljDie_cUxVJQvutpuPrN1M9B6rQW6y8ypKOQXcVeYx9wE1CMZnU8i7pu_04b1C3q6sIVKu64_2GBRuA656t9DBydqKutuB_0fHeOCpIQZarroZq-krdbPEfQLxYX1opnbE2B4kYkG6ewTbtayL6NxaByVVHhgEgMrj1v-0szvPtag11WmTEtZDHvE-uZ40qeLovb6XqwGVxAxl2g_ijU2_BGHy-jWGIkjx5deD8xAgFXA92p1jRAzth7oaRq_zB0VlDHSuNh0jruGgEQQDx21FjiK0Ood3aVqciXK53dhM5LBHFhiIV6pFBZ1tJHfb02H2XaPdT9XOkHOoZoWweEbSKj1yw98GDl-rDT1cNYXt8uekGb2XDfHxnxBYUXWGK_XbK8zoRZKtjpksgG7c31f7GNK0A6e84Yyuntv1aqbWUAvj5LCprY1dOFFiUremoTuidYWJ1CDiKEEYvQ3gPBlCRNp8M6NoYqlGboMRu)** , and the impact was _powerful!_ We can't wait to come back, and we want you to join us!!
**WATCH THE FIRST PRESS CONFERENCE OF 2 025 ⬇️⬇️⬇️**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=972573ab6e2f4cfcb647c45739e27381&_e=lW0rhDglSykWa9SnJ2WkwM9Ec77HsVF6swiA1LeqswnCpg2aaBf_oMMMHh60kJlDx5C8ff3mCr4yV6S_mdUE9c62eGRIdLStOv-oYzMJCBJ712JBjdqKgeyFEk5ZXezW9WbuIE7VbbzVfXjNNuuS3gzdpysdqVwmrIC7ut7Jjt8Kol3-c1gXA_FDXV3COneKlpOfCqX63ch6ryZb0LDsj1ehxHHoxURqBLmN37OenAT3br2caFcKIsrzzTNgT35H5jsKZtdonjnWVkogliKSVrDCO95rd5O_yU80itQnT_0SJBC3pirAq9_P3vGB-_DB)
---
In plotting the course for 2025, this wasn't a revival we had on the agenda, but we feel it is critical to help meet the needs of those Believers who are desperate for revival. One of the driving verses behind the Let Us Worship movement is Proverbs 16:9, "In their hearts humans plan their course, but the Lord establishes their steps." The Lord has called us to hold a West Coast revival, and we are obeying! name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Happy New Year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5e66f24bfd&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

I hope 2025 has been off to a great start for you and your family!

I have been busy putting some finishing touches on my new office space and welcoming constituents in for meetings since the end of 2024. Next week, we have three fundraisers scheduled with other Republican legislators.
* On [January 8th](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=January%208th%20event) in downtown Phoenix from 4:30 pm to 6:30 pm.
* On Thursday, [January 9th](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=January%209th%20morning%20event) in downtown Phoenix from 8:30 am to 10am.
* On Thursday, [January 9](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=January%209th%205-7pm%20event)[th](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=January%209th%205-7pm%20event) from 5 pm to 7 pm in mid-town Phoenix.

If you would like to attend please RSVP by clicking on the date of the event you'd like to attend so we can send you additional information about the event.

If you are unable to make it and would like to help us replenish our campaign account, you can donate [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=01fdf70c03&e=a7ab36849c "https://secure.anedot.com/vote-bolick-statesenateld2/donate").

As you may know, I represent one of the most highly competitive legislative swing districts. Last election cycle, I had to raise nearly $400K and spend almost all of it to retain this State Senate seat.

On December 28th I filed to run again in 2026 to keep this Senate seat. It’s never too early to start raising much needed campaign funds to maintain our majority.

Thanks again for your support. I hope to see you next week.

Best,
Shawnna

---

body:

---
|
---
**Calling All Vaccine Choice Champions!** I hope your New Year is off to a great start! As we begin to get back in the groove of work and school and begin to plan out the next several months, be sure to add TFVC to your calendar. [Texans for Vaccine Choice will be hosting the 2025 Freedom Fight Rally in Austin on Tuesday, February 18, 2025](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQyNTM5NTY3MDEwOTQwMTE2LFwiclwiOjE0MjUzOTYwMjMxMjMwMDQ2MX0iLCJzIjoiMTRiOWVhOTkxZDExYWJmYiJ9). I hope that you will join us on the South Steps of the Texas Capitol Building as TFVC honors your stories, celebrates your efforts, amplifies your voices, and connects you with dozens of other medical liberty activists! Between an all star lineup of expert guest speakers and dedicated legislators who are working overtime to protect you and your family from medical overreach, there is no doubt joining TFVC in February will be worth your while! You can RSVP and get more details about the Freedom Fight Rally by clicking the button below:
|
---
| | [ RSVP Now! ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQyNTM5NTY3MDE2MTgyOTk3LFwiclwiOjE0MjUzOTYwMjMxMjMwMDQ2MX0iLCJzIjoiNmQ2OWU2MWQ1MGU1YmY0MCJ9)
---
|
---
As you RSVP, also make sure to get your 10 Years Fighting Tyranny t-shirt to commemorate TFVC's tenth birthday in February!
|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQyNTM5NTY3MDIxNDI1ODgwLFwiclwiOjE0MjUzOTYwMjMxMjMwMDQ2MX0iLCJzIjoiYzgxYjk0M2RiODI5ZmZiOCJ9)
---
|
---
Thank you for your commitment to advancing medical liberty and vaccine choice in the Lone Star State!
|
---
| | | **Gratefully,** **Rebecca Hardy** **President, TFVC**

clean_body: | | Will You Join TFVC in Austin? | | | | | | Calling All Vaccine Choice Champions! I hope your New Year is off to a great start! As we begin to get back in the groove of work and school and begin to plan out the next several months, be sure to add TFVC to your calendar. . I hope that you will join us on the South Steps of the Texas Capitol Building as TFVC honors your stories, celebrates your efforts, amplifies your voices, and connects you with dozens of other medical liberty activists! Between an all star lineup of expert guest speakers and dedicated legislators who are working overtime to protect you and your family from medical overreach, there is no doubt joining TFVC in February will be worth your while! You can RSVP and get more details about the Freedom Fight Rally by clicking the button below: | | | | As you RSVP, also make sure to get your 10 Years Fighting Tyranny t-shirt to commemorate TFVC's tenth birthday in February! | | | Thank you for your commitment to advancing medical liberty and vaccine choice in the Lone Star State! | | | | Gratefully, Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC ---|---|--- | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us. |

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan unleashed: the Ultra-Maga circus just got worse
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Well, folks, it’s official: Jim Jordan and his ULTRA-MAGA majority have been sworn in today, and the clown show is about to hit a new low.
Jordan is off the leash, and the only thing he’s good at—besides chasing TV cameras—is pushing a destructive, far-right agenda that leaves everyday Americans in the dust.
Let’s talk about what this guy’s cooking up for 2025:
* Gut Social Security and Medicare: Jordan’s been eyeing our hard-earned benefits for years, and now he’s ready to slash them. He thinks retirees should just “figure it out” while billionaires get tax breaks.

* Defunding Public Schools: Instead of investing in education, Jordan wants to funnel taxpayer dollars into private schools, and destroy the Department of Education.

* Wrecking the DOJ: Jordan wants to put the Department of Justice directly under Trump’s thumb. No more independence, no more checks and balances—just a political hit squad to go after Trump’s enemies. Some democracy, right?
This isn’t leadership—it’s a tantrum disguised as policy.
Jordan isn’t fighting for Ohioans or any American. He’s fighting for his TV appearances and Trump’s pat on the back.
But guess what? We’ve got a surprise for him. Our team is ready to counter this madness with a bold new plan. This movement is gearing up to hold Jordan and his ULTRA-MAGA cronies accountable, and we’re not backing down.
Now’s your chance to be part of this. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us launch the next phase of our fight. Together, we’re going to flip the script on this mayhem. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250103_gop_majority_link1]
Jim Jordan may think he’s untouchable, but we’ve got news for him: The people of Ohio—and this country—are tired of his circus act.
We’re here to put an end to his career of chaos and get Congress working for us again.
Jordan’s antics might make for dramatic headlines, but they come at a real cost—our seniors, veterans, and families pay the price for his inaction and extremist agenda.
While he’s busy chasing conspiracies and playing political games, everyday Ohioans are struggling with rising costs, underfunded schools, and crumbling infrastructure.
It’s clear he’s not interested in solving these problems—he’s too busy keeping Trump happy.
But here’s the thing: the power to change this lies with us.
By building a grassroots movement strong enough to call out his failures and amplify the voices of the people he’s ignored, we can hold him accountable and shift the electorate against him.
This isn’t just about one election or one seat—it’s about creating a Congress that prioritizes everyday Americans over special interests and far-right theatrics.
So, are you with me? Contribute now to fuel our fight, and stay tuned for the big announcement that’s coming your way. 2025 is our year to show Jordan what real leadership looks like. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250103_gop_majority_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

| | _**Hitting the Ground Running in 2025!
**_
---
Friends, As we step into 2025, we’re celebrating an incredible year for the Indiana Republican Party. We finished the year with successes up and down the ballot, from supermajorities in the statehouse to electing a fourth consecutive Republican governor. Now that we are all rested from spending the holiday season with our loved ones, it is time to hit the ground running! While 2025 is an election-free year, it’s far from a quiet one. This is our opportunity to strengthen our grassroots foundation, energize our supporters, and prepare for the critical 2026 elections. We hope you will join us this year to help lay a foundation for success in the years to come! Thank you for all you do!
---
| |
---
| | Erin Lucas, Indiana GOP Interim Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor-Elect Mike Braun Says Goodbye to the U.S. Senate and Wishes Hoosiers a Happy New Year!**_
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [said](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=9bfeb82e18004c5e96e7785fcd092cb6&_e=JF15LcdgnYHaOT4XwIZRf7qDx0392hP4K1w5UonGru9JVppPMQC5Vj2cgp6y0k-EERltUYh_lk0iyY-nfEJJQyWdmSj9stz-SCT5M2UpmPCIMHrIhlMBU5NgTNPwZIQsX2c1w15vv3L_gm-PebYkaxuVysuUQ71I3UsVn93Xg0C-dGCDrRdHkUvGX5CYNc64rfw1AFDtXSreAAL4v_Ag7MCvSodRCedBnwYhGvD5nLD5GpsKdEL6lYksEyAJhJU7) his final goodbye to the U.S. Senate, highlighting his largest accomplishments in that time. **What's he saying** : "As I pass the baton in the Senate, I’m so proud of what we did, including:
* 37 bills signed into law (Most Effective First Term Senator)
* 13,775 constituent cases completed
* Standing up for Hoosiers’ freedoms & against wasteful spending

Hoosiers, it’s an honor to serve you!"
\- **Governor-elect****. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=9bfeb82e18004c5e96e7785fcd092cb6&_e=JF15LcdgnYHaOT4XwIZRf7qDx0392hP4K1w5UonGru9JVppPMQC5Vj2cgp6y0k-EERltUYh_lk0iyY-nfEJJQyO9J3Ogrk92TFdG1ksYdHS8UarlZNfJ5vN3N5gFC_O7gIoD9msLk_ejSF4C9k528zUEJcNpHkvL3gSDtyEd_s7osCjNY46hWQKU8y_z9Yc-0Btz_zwE5kap-XQKUvCgkBxH0LVRtpGxjwq8QuMZMQzkzPSbIAtd8Viyc8iWacH3).
---
---
**Governor-elect Mike Braun** [wished](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=9bfeb82e18004c5e96e7785fcd092cb6&_e=JF15LcdgnYHaOT4XwIZRf3kVaPycFUCzAuH_FDT7BAl7ruGIFyNOL48onJ3HAEbUBL57c0IYKYAvcXT0FEnVRrK48qiqM1NjaRcqT8WtZA9_25bl0cTv6yx5XQEYVu2JIv-bEGH122gS07XimtOg3anH6COjLnnAwZoG-eSax3rXyiNVjt6Uh4BGM9zM0ERDLcCA92eLaWhlvScMuLv9BkkstRbzIc948r3hEhf_X7He_GWZpTezDXz6OuzzxuiO) all Hoosiers a Happy New Year. **What's he saying** : "As we step into 2025, I’m filled with hope and optimism for what lies ahead. This year marks the beginning of a new chapter for Indiana, and together, we will work toward building a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for every Hoosier.

Wishing you all a happy, healthy, and successful New Year! Let’s get to work."
\- **Governor-elect****. Braun** said via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=9bfeb82e18004c5e96e7785fcd092cb6&_e=JF15LcdgnYHaOT4XwIZRf3kVaPycFUCzAuH_FDT7BAl7ruGIFyNOL48onJ3HAEbUBL57c0IYKYAvcXT0FEnVRs3k_7atCglDXR-jtOo9bamxlwYAPsiHw98vLo7wI440M4uZF7gFQhma06xN7WbQOgduqNJxG76BrYSX3EE9NqLTnVnKdSWpPaQmCh982VIrQOtZNAoFUorpoqppoOzfAhf9aIYy6X3D8vHLZihnIIVulYFIgCkkcocnT6m_hnPq).

_**Join us for Hoosier Heritage Family Day!**_
---
---
We are just over a week out from the Inaugural Weekend Hoosier Heritage Family Day! Bring your family to meet the next First Family of Indiana, and spend the day experiencing what it truly means to be a Hoosier.

We have activities for people of all ages going on from 1- 4 pm at the Indiana State Museum. Come get your picture with your next Governor and Lt. Governor, listen to a story with First-Lady Designate Maureen Braun, and test your Hoosier Knowledge with Indiana Trivia! Or, go on a scavenger hunt, grab some local goodies, and test your creativity with crafts!
📅 Date: Sunday, January 12, 2025
⏰ Time: 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM
📍 Location: The Indiana State Museum - 1650 W Washington St., Indianapolis, IN 46204
🎟️ Admission: Free for everyone! RSVP Here! 🔗 [https://braunfamilyday.rsvpify.com/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=9bfeb82e18004c5e96e7785fcd092cb6&_e=JF15LcdgnYHaOT4XwIZRf5Y_-LUiJWvJ-zExPuVLqUvUanzVSO3znJfwBgcSZzFDPCMK_VLc_hT25azp7L6nr6byWLqmwN93TCAGrtP1f34IL3N6-xiYtnLKFL1l7_VOxW3ol3GoUdb0r4NfxCxB5MILqQKZ_IMSlC8_EH76eJ54j21nd8DcCJVIqwpqOyodL4cecNyveRW4FOsyvRjUOA%3D%3D)

Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Spring Internship Program!

✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning
✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections
✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana

Apply Today! Spots are limited!

name: Congressman Eric Swalwell
subject: Humbled. Grateful. Fired up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I’m honored to continue serving California’s 14th Congressional District. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99803855/520920849/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzdhMjE3ZS0xM2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1YLVHfBwSOjrEpoUPyH6TGKP5oSIex8ss9CSg2aT_o=&emci=5a30065f-cebc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a77a217e-13ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=7878003)
Friends, Today, I stood in the U.S. Capitol and took the oath of office to represent California’s 14th District in the 119th Congress. Humbled. Grateful. Fired up. That’s how I felt standing alongside my colleagues, promising to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic. But let’s not sugarcoat it — our country is in a fight. From the ongoing climate crisis and the urgent need for economic reform to attacks on reproductive freedom, racial justice, and our democracy itself, the stakes couldn’t be higher. And just when you think Trump and his MAGA allies can’t sink any lower, they find new depths. With their Project 2025 ready to go, they’re more dangerous, organized, and emboldened than ever. That’s the fight I’ve been sworn into today: to ensure they fail in dragging us back. We need bold, progressive leadership at this moment — not political stunts or leaders who are more interested in pleasing Trump than serving Americans. I promise to keep being that leader for California’s 14th and for all of you across the country who refuse to let MAGA extremists win. But I can't do it alone. We’ve got a lot of work to do, but I know we can get it done with you by my side. Let’s make this Congress one to remember — for all the right reasons. Gratefully, Congressman Eric Swalwell
|
---

name: Sarah McBride
subject: It’s official
body:
[1]Sarah McBride - Democrat for Congress

Today, I was officially sworn in to represent Delaware in the United
States House of Representatives.

As I took my oath of office, I was overwhelmed with gratitude — for you
and for our state of neighbors. Together, we broke barriers and
demonstrated that nothing is truly impossible when we dream of it and
fight for it.

Delaware is my home, and every step of this incredible journey has been
guided by the people and values that make it so special. From Claymont to
Lewes, Dover to Seaford, the stories, challenges, and dreams I heard on
the campaign trail are what I carried with me today — and it’s what I’ll
carry with me into the halls of Congress every day.

Nearly 250 years ago, Delaware became the first state to sign on to the
journey that is America, and I’m ready to ensure that the First State
continues to lead the way. Whether it’s advocating for affordable
healthcare and housing or defending our rights and freedoms, I will fight
every day to deliver for you and Delawareans up and down the state.

But none of this would have been possible without you. Whether you pitched in your time and
treasure or simply read our emails and followed us on social media to keep
up with our campaign, your belief that our democracy is big enough for all
of us brought us to this moment. I’m endlessly grateful.

Now it’s time to get to work, and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves. Because
the truth is, we’ll be facing uphill battles with a Republican-controlled
Congress and a second Donald Trump presidency. But I remain committed to
taking on the important fights and collaborating across differences to
find solutions to the challenges facing all of us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250103-1?refcode=em20250103-1661&amount=5&refcode2=1661_21716_P2C-oO&akid=1661%2E21716%2EP2C-oO ]Thank you for your support. Our campaign is fueled by grassroots
donations. As I get to work in Congress, I’m relying on your contributions
to keep me focused on legislating. If you’re able, will you pitch in
$5 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250103-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250103-1661&refcode2=1661_21716_P2C-oO&akid=1661%2E21716%2EP2C-oO ]Donate $5 »

Thank you again for putting your trust in me. Let’s keep dreaming big for
our small state.

Sarah McBride

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.sarahmcbride.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1661%2E21716%2EP2C-oO

# **While the political landscape at the National Level has shifted significantly and we look forward to the January 20th inauguration of President Trump, Texas has a very different situation going on with an ugly fight in the House over a WOKE speakership vs Republican polices.**
Experts and discussion this first meeting of 2025 Thursday January 9th Grotto Ristorante 4715 Westheimer Rd 11am check in and networking 11:30am Meeting start & NEWS Noon Program begins 1pm Conclusion

# Announcing the VIP Founders Club
---
Join at the VIP Founders Club level and you and your guest never wait in line, pay a fee and you are invited to private briefings and exclusive receptions with only fellow VIP Founders Club Members. **We have 24 Luncheons and Receptions planned for 2025** **PLUS Special Events and trips to the Capital to work with our Legislators** **And** **the BIZPAC Center for Business Excellence Accelerator and PITCH ROOM**

body:
I am excited to announce my new apparel line! Get your very own "Make Colorado Great Again" hat, coffee mug, sweatshirt, or crewneck today!
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvkjs-oiCPwIkbpLo2vhXcrOb1rl9YD7LR8WqrRqAzJ4SUassmUMbmKazuU1AIQM5gNsDfY9NDKGoNabY7G5GKhY_UKKCfOKN_BobAeKxZSzuu30QzS-2UzW1WJKeLcdW4VRIfmK9a0HsuxKXM9Nwn0Gjr669w_-LGXp1kosv0OoXitwSmQaTfUZRF5KBVRceYt1lmMK6eYu84YBPZbibKkoEk_D0AnHI6Il7fg3qV8=&c=ysP73FRy0NZjzxLtXevjhQ1GLEu9aFYmCaM_Xxfl3p6y8FLpOlOHkA==&ch=x0fb0KHL6ZrwlRXAyO5h15jpaE8ac0o7wJlQLFnXenEkSco14_f3Aw==)

| Friend, As we approach the 60th Presidential Inauguration, I am excited to announce a new apparel line in celebration of retaking the White House, House, Senate, and multiple seats here in Colorado.
I am excited to announce the new "Make Colorado Great Again" collection, exclusively from Ace Specialties, the official merchandiser of President Donald J. Trump.
Your purchase of one of these items will help me cover my costs to travel to the RNC Winter Meeting and Presidential Inauguration in Washington, DC in just 12 days.
Plus, it will give you some great new swag to wear during the next four years while we Make America Great Again!
---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=19cb300807b6408090b447d40d61b867&_t=feVC04fQ2krlljDJMxJn19iAOWpCtvpYsz5yRgD1eZFUp83aKUJwxP36v1LviP0ofluyDO3DwwT1GlrKFXRHtXtbscHVxsX86QtatyZATm3u-gh0zRoA09HaZ_OxGPoS)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19cb300807b6408090b447d40d61b867&_e=9Rap5GbY2_P4rgvW_oBjIK770GrX7ndCavpr8V1R8bTFtYjlkne0Stw5Soeyvmj_Q48BGJ1fXapOEFPS7y2tAyuRABbOu_DlfmvAUPLscpvwdYap9UU9yZYIsKS7_qugfA-rIzUM8jpQbbGPDJc7wCwMhjfW4OUz0_ZiJ12ClZi-zmKxGYUuT-dsgc4AlPKMyaZpUmcLMDFT-94VHd4LD7gidQZwJxn1OZh3Mgs-KcweGIsSOPJcQA2JbKYZlS3N9Z4UvdR_TlWJvBF-l0z67FdHCOQTNfRCNdCsb2Jx8IK1E6iqgMqsJP_JNaZyABSS5KUEcQQ_hgJI9V3rQDsWslbkebiCFqevmBmsryTE1Eah-DZ7UftJjzYA8Ldxo9uN)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
* Hides the corruption of the ruling class
* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19cb300807b6408090b447d40d61b867&_e=9Rap5GbY2_P4rgvW_oBjIK770GrX7ndCavpr8V1R8bTFtYjlkne0Stw5Soeyvmj_Q48BGJ1fXapOEFPS7y2tAyuRABbOu_DlfmvAUPLscpvwdYap9UU9yZYIsKS7_qugfA-rIzUM8jpQbbGPDJc7wCwMhjfW4OUz0_ZiJ12ClZi-zmKxGYUuT-dsgc4AlPKMyaZpUmcLMDFT-94VHd4LD7gidQZwJxn1OZh3Mgs-KcxtpXBl-tIk0lyaMRtbDECzmiy7MqBg9ZP0DVEQdcjVdIaFqZLPg_gE85mZWYBAh9tkir_t66dRixvB-Wf6_YLkpAL-eIOgCJObgRAoSua0WvsgDesChU62b3CoV9yeHbhiZ6tQ0bh2ZzteaNmn4C54)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19cb300807b6408090b447d40d61b867&_e=9Rap5GbY2_P4rgvW_oBjIK770GrX7ndCavpr8V1R8bTFtYjlkne0Stw5Soeyvmj_Q48BGJ1fXapOEFPS7y2tAyuRABbOu_DlfmvAUPLscpvwdYap9UU9yZYIsKS7_qugfA-rIzUM8jpQbbGPDJc7wCwMhjfW4OUz0_ZiJ12ClZi-zmKxGYUuT-dsgc4AlPKMyaZpUmcLMDFT-94VHd4LD7gidQZwJxn1OZh3Mgs-KcyBvKMP8We087e_8lh-U-GsdHIkT4G-Y3823s0Hp4AH-YDyfYqvSUjVTNA3S8flKPi9gS60ix6Nw0CFabXIk52C7w-_sEODaR_ZHw-GluBslqY9gHdr2rSheB7Ji3CVx4Cytx2I1rvxgl39oOrmxXhb)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=19cb300807b6408090b447d40d61b867&_t=feVC04fQ2krlljDJMxJn19iAOWpCtvpYsz5yRgD1eZFUp83aKUJwxP36v1LviP0ofluyDO3DwwT1GlrKFXRHtZ-MseR98lsEdmkt-9j39WGDzKpA3jU7bu7X9WZE1CUnVJeTEtXyt4vwqPKLVFoqIChafULlhGSzRGSrJAZljM0%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=19cb300807b6408090b447d40d61b867&_t=feVC04fQ2krlljDJMxJn19iAOWpCtvpYsz5yRgD1eZFUp83aKUJwxP36v1LviP0ofluyDO3DwwT1GlrKFXRHtXtbscHVxsX86QtatyZATm3u-gh0zRoA09HaZ_OxGPoS).
---

subject: Re: King Trump?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Was this a mistake?
| Friend, we sent you this time-sensitive poll to gauge public support for the **No Kings Act** , and we’re still waiting for your response.

We’re confused... **Do you support Trump effectively becoming a King, or _was this a mistake?_**

We need 12,242 more responses for conclusive data — please, correct the record immediately: **[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)** | [YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
---
[NO, TRUMP SHOULD HAVE FULL IMMUNITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
Thank you SO much for your long awaited response,

_— The Voter Protection Project_

**_(Forwarded Message Below)_**
FROM: Your Response Requested (via VPP)
TO: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
SUBJECT: 🚫 No King Trump!
**❗ BREAKING NEWS ❗**
**"No Kings Act": Chuck Schumer says he will introduce a bill to try and reverse the Supreme Court’s immunity decision.**
---
**[Friend, do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
[YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
---
[NO, TRUMP SHOULD HAVE FULL IMMUNITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=14&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
*** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT ***
* * *
Look, every day more and more Democrats call on Congress to pass the **No Kings Act** and __REVERSE__ the Supreme Court’s immunity decision...

But unless we - the PEOPLE - mount MAJOR pressure on Congress to take action, we’ll _lose our chance_ to put a check on Trump’s power.

**_That’s why we NEED to know where you stand:_**

**[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=15&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)**
[YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=16&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
---

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=18&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_)
Thank you for your response,
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18356%2E878179%2Ehu4Vs_) to request fewer emails. body:
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99804622/520923552/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2IyOTcxZi0xN2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lu0ZDK8ES3P510dfaA4yxnEd--z6GSEPixToRF8h_U=)
---
[_**Peter, I was officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 3,000 donations before midnight – to show we stand ready to hold MAGA Republicans accountable and win back the House majority for Democrats. I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99804623/520923553/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2IyOTcxZi0xN2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lu0ZDK8ES3P510dfaA4yxnEd--z6GSEPixToRF8h_U=)
[**Peter, as Democratic Leader, I want to take a moment to share our priorities this Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99804624/520923554/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2IyOTcxZi0xN2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lu0ZDK8ES3P510dfaA4yxnEd--z6GSEPixToRF8h_U=)
House Democrats will work with anyone to lower the high cost of living in the United States of America once and for all.
As Democrats, our promise to the American people is that we will fight hard to make sure that no one takes away Social Security or Medicare from the American people that they earned – not now, not ever. [**_No means never_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99804625/520923555/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2IyOTcxZi0xN2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lu0ZDK8ES3P510dfaA4yxnEd--z6GSEPixToRF8h_U=).
Our position is that it is not acceptable to cut Social Security, cut Medicare, cut Medicaid, cut veterans’ benefits or cut nutritional assistance from children and families to pay for massive tax breaks for billionaires and wealthy corporations.
[**I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99804626/520923556/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250103_em_fr_b2_jeffries_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2IyOTcxZi0xN2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lu0ZDK8ES3P510dfaA4yxnEd--z6GSEPixToRF8h_U=)
That's why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 3,000 Democratic donations before midnight – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on your $15?

As Democrats, our promise to the American people is that we will fight hard to make sure that no one takes away Social Security or Medicare from the American people that they earned – not now, not ever. =. Our position is that it is not acceptable to cut Social Security, cut Medicare, cut Medicaid, cut veterans’ benefits or cut nutritional assistance from children and families to pay for massive tax breaks for billionaires and wealthy corporations. = That's why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 3,000 Democratic donations before midnight – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. We’re implementing our final push for the weekend and set a goal to raise $1,500 per day between now and Sunday to ensure we have all the funds we need. [_**This is a huge opportunity to grow our national Democratic momentum with our first success after Trump’s win in November. Peter, If you’re reading this, you’ve probably already heard about what Becca’s colleague across the aisle, Nancy Mace, has said about the trans community. Specifically, Congresswoman-elect Sarah McBride, the first trans woman in Congress, faced relentless attacks from Nancy Mace for no reason other than simply being trans. **This is a prime example of how the most extreme House Republicans use outrage to gain clicks, likes, and followers. It’s wrong.** Becca called out this blatant fear-mongering in a recent op-ed and emphasized that Democrats are focused on tackling the _real_ issues impacting working people — like investing in affordable housing and mental health care. Peter, it's clear: These next few months are going to be an uphill battle with a House Republican majority filled with what we like to call _conflict entrepreneurs_ — politicians who are more fixated on creating distractions and booking TV interviews than _actually_ getting things done. **That’s why Becca is leading the effort to hold House Republicans accountable for all of the work they’re *not* doing while carrying out these partisan witch hunts. name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: The enemy within
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cab5300835cd4b1293d524ca871de3d3&_e=422fTzOlrxWnpVZW6tKgp2WUHR9UUKDJ0hNdYHy-20tL7h6DsbqKhW46O03GryVFwkqO6IOEuxqh4zO61svDCvLb2iDsZZuky6RywwOOFOaO42oTBAcgGIp8fyrowVGJLN3QznXNJRI7IOqk-BSHQLRlvpEn7m2bur5VQGqUWtx_eVdiTERI_FvOQxpePsaurD7dGuctiVtkcNE0TMrnAbIFzvXM1AT0MRWf2fRp2cuJT4xrAe_wKY6K6bYp7xMfHdSCnBFRS8WPqfER4fyVvHK4BaecBxQ_AbUVe618jPw5v6AgjT0iQIOqQIkVFRflkJw1pMMa8DfoEeF2KUTe0BLlSghbTJpAGUMpwKpJorbnUoxKfrr4scmOjzaSHkk5kZeKbMZ0RV3r8q_m6F0WLA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cab5300835cd4b1293d524ca871de3d3&_e=422fTzOlrxWnpVZW6tKgp2WUHR9UUKDJ0hNdYHy-20tL7h6DsbqKhW46O03GryVFwkqO6IOEuxqh4zO61svDCvLb2iDsZZuky6RywwOOFOaO42oTBAcgGIp8fyrowVGJLN3QznXNJRI7IOqk-BSHQLRlvpEn7m2bur5VQGqUWtx_eVdiTERI_FvOQxpePsaurD7dGuctiVtkcNE0TMrnAbIFzvXM1AT0MRWf2fRp2cuJT4xrAe_wKY6K6bYp7xMfhg6K1yUgSC1xGb2ZeaJFRLtQ2YB8ALpXG6kKVumMZpJOkZPYDbSxQVWK4p4xcYfeZmHXMpNJwRuWGeXjetDklZj1ZWBPp7Tc52n4OWTAwya5DLruIFj3VN8wKjWc1Cny1BUgIECrUWiq3Kpmt0-YRA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cab5300835cd4b1293d524ca871de3d3&_e=422fTzOlrxWnpVZW6tKgp2WUHR9UUKDJ0hNdYHy-20tL7h6DsbqKhW46O03GryVFwkqO6IOEuxqh4zO61svDCvLb2iDsZZuky6RywwOOFOaO42oTBAcgGIp8fyrowVGJLN3QznXNJRI7IOqk-BSHQLRlvpEn7m2bur5VQGqUWtx_eVdiTERI_FvOQxpePsaurD7dGuctiVtkcNE0TMrnAbIFzvXM1AT0MRWf2fRp2cuJT4xrAe_wKY6K6bYp7xMfM3jrKcqj4rQG-K7DreS6UzvNJKPOkm9dlg3PhcWCfYLt1NN1yv-Zc3mTOAHgxs09_81FjiBWVFTW67Dg7KNNA1K2L18SvVDJEMgYllS2GhbqQKSIyz3ooqmR4rT1Yvx1jldV3Ed6RiIVqxCkVEtabQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

This must-win race on Tuesday will decide whether Democrats can hold the line against Republican attacks on climate action and critical rights. **[Our endorsed candidate, Kannan Srinivasan, is the proven climate champion we need — and splitting $25 between JanePAC and his campaign today can help secure this seat and protect the progress we’ve fought so hard for.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99805314/520925333/447730420?amount=25&refcode=ea.a28d3c7a-1aca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ms=ea.a28d3c7a-1aca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyOGQzYzdhLTFhY2EtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWI0NSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kqTWRSZSw2ge1A4P98UIH5-dr-HbNcz4hxenC4361s8=)** Here are three reasons why this election, and _your support,_ couldn’t be more important: **1️⃣ This is our first chance to push back against Trump’s dangerous agenda.** With Donald Trump back in the White House in a few weeks, Republicans are wasting no time targeting climate action and critical rights like reproductive freedom. Kannan’s record of advancing clean energy policies, promoting environmental accountability, and prioritizing public health in the state legislature makes him the bold leader we need in the Virginia Senate to build a firewall of policies that protect progress and counter Trump’s harmful agenda. **2️⃣ Democrats hold a razor-thin, one-seat majority in Virginia’s Senate.** This race is a must-win. If Republicans flip this seat, the Senate will be deadlocked — allowing the Republican lieutenant governor to cast the tie-breaking vote. That would hand them dangerous power over Virginia’s government, putting climate policy, public health, and democracy itself at risk. **3️⃣ Kannan’s campaign relies on grassroots support from people like you.** Republicans are pouring in money from corporate donors, but Kannan is counting on people-powered support to get out the vote. With early voting underway, your donation can help ensure Kannan reaches every voter and keeps this seat out of Republican hands. **[Will you split a $25 donation between my team and Kannan Srinivasan’s campaign? body:

| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22709%2E4449941%2E_dcc6p)

Hello,

Last month, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with _MSNBC_ as they struggle with low ratings and a potential sale.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

We can’t abandon _MSNBC_ after all they’ve done for Democrats. [**Click HERE or use the button below to sign »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250103_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22709%2E4449941%2E_dcc6p) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250103_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22709%2E4449941%2E_dcc6p)

Fight for Reform

From: very concerning... [FFR]
Subject: _MSNBC_ is in DEEP trouble
To: TOP DEMOCRATS
**THIS IS BAD NEWS:**

We’re **stunned** to see that _MSNBC_ is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re launching an _URGENT_ petition standing with _MSNBC_ during this trying time for them.**
[**Please, after all that _MSNBC_ has done for Democrats, we can’t abandon them now! Sign our petition to stand with _MSNBC_ »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250103_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22709%2E4449941%2E_dcc6p)
[25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with _MSNBC_ »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-MSNBC/?source=FFR_20250103_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22709%2E4449941%2E_dcc6p)

Thank you for adding your voice to our emergency petition!

_– Fight for Reform_

name: Matt Shinners, Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Digital Team Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we learned and where we're going in 2025.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_digital&n=1)
---
Friday, January 03, 2025 | Peter -- Matt here again. This is the last time you’ll hear from me in this series, I swear! While I don’t lead on our digital work, I do coordinate a few of our contractors and vendors with our in house team, so I’m in the best position to walk through our debrief. **What Went Well** In 2024, we leaned into a significant paid digital strategy for the first time since ‘22. Even back then, the scope was much smaller than what we did this cycle. The video content drove a lot of engagement, and our texting campaigns went well. We were able to talk about Forward values and candidates to hundreds of thousands of voters. Our video creation and approval process was very streamlined, and we found out how to quickly generate content with our most visible principles fast enough to respond to what we were seeing people react to. **Lessons Learned** We did learn, however, that there’s only so far we can go in boosting supported candidates. We need to do a lot of work to get our name out there, as name recognition for Forward is still pretty low. So, next year, we plan to test out messaging, channels, and messengers to see who we should target, with what message, and from what messenger. In doing so, we can develop target audiences and then lean into recruiting them to Forward as our next step. [These are our thoughts from 2024, but we want to hear from you! Please head to this link and fill out your thoughts on lessons learned, the direction the party should head in, and projects we should tackle! We will read them all, and we will highlight our top 10, along with the people who submitted them, in early January as our New Years Resolutions.](https://home.forwardparty.com/2024_end_of_year_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_digital&n=2) **2025 Projects**
* Engage in an awareness and acquisition campaign
* Find ways to expand our reach (e.g. Mobilize) and create “triggers” for investment in them

If you're still feeling the season of giving, consider donating to Forward this season! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_digital&n=3 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_digital&n=3)
---
Happy New Year,
Matt Shinners
[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_of_year_series_digital&n=4)

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=20%2E181023%2E23JCa6)
It’s only a few days into the new year, and I’m already feeling a new energy as we prepare for 2025.
Here’s what I know: 2025 is going to require all of us to show up, speak out, and fight like the Purposeful Warriors I know we are. **Who's ready?**
There is so much we have yet to accomplish, and we can only do that together.
My commitment to you is that I’m ready to show up every day and fight to ensure our government is transparent and ethical. I am going to continue to hold community conversations and talk directly to folks about their ideas, their fears, their hopes, and how we can all work together to create a state where everyone can thrive.
The last few years have been hard, but what has always brought me hope, and kept my spirit alive, is coming together with my community. It’s been my community that has lifted me up, and supported me. Now, I’m fighting to do the same.
As always, thank you for your support.
In gratitude,
Jocelyn
* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250103-1?refcode=em20250103-1&refcode2=20_181023_23JCa6&akid=20%2E181023%2E23JCa6)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250103-1?refcode=em20250103-1&refcode2=20_181023_23JCa6&akid=20%2E181023%2E23JCa6)**
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=20%2E181023%2E23JCa6)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_2024/?t=3&akid=20%2E181023%2E23JCa6)

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO BOX 21368,
Detroit, MI 48221

subject: I need you to read every word of this carefully:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The new Republican majority was just sworn into the Senate. I need your help to fight back.

| | As we begin a new year and a new Congress, we face unprecedented challenges. **The road ahead will not be easy, but the work we do in the coming months and years will have a profound impact on the lives of Oregonians and the American people.** As we begin this Congress, we know MAGA Republicans are hell-bent on advancing Project 2025's dangerous agenda—one that threatens to undermine critical protections for working families, women, democracy, and our planet. From restricting voting rights to dismantling healthcare, rolling back environmental protections, and cutting vital social safety nets, the stakes could not be higher. **But I have one thing to say to you today: we will not back down and let them win.** Democrats will stand united to fight against Trump's harmful agenda with everything we've got. We will work tirelessly to protect the progress we've made to build a brighter, more equitable future for all of us. Together, we will stand up for the values that define us. **Let's remember why we are here: to serve the people and ensure that our government works for them, not for the powerful.** I look forward to working alongside my colleagues as we tackle the challenges ahead and fight for a better future. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

body:
|
---
Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806116/520928334/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGZmYTE2Yy0xZmNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htI_gFXwnqu0KEedv36zijskFpfLhAvOvIO6k0zfoQE=&emci=42be51ec-1cca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=4dffa16c-1fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=4925535)_ ****
_Happy New Year From INDems_ **** With the new year upon us, we wanted to wish all our supporters a very Happy New Year! We hope you were able to spend the time with loved ones, family and friends, and those close to you. Your commitment to a better Indiana does not go unnoticed, and together we can keep working toward a better state where everyone can access healthcare, education, and opportunity.

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Happy New Year From INDems With the new year upon us, we wanted to wish all our supporters a very Happy New Year! We hope you were able to spend the time with loved ones, family and friends, and those close to you. Your commitment to a better Indiana does not go unnoticed, and together we can keep working toward a better state where everyone can access healthcare, education, and opportunity. New State Law Weakens Child Labor Protections in Indiana A handful of laws passed in the last legislative session went into effect on the new year, including a bill which makes it legal for 16-and-17-year olds to work any hour of the night on a school night without parental approval or adult supervision. We should be prioritizing education for our students, not making it harder for them to succeed at school by allowing children to work dangerous third shifts and having to attend school just hours later. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Statehouse Democrats are pushing again to axe the tax on feminine hygiene products and adult diapers that families throughout our state are forced to pay for necessities. There seems to be bipartisan support for the proposal this time around as well, with some Republican members showing their support for this common sense measure for Hoosier families and women. **** A Happy New Year, Merry Christmas, and Happy Holidays from the Bayh Family. Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 9th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News FOX59: FOX59: IPB: MNC: WRTV: Louisville Public Media: FOX59: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: It's official, team!
body:
|
#
It's official, team. Earlier today, I raised my hand, took the oath of office, and officially became your Representative for Michigan’s 8th District! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806188/520928554/-1606559029?refcode=em-1.3.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGExMWYyOS0yMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MTkfsfpCLXZFgPZ81NK0qNE84obZg7x-zaeirBchpo=)
_Our new office for the next two years._ This moment was made possible by you. Your energy, belief in our campaign, and commitment to our shared vision made this victory a reality. I can’t thank you enough for your support. I said this often on the campaign trail: _We don’t have to agree on everything to agree on the most important thing – that everyone in our district deserves to thrive._ That belief was the foundation of our campaign, and we showed what’s possible when we focus on what truly matters. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806190/520928556/-1606559029?refcode=em-1.3.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGExMWYyOS0yMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MTkfsfpCLXZFgPZ81NK0qNE84obZg7x-zaeirBchpo=)
_From our campaign launch at UA Local 85 exactly one year ago today._ We launched this journey exactly one year ago today alongside dozens of supporters at our local plumbers and pipefitters union hall. And in a matter of months, our young campaign grew into a district-wide coalition that made history for Mid-Michigan. We were one of only three only non-incumbent House Democrats to win in a district carried by Donald Trump. We also outperformed every Democrat at the top of the ticket in every single municipality in our district. That’s incredible, friend. We did it by connecting with our neighbors and shining a spotlight on the very real struggles people face every day – housing costs, childcare, prescription drugs, and the erosion of our fundamental rights. I know there’s a lot of cynicism about the government right now. Trust me, I get it. But I’m here to show that when we work together, we can improve lives in our district and across the country. Thank you for trusting me to represent you. I’m deeply honored and can’t wait to get to work for MI-08. With gratitude, Kristen | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806192/520928558/-1606559029?refcode=em-1.3.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGExMWYyOS0yMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MTkfsfpCLXZFgPZ81NK0qNE84obZg7x-zaeirBchpo=)
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806194/520928560/-1666864965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGExMWYyOS0yMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MTkfsfpCLXZFgPZ81NK0qNE84obZg7x-zaeirBchpo=&emci=bd7d307b-1fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=68a11f29-20ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=27257697) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806196/520928562/494080135?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGExMWYyOS0yMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MTkfsfpCLXZFgPZ81NK0qNE84obZg7x-zaeirBchpo=&emci=bd7d307b-1fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=68a11f29-20ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=27257697) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806198/520928564/94034125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGExMWYyOS0yMGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0MTkfsfpCLXZFgPZ81NK0qNE84obZg7x-zaeirBchpo=&emci=bd7d307b-1fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=68a11f29-20ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=27257697)

| | It's official, Peter: I have just been sworn in to begin my second term representing Illinois 17th District in Congress. I have never lost sight that being in Congress _isn’t_ about politics – it is about helping out my neighbors every day. And that’s just fine with me, because I'm not a politician – I'm a meteorologist who spent two decades serving my Northwest and Central Illinois communities. In my first term in office, even amidst far-right dysfunction and obstruction, I delivered on my pledge to bridge the political divide and work with anyone to deliver common-sense solutions to improve lives. I’m excited to start another term with those same ideals, and I’m ready to go to bat for working families on issues like health care access, economic justice, protecting our environment, and so much more. As we kick off these next two years in Congress, you have my commitment to continue engaging with each of you directly. My office is yours, because we are here to serve you, and your input is critical to improving our lives. Thanks for your confidence and support. I’m eager to get to work. -Eric | **[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/24LplN0SqUFbYeZl7AdApw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpWuaYP0TjaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXExLTIwMjU_Y2l0eT1DcmVzY28mY291bnRyeT1VUyZlbWFpbD1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTQwZ21haWwuY29tJmZpcnN0bmFtZT1QZXRlciZsYXN0bmFtZT1XaWxsaXMmcGhvbmU9JTJCMSslMjg3MTclMjkrODY3LTUzMDkmcmVmY29kZT1lbS0xLjMuMjUtYWxsLWEmcmVmY29kZU5tcm9CbWlkPTgwODI1MzE5MCZzdGF0ZT1QQSZ6aXA9MTgzMjZXA3NwY0IKZ3ekYXhn_yY5flIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)**
