name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=746e7a4343514fd6bb6920837e612158&_t=-9f_6HgIDa1SAS05uqrbdMh2Ftfxk80QcC8gpmY07JXMxhQdtz_Dxok13XJHt2-v_-EPCpoDMVWeuRG3O5L6qZiSBoWfq0jWNVzcvCmaC80ukx2jbHTJ7YTEBFnIKx7f)_
---
| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=746e7a4343514fd6bb6920837e612158&_e=fW4DdL1ToV9sAIGE29iBN_Kl2Lf3MRcL5X6o2l1Mz1YtGCSWA0kn8TGsp-tL4Qs6B4jOVEmpl4JWFkQoML4vQ6BEbaJSPldX8_wdk7Ngx5olku7fNF49DwcO0C30II1K8XFhNdBOaas3kfZnWkVcwFW6etX7HW2j13WdyqU3AiLe0r4C_JmkbeIVS41I7cXwldPzSffwWMqVpy1Xbl4tQTohBL8Gs1Hf7oEXc8NEoJFg0X3XQyG-o7OOYBzn4S5r2DaiYmI-6eiZElNo2GJMVE6j9PhxSYKOutwlQIcgGB-jIopg1YBi1S7BqfK9luPmX31OmpqjgLDPJglylaWKkbqQgfNohoKKFJVfho7KcU9f04KFxbTiGnvhOTcZt_Uk)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=746e7a4343514fd6bb6920837e612158&_e=fW4DdL1ToV9sAIGE29iBN_Kl2Lf3MRcL5X6o2l1Mz1YtGCSWA0kn8TGsp-tL4Qs6B4jOVEmpl4JWFkQoML4vQ6BEbaJSPldX8_wdk7Ngx5olku7fNF49DwcO0C30II1K8XFhNdBOaas3kfZnWkVcwFW6etX7HW2j13WdyqU3AiLe0r4C_JmkbeIVS41I7cXwldPzSffwWMqVpy1Xbl4tQePB-35A2YZpMHVHGuwZrleFeBvIHD4f5HhvTw2qvU3T28XTP0Ez-4nMl7lO0w7SzaFQHWxpUfR5Y4M5hKp9y5VQRrUMkjPuVE_tYmh4fNxGiNiF__UagSeRhOnLLlmdWnPYDKbQh4Bli4tGUd48UEI5h1VObWDAot4T-be_6S_k)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**
---

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806404/520929197/1073717532?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_010324_1_1_FoundingDonor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2ZmYTkyMy0yM2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqRBKJ4aqVVqJsdgLSkZtrG9Iach7__BDShHCtUXNRQ=) Peter, though Georgia hasn’t been recognized by the rest of the nation as a battleground state for long, Georgia Democrats proved in 2024 that the Peach State is in play — and that’s thanks to the support of folks like you. Though the outcome of the 2024 presidential race wasn’t what we worked so hard for, we achieved Democratic gains in many swing and even deep-red counties — AND we increased Kamala Harris's vote total over President Biden's winning total in 2020 by more than 74,000 votes. That’s a bigger increase than every other battleground state combined! We know that progress is not a linear path and that movements like ours do not come and go overnight. Our movement is bigger than a single race or election cycle — it persists through both wins and losses, progress and setbacks. **2024’s election result is a setback, but it is not a defeat.** We entered the 2024 cycle as a new presidential battleground state, and we cemented our status as one for cycles to come. We know that there is hard work ahead to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026, and we’re ready to do that work. It’s going to take a strong coalition of grassroots supporters to maximize Democratic momentum in Georgia ahead of the 2026 and 2028 elections, and building that coalition starts here and now. [Will you become a Founding Donor to the Democratic Party of Georgia for the 2025-2026 cycle and help us kickstart our efforts to re-elect Sen. Jon Ossoff and Democrats up and down the ballot in the Peach State?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99806405/520929198/1073717532?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_010324_1_1_FoundingDonor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2ZmYTkyMy0yM2NhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqRBKJ4aqVVqJsdgLSkZtrG9Iach7__BDShHCtUXNRQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Some thoughts on being sworn in as California’s U.S. Senator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8254%2E5257348%2EE4xD4Z)
Derek —
I am deeply honored to serve Californians in the U.S. Senate, having now been sworn in for a full six-year term. From the towering redwoods of the North to the fertile farmlands of the Central Valley, from the breathtaking beaches and deserts of the South to every community – large and small – in between, California is a big state with bold dreams.
To make those dreams a reality, we must work together to ensure every Californian has an opportunity to succeed. That means building more housing and lowering the cost of living, creating an economy that works for everyone, and tackling the climate crisis to protect our planet for generations to come.
And none of this is possible without a strong democracy. That’s why I am committed to defending the right to vote, safeguarding our democratic institutions, and ensuring every voice is heard. Democracy is the foundation upon which all our progress has been built.
In the months and years ahead, I will travel across our great state, listening to your stories, learning from your experiences, and working with you to address the challenges we face. Together, we can build a future that reflects the diversity, resilience, and spirit of California.
I am profoundly hopeful and more determined than ever to deliver for the Golden State. Serving as your Senator is the honor of a lifetime.
All my best,
Adam

clean_body: | Derek — I am deeply honored to serve Californians in the U.S. Senate, having now been sworn in for a full six-year term. From the towering redwoods of the North to the fertile farmlands of the Central Valley, from the breathtaking beaches and deserts of the South to every community – large and small – in between, California is a big state with bold dreams. To make those dreams a reality, we must work together to ensure every Californian has an opportunity to succeed. That means building more housing and lowering the cost of living, creating an economy that works for everyone, and tackling the climate crisis to protect our planet for generations to come. And none of this is possible without a strong democracy. That’s why I am committed to defending the right to vote, safeguarding our democratic institutions, and ensuring every voice is heard. Democracy is the foundation upon which all our progress has been built. In the months and years ahead, I will travel across our great state, listening to your stories, learning from your experiences, and working with you to address the challenges we face. Together, we can build a future that reflects the diversity, resilience, and spirit of California. I am profoundly hopeful and more determined than ever to deliver for the Golden State. Serving as your Senator is the honor of a lifetime. All my best, Adam | | 135 E. Judge Jeanine **[ERUPTED at democrat Jessica Tarlov](https://substack.com/redirect/73de35be-7f47-490e-9fb0-050de46ea1df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trying to sugarcoat rampant border crossings during the Biden administration and claiming illegal migrants are being wrongfully demonized in America.
"Lets STOP playing games here!!" Jeanine snapped at Tarlov.
**[Watch them take the gloves off:](https://substack.com/redirect/73de35be-7f47-490e-9fb0-050de46ea1df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6b6e3b50-9be0-4aa9-bc10-64d727ed3a2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/73de35be-7f47-490e-9fb0-050de46ea1df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tarlov condemned Republicans who have tried to conflate the border crisis with the terrorist who committed the New Orleans attack, arguing the tragedy has been used to "demonize" illegal migrants.
"The guy in New Orleans was an American!" Tarlov exclaimed.
"Nobody is saying he wasn't!!" Jeanine pushed back, before Fox News host Kennedy packed her up saying the two issues were not mutually exclusive.
Republicans feel that recent terrorist attacks highlight the need to control the southern border as a possible entry point for hostile persons meaning the United States harm.
* * *
# _**Southern Fried Justice:**_**23-year-old PASSES OUT behind the wheel, then gets a RUDE AWAKENING!**
Police body cam footage shows **[the arrest of a young 23-year-old female](https://substack.com/redirect/13855155-bc78-44b5-88f4-6d96f87ea878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Lakewood, Ohio on July 20, 2023.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/13855155-bc78-44b5-88f4-6d96f87ea878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/13855155-bc78-44b5-88f4-6d96f87ea878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The woman was found passed out behind the wheel of her running car when officers found her on the side of a roadway. Initially, officers were unable to wake the suspect, despite their efforts of shaking and shouting at her.
After several minutes, the young female did wake up and she was able to respond to the officers. **[Things quickly escalated as the woman became combative](https://substack.com/redirect/13855155-bc78-44b5-88f4-6d96f87ea878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and uncooperative. She then began throwing a bizarre tantrum filled with gibberish and incoherent ramblings.
Officers took control of the situation and promptly placed the suspect under arrest. She was charged with Ohio revised code section 4511.194, which is **["having physical control on a vehicle while impaired."](https://substack.com/redirect/13855155-bc78-44b5-88f4-6d96f87ea878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Later, she pled guilty to lesser city ordinance/violation and was required to and completed a 72-hour driver intervention program, paid $250 in fines, and had her license suspended for 81 days.
* * *

name: Royce White
subject: My Letter to Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I need you to read it | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1fdf00954a44c8c97a3725890727f14&_e=3JXnNS1dcgWFDUBXt-QnhWo9DgNxh8c9VDtwYeNn4BSptVeF-JgVlLWc7UTGOIuxMJSdSoMZLAzsjMsyArlPAW-1ImkmlFM_E1qnvJKbyGr3I-H-YCrb03soVme7Vk4L6CV4jSqIhflVIuH0fv3pyAqrD902v91BAciG0BhLOG7-FCo0n0qCTNPqruAeMmQyRUCPbTwvs5Ezqn7P66jNq3L7tnSAgHx1LWVLoXIIRX9FqS_ZM-7BkCT02I1anIpvoJb3lfRnBeWq79vYN0LEMnuIBA63zZMKsBwHFnVTa9u3PWlptbpT7Ey-yfp2SLrw-i-3AH2bhS3B-VdSVXVzRA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to share my message to Elon Musk with you:

_Elon Musk,

We appreciate what you've done... But you need to take a step back and understand the FUNDAMENTAL of this America 1st movement. We aren't just a slogan to be wrapped or slapped on the next agenda of a similar status quo. The MAGA movement is special because it is Uniparty and status quo proof. As much as we dig what you've done, we understand the fundamentals, and this is what separates our movement from the movement of the opposition. They are moral relativists and opportunists. They will ride whatever wave they need to.

This is NOT a trend or a fad to be hijacked. The MAGA movement is the ONLY movement that has consistently brought legitimate criticism to its own leaders when they stray too far from the center of the road. That's healthy, that's American citizenship—something we've consistently lost in our culture over the past few generations as the media, government, and oligarchy have swelled.

We understand the value of citizenship, the dangers of technology, and the pay-to-play politics that have ransacked this country, like the final days of the Roman Empire.

We will not back down and we have shown we do not care how big the bankroll is. We will not surrender to anybody who doesn't understand American citizenship is the key to our rebuilding a strong nation. Black man here, the MAGA movement isn't racist, we don't want Uniparty scams that devalue our citizenship like H-1B visas. Blacks and Hispanics can be engineers if we stop letting communism destroy our education. Fix that, SCREW the visas!

You cannot have freedom without self-governance. You cannot have self-governance without sacred honor and national honor. _

Peter, I need your help. If we’re going to save this country, I need to become Minnesota’s newest Senator in 2026. Radical Leftists like Tina Smith are RUINING our country.

**[Can you chip in $10 before midnight to stand with me?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1fdf00954a44c8c97a3725890727f14&_e=3JXnNS1dcgWFDUBXt-QnhWo9DgNxh8c9VDtwYeNn4BSptVeF-JgVlLWc7UTGOIuxMJSdSoMZLAzsjMsyArlPAW-1ImkmlFM_E1qnvJKbyGr3I-H-YCrb03soVme7Vk4L6CV4jSqIhflVIuH0fv3pyAqrD902v91BAciG0BhLOG7-FCo0n0qCTNPqruAeMmQyg1ELmZ9qw9Liz9emnXAmxqBWpLiLRPM2-MtOB7O-iC6M3qw_8LNghcDSlhkocxxu4MuyHCZqZO7Tx3A-UUyLNJgK4_KDf676xZQhCHlUHO095Xw_fC8z8LdLM7vnQN8TL1Ry8ba0eCXNLu7F40T8fA%3D%3D)**

The People are Coming!
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1fdf00954a44c8c97a3725890727f14&_e=3JXnNS1dcgWFDUBXt-QnhWo9DgNxh8c9VDtwYeNn4BSptVeF-JgVlLWc7UTGOIuxMJSdSoMZLAzsjMsyArlPAW-1ImkmlFM_E1qnvJKbyGr3I-H-YCrb03soVme7Vk4L6CV4jSqIhflVIuH0fv3pyAqrD902v91BAciG0BhLOG7-FCo0n0qCTNPqruAeMmQy_GPUdWtuN3bcet0VgXEiMmpm5Q6rqXEtvj50okYkbaGoDji0IZwxiJiP4MbKDrL_-p8ixHIedVcEtFNiVqvR2ofHc3xcxvAjveXKn-tIMgsMm8R4rUib5d1HaFpYycX6uJcYpvTThv4xMbklS0fy0g%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b1fdf00954a44c8c97a3725890727f14&_e=3JXnNS1dcgWFDUBXt-QnhWo9DgNxh8c9VDtwYeNn4BSptVeF-JgVlLWc7UTGOIuxMJSdSoMZLAzsjMsyArlPAW-1ImkmlFM_E1qnvJKbyGr3I-H-YCrb03soVme7Vk4L6CV4jSqIhflVIuH0fv3pyAqrD902v91BAciG0BhLOG7-FCo0n0qCTNPqruAeMmQy2nVI7jdQaRZrnlksIfweGXUqGUv_knipdwuzzCStbGSvmHg5JIv9A1pX6qmqkUdQaEx2jnEyMUETWoEN8Bq94emIl5RISbECYsG27wokKH5V6_n_VLacMg5dhiEkBy5AsiwfvdO4ra9gjXRUp1Zl9g%3D%3D)

We will not surrender to anybody who doesn't understand American citizenship is the key to our rebuilding a strong nation. Black man here, the MAGA movement isn't racist, we don't want Uniparty scams that devalue our citizenship like H-1B visas. Blacks and Hispanics can be engineers if we stop letting communism destroy our education. Fix that, SCREW the visas! You cannot have freedom without self-governance. You cannot have self-governance without sacred honor and national honor. Peter, I need your help. If we’re going to save this country, I need to become Minnesota’s newest Senator in 2026. Radical Leftists like Tina Smith are RUINING our country. The People are Coming! Royce White | Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TKNstxn6KhcAKmLHzeSqO9zGxkeMmiDZcua81s5fuBRkf2NMEWnxJRsAiku0Q8ReFbwotkSHFAe1MK9Klkiaj-NUTXX--tEH16AY1oF68TxGsUkeOAZWfsYMfVLkfiIM7WqECyv8riIbIjo9omN5epsMYUG9VPvMUtV82Z0RA91zw%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TK05NqY6ruo5Ls0bbFlvI6y_qnJUtGfXZJImgD37wkQ7ESkc_S1gfoWAkHS0Lk9hXPNf0UxDMEG0pLv65kCp4-T5IVto_06xueEtl5UVVR2MuCUSBZ1kTp8WUZG-z7HfZoS0QapEg6Zmy8YDrDvAQFnESmN64uNlCyV0ZZI1DJitg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TJ58gc29Dmaj1zPKyQ6Nno3M6WdfHcHGxLTwcEJh3rxG412CUu5PsjdlegsorLBdb-j2pD9KpCzcPc2z2XG4FT8r1fNz89r7y8TCeN63VPU4CuTD7kiy3Lh5-MgYk-mDFT12luOyOur_kes32R2AsZ8iRkoDIWhfJCAIWhupa-F6A%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TLGf_TkgI_7txPwfK1w2zFjBKkm-BtScbtiLs5fXjPDQhy_6SS-IhPSZSf9OSstB3Ck_99aHsyqmqx6Tj_GDB8CxLWxt3o1idXX0petUMrX7nhzDAmSwjZNxmPNZg_rrFckzVXS-AZY8mJQQpFDv90D_8E7bIdUTQL7fsBjRo4N9w%3D%3D)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TJ6s-h2G47O8AG45lvcw_fIQU4q4_7nDfMa3YCxHXM3OXTnXHkntQr8I_pXU0KPQ3U6aNywDVzv00zsczh-vEifg9Y9a4JC4uJhYbPBTy2C4c0IUT7ixdz6On5B10hA9euq_-UniDYXdca8v0hYxJ48tb-MgGrpewc5EqyDZuKxPw%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TI77Pkpmas_8Bg3MOC_KsnRZ7ZrGdXty7rFWdwp3uBJ2Swy7mEhOfs84MMhGK7arQibO6X0npqRIFW4pgFGeGWTehB74M9I8ntWWw5CSSawJ3bSUEwQbKM104Ymp_PNzUsG3dve-hc0viF5w0fzq7oLNNB9c6gnXyZuadQEL9wjgA%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e23eb00e99fb44e3abe0c1a8cb7128ed&_e=aqUthECkDJfyWa8HwNsfGrs9zu3T4UN3D5lgB5SxrjMDOq1l4BM2np73JauJXK--NJ01xctc5-ysuBuooL0BlPmAbaNDaoofKcMF2nZhpnLfShbLo0ORuSM-9JH0KBIGTW89HmBFoUJmlI_j-2X10V7vasc6Q71wz6tzmqV3hR65OWu1vh4DkspfW-MVGNuvGudHLzb2D9fZVljEikKGjyM5HYRqvdxQJsNqW39J2TK7f4xYuijftLp2uxjU8IakqYGvNnS36-UOmZF50u6N-B5M2zcF3Am6aN2wgHbD8sVMMzYSDi6P-4M22Bnb6J5XdFQX7uahnF_nUmvYDOF1lZFaWGgu2zf8LTxk6U9cS0wykcRbAqV64iHvOJYL3wZUx-HWsGo4WoS-MdhwHBS3pg%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.

clean_body: Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! name: Tom Fitton
subject: Entering the New Year with a Bang!
body:
Another history-making year in 2024

[INSIDE JW]

Another History-Making Year in 2024

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=34194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9pY2hNeU9tZnRnQT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f6c2d79cbee11a94c1715f79ecbcb2c0ca471c131859c6ddc240d6ff1767da5e]

Your Judicial Watch is fighting to ensure clean elections, secure
borders, and transparency in government – and battling to thwart the
Left’s attack on our constitutional republic through their
censorship of free speech and abuse of power.

We had another history-making year in 2024, including the following
selection of lawsuits and victories that I have no doubt helped
preserve our constitutional republic.

We filed a civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=31320&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnRpbmctYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=30445c04db80403014cf6801c0a539109bdf148b2ee17d0c66123ba49e0dfac1]
on
behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, challenging a
Mississippi election law permitting absentee ballots to be received as
long as five business days after Election Day. In an election
law victory
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=33756&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=68108ce1ef70d2e928dc01d20d82817cecb71be9cd6fdbb3c506dec068345fb1],
the U.S.
Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit issued an opinion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=33747&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1pc3Npc3NpcHBpLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLW9waW5pb24tMDAwMzctNjAzOTUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cdc8cea64eee2b8dc8516ec0a0fc06ed0c5c752d062fd35f924a9bea2e9d8007]
reversing
the lower court ruling on Mississippi’s election law that permitted
the practice.

We filed federal lawsuits against Illinois
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=31560&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsaW5vaXMtdm90aW5nLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b9d889574013d51b5bb2a699b8d7eb63339c216bd80c8fc0830a6ff6ae1bf019],
Oregon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=33760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb3JlZ29uLWNsZWFuLXVwLXZvdGVyLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=39b27e83ca79bb9fe9d5ce44e69256c7fe13213ae7767178329c679176397cf3]
and California
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32338&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jbGVhbi11cC12b3Rpbmctcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=43118f5469b09d5a03dd6c0922ba3e0197ee76e0636575890f560ca9c7026755]
to
force clean-up of voting rolls.

We filed a $30 million a wrongful death lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=31027&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3JvbmdmdWwtZGVhdGgtbGF3c3VpdC1iYWJiaXR0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=584699017f06cd66f0b59fcd03620a8c2836650fda2beee9b855a29384c8c2b9]
against
the U.S. Government on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S.
Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by
then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021.

We received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=31970&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdGh1bW91cy1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9uLW9mLWJhYmJpdHQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e9724243f5fea6c1ef97d2b1c3c7e9c256a01f9ef45904c4c795aa7fd86eb4c1]
from
the U.S. Department of Justice in a FOIA lawsuit, that showed that the
Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) opened a criminal investigation
of Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential
violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil
disorder.

We uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=31411&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmZrLWpyLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLXByb3RlY3Rpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ca6263fab69a50a2950df43b730b295555f54c8e91bc77b0e6a2a1edd673e054]
Secret
Service records from the Department of Homeland Security in a Freedom
of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that showed Secretary Alejandro
Mayorkas personally declined then-presidential candidate Robert F.
Kennedy Jr.’s request for Secret Service protection.

One of our investigations revealed FBI records that included an April
2020 email exchange with several officials in the bureau’s Newark
Field Office referring to Dr. Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of
Allergies and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) grant to the Wuhan Institute
of Virology (WIV) in China as including “gain-of-function research
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=34195&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZnVuZGVkLWdhaW4tb2YtZnVuY3Rpb24td3VoYW4vXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=43f3e16f972ccf5abe4479629acde1d700c418fe95aaf9b89669fe8f44d6d249
which “would leave no signature of purposeful human manipulation.”

We filed a class action lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32489&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVwYXJhdGlvbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=89544cd8218cb5f8cde2c6d0ede0340043593a1a219f5c54a84c7f4461165ad0]
against Evanston,
Illinois, on behalf of six individuals over the city’s use of race
as an eligibility requirement for a reparations program which makes
$25,000 payments to black residents and descendants of black residents
who lived in Evanston between the years 1919 and 1969. The lawsuit was
filed in the United States District Court for the Northern District of
Illinois, Eastern Division.

We forced the admission from the White House in federal court that the
transcript of Biden’s testimony to Special Counsel Robert Hur was
not accurate
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32576&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnNlbC10cmFuc2NyaXB0LWluYWNjdXJhdGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7f63dd32df079828f99b4c52dd105cde3e7bbee5d4c80730fc637c6075c738ee]
and
was missing “filler words (such as ‘um’ or ‘uh’)” and
words that “may have been repeated when spoken (such as ‘I, I’
or ‘and, and’)” which were sometimes “only listed a single
time in the transcripts.” In its subsequent filing the Biden Justice
Department made the extraordinary assertions of executive privilege
and privacy to hide the Biden audio. The agency made the unprecedented
assertion that because “AI” could be used to alter Biden’s words
the material should be kept secret. Later, we requested
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32825&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXVkaW8tb2YtYmlkZW4taW50ZXJ2aWV3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9f31872c060babcc98eac035fdb0b022c5a51fb16aa8b80824e2007ea7597c24]
that the
court reject the Biden Justice Department’s request to rewrite the
Freedom of Information Act and that it order the release of the audio
recordings of Biden’s interviews with Hur.

One of our lawsuits forced records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32640&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW5mb3JtYXRpb24tb24td2hpc3RsZWJsb3dlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=af9f5ae2ad78d5973f4b1fbd20387dad59b9dc5418bc86f7ae46bda76b8e120f]
from
the Department of Justice which showed that the FBI’s Office of
Congressional Affairs provided a Democrat staffer with information on
FBI whistleblowers who detailed the bureau’s targeting of political
opponents and retaliation for their testifying at a May 18, 2023,
hearing of the House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the
Federal Government.

Heavily redacted records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32749&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc29yc2hpcC1jb29yZGluYXRpb24tZWxlY3Rpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8901eebf48027d46cdef6cbf6f9dfbf855b7b67d83143c355d12ab75b3d7d0f1]
from
the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) in one of our lawsuits
showed state election officials in the days before and after the 2020
election flagging online content deemed “misinformation” and
sending it to the Center for Internet Security (CIS), a DHS-funded
nonprofit, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency
(CISA), the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), and others.

We uncovered Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32880&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW5mYW1vdXMtaHVudGVyLWxhcHRvcC1sZXR0ZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1657e526166f7e581942d072f7f6ae82b869b4a3177ebfb9c6965108b0927ffe]
that
showed Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama,
requesting CIA permission to publish a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32842&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtY2lhLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1sYXB0b3AtbGV0dGVyLXJlY29yZHMtMDE4NDQtcGdzLTItMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f3f01bd32366828b4c53082b93eb7474c61c767186033c307318e236373c3f0b]
by
former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the
laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were
Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review
was approved in just six hours by the CIA.

We discovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=33090&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9uLWNpdGl6ZW5zLXZvdGVkLWluLWRjLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9095fd92a0fe13051745c950a5b6d90cc5df258e90d4084c3d4cb401ccb8a7b5]
that 113
noncitizens had voted in the June 2024 DC presidential primary.

Records from the Department of Homeland Security, thanks to a FOIA
lawsuit, showed, contrary
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=33787&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnVzaW5lc3NpbnNpZGVyLmNvbS9zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1idXN0ZWQtc2Fsb24tdXNlLWJhdGhyb29tLW93bmVyLTIwMjQtOD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=cf47e2bf2ab6f15b025f86a46f12b1872cd6d455e8891087f697b5ff701c937a]
to
what it told media, at least one
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=33820&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGFycmlzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLWRldGFpbC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9deb28d17459ee6a7664216582b3583e0bdf8fb84d93e543cd38b76c3de46fdf]
U.S.
Secret Service agent broke in to a hair salon and taped over the
salon’s security camera in Pittsfield, MA, during a July 27, 2024,
campaign fundraising visit by Vice President Kamala Harris.

The Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, entered an order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=34055&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtaW4tZGVmYXVsdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6b382dff9d6f558eca2d51acc07c108fee615cf285ee98b6cde48d6e73b13879]
granting a
motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in
our lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack
Smith and the House January 6 Committee. In doing so, the court
granted our request for attorneys’ fees and ordered Willis to search
for and provide releasable records to Judicial Watch.

2024 also marked the release of my fourth
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32847&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmlnaHRzLWFuZC1mcmVlZG9tcy1pbi1wZXJpbC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5cd1e0658d94c49f6084bd141b4955b75283e7fd8436008a701774dba06f834b]
Judicial
Watch book, _Rights and Freedoms in Peril_: _An Investigative Report
on the Left’s Attack on America_. In it, I detail a long chain of
abuses officials and political groups have made against the American
people. The new book is available at JudicialWatchBook.com
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=32838&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ba8bd96ab41142a1841e8c567ecfc4a6ccfc96704092458b4162b48c53db16a5]
and I encourage you to get a copy if
you haven’t already.

On behalf of our board and all the hard-working staff of Judicial
Watch, we appreciated your support in 2024 as we pursued these and so
many more investigations and lawsuits on the important issues facing
our nation. We pledge to continue fighting aggressively on your behalf
in 2025.

As we begin the year, I encourage you to renew (or begin!) your
support
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71791&L=34172&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMjkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=65c85387c14bf30d113a006d4c234180b81cc74b98a35160caa138769be56823]
of
Judicial Watch!

Until next week,

clean_body: Another history-making year in 2024 [INSIDE JW] Another History-Making Year in 2024 [] Your Judicial Watch is fighting to ensure clean elections, secure borders, and transparency in government – and battling to thwart the Left’s attack on our constitutional republic through their censorship of free speech and abuse of power. We had another history-making year in 2024, including the following selection of lawsuits and victories that I have no doubt helped preserve our constitutional republic. We filed a civil rights lawsuit [] on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, challenging a Mississippi election law permitting absentee ballots to be received as long as five business days after Election Day. In an election law victory [], the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit issued an opinion [] reversing the lower court ruling on Mississippi’s election law that permitted the practice. We filed federal lawsuits against Illinois [], Oregon [] and California [] to force clean-up of voting rolls. We filed a $30 million a wrongful death lawsuit [] against the U.S. Government on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. We received records [] from the U.S. Department of Justice in a FOIA lawsuit, that showed that the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) opened a criminal investigation of Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil disorder. We uncovered [] Secret Service records from the Department of Homeland Security in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that showed Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas personally declined then-presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s request for Secret Service protection. One of our investigations revealed FBI records that included an April 2020 email exchange with several officials in the bureau’s Newark Field Office referring to Dr. Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergies and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) grant to the Wuhan Institute of Virology (WIV) in China as including “gain-of-function research [ which “would leave no signature of purposeful human manipulation.” We filed a class action lawsuit [] against Evanston, Illinois, on behalf of six individuals over the city’s use of race as an eligibility requirement for a reparations program which makes $25,000 payments to black residents and descendants of black residents who lived in Evanston between the years 1919 and 1969. The lawsuit was filed in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division. We forced the admission from the White House in federal court that the transcript of Biden’s testimony to Special Counsel Robert Hur was not accurate [] and was missing “filler words (such as ‘um’ or ‘uh’)” and words that “may have been repeated when spoken (such as ‘I, I’ or ‘and, and’)” which were sometimes “only listed a single time in the transcripts.” In its subsequent filing the Biden Justice Department made the extraordinary assertions of executive privilege and privacy to hide the Biden audio. The agency made the unprecedented assertion that because “AI” could be used to alter Biden’s words the material should be kept secret. Later, we requested [] that the court reject the Biden Justice Department’s request to rewrite the Freedom of Information Act and that it order the release of the audio recordings of Biden’s interviews with Hur. One of our lawsuits forced records [] from the Department of Justice which showed that the FBI’s Office of Congressional Affairs provided a Democrat staffer with information on FBI whistleblowers who detailed the bureau’s targeting of political opponents and retaliation for their testifying at a May 18, 2023, hearing of the House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Heavily redacted records [] from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) in one of our lawsuits showed state election officials in the days before and after the 2020 election flagging online content deemed “misinformation” and sending it to the Center for Internet Security (CIS), a DHS-funded nonprofit, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), and others. We uncovered Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) records [] that showed Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission to publish a letter [] by former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review was approved in just six hours by the CIA. We discovered [] that 113 noncitizens had voted in the June 2024 DC presidential primary. Records from the Department of Homeland Security, thanks to a FOIA lawsuit, showed, contrary [] to what it told media, at least one [] U.S. Secret Service agent broke in to a hair salon and taped over the salon’s security camera in Pittsfield, MA, during a July 27, 2024, campaign fundraising visit by Vice President Kamala Harris. The Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, entered an order [] granting a motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in our lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. In doing so, the court granted our request for attorneys’ fees and ordered Willis to search for and provide releasable records to Judicial Watch. 2024 also marked the release of my fourth [] Judicial Watch book, Rights and Freedoms in Peril: An Investigative Report on the Left’s Attack on America. In it, I detail a long chain of abuses officials and political groups have made against the American people. The new book is available at JudicialWatchBook.com [] and I encourage you to get a copy if you haven’t already. On behalf of our board and all the hard-working staff of Judicial Watch, we appreciated your support in 2024 as we pursued these and so many more investigations and lawsuits on the important issues facing our nation. We pledge to continue fighting aggressively on your behalf in 2025. As we begin the year, I encourage you to renew (or begin!) your support [] of Judicial Watch! name: Lateefah Simon
subject: This is not my oath, it’s ours.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Today, I stood on the House floor and officially took the oath to represent you in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_010325_SwearingIn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_010325_SwearingIn]
In that moment, the weight of our collective journey filled my heart. Every dream, every struggle, every victory we’ve shared led us to this day. I thought of CA-12 — its resilience, its beauty, and the urgent work ahead of us.
But let me be clear: this isn’t just my oath. It’s ours.
Together, we will fight for: Homes families can afford, healthcare that doesn’t lead to financial ruin, and safe, thriving communities built on equity and opportunity — the fight starts now.
In these critical first 24 hours, we must show that CA-12 is ready to lead — to stand against injustice, to push back against extremism, and to build a future that centers working families in every decision. This is our moment to set the tone for the battles ahead. Can I count on you to chip in today and help us make a powerful statement for progress and justice? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_010325_SwearingIn]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Will you become a Founding Donor to Heartland Patriots today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an exciting announcement.
**My team and I just officially launched Heartland Patriots** — an organization that will build on the infrastructure of the movement we created together, and that is committed to supporting grassroots candidates who want to serve real working people instead of the corrupt special interests tearing our country apart.
**I’ll explain more about how exactly we plan to make an impact in a moment, but first I have to ask:[Will you become one of the very first Founding Donors to Heartland Patriots by making a contribution of any amount today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84788?refcode=em20250103-8707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8707%2E614464%2EBKL_jG)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84789?refcode=em20250103-8707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8707%2E614464%2EBKL_jG) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84789?refcode=em20250103-8707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8707%2E614464%2EBKL_jG) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84788?refcode=em20250103-8707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8707%2E614464%2EBKL_jG)
---
When I first decided to run for office, I was told that it would be impossible for a normal person like me to run a modern campaign without help from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives.
But together, with support from hundreds of thousands of people like you chipping in just $5 or $35 at a time, our campaign raised millions of dollars. While billionaires and DC insiders pooled their resources to outspend us, we were still able to break grassroots fundraising records. Now, we have an opportunity to leverage the power of this grassroots movement to help even more everyday people running for office — and to help them compete against Big Money and corporate elites.
**[That’s why, today, I’m asking you to become one of the very first Founding Donors to Heartland Patriots: Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can today? We won’t ever take a cent from corporate PACs or shady insiders, so your contribution — no matter the amount — really will make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84788?refcode=em20250103-8707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8707%2E614464%2EBKL_jG)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an exciting announcement. My team and I just officially launched Heartland Patriots — an organization that will build on the infrastructure of the movement we created together, and that is committed to supporting grassroots candidates who want to serve real working people instead of the corrupt special interests tearing our country apart. I’ll explain more about how exactly we plan to make an impact in a moment, but first I have to ask: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: When I first decided to run for office, I was told that it would be impossible for a normal person like me to run a modern campaign without help from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives. But together, with support from hundreds of thousands of people like you chipping in just $5 or $35 at a time, our campaign raised millions of dollars. While billionaires and DC insiders pooled their resources to outspend us, we were still able to break grassroots fundraising records. Now, we have an opportunity to leverage the power of this grassroots movement to help even more everyday people running for office — and to help them compete against Big Money and corporate elites. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: You will hear more from my team and me about the importance of this work and how we can impact important races in the days ahead. If we’re going to elect leaders who will put working families and our country first, it’s going to take all of us standing together to make it happen! I’m excited for this new chapter — and I hope you’ll continue to be part of it. Now let’s get back to work, — Lucas | | Paid for by Heartland Patriots

name: Kim Schrier
subject: I was just sworn in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99807230/520931452/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjk0YzFkOC0yOWNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbSY3M-GJfp9TILDikLuizmYdgumSLPdimusaEC5P7U=&emci=cf00feea-f8c9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=db94c1d8-29ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

I’m so thrilled to announce that I was just officially sworn in to serve my fourth term in the 119th Congress. I’m ready to get back to work, fighting for people across Washington’s Eighth Congressional District and the country.

This day was only made possible because of this grassroots team. Whether you donated, volunteered, voted, or helped spread my message to your friends and family last year, you are the reason I’m able to continue our work together in Congress. I am eager to continue to address the issues that matter most to you.

**But know this: there will be chaotic and challenging times ahead.** While we may no longer hold the majority in the House, Senate, or White House, I'm committed to doing everything I can to pass legislation to lower costs, expand access to affordable healthcare, protect every woman’s right to choose, protect our planet, and so much more. I will do everything in my power to ensure the people of Washington’s Eighth District are heard and prioritized every step of the way.

So Peter, thank you again for all of your support. I look forward to seeing what we accomplish together this term.

Thank you,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99807231/520931453/1785449556?refcode=em24_250103_sweari_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_250103_sweari_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=db94c1d8-29ca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjk0YzFkOC0yOWNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JbSY3M-GJfp9TILDikLuizmYdgumSLPdimusaEC5P7U=)

| | **Sen. Katie Britt reflects on a year of legislative achievements for Alabama**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=8f3b8466648f4d67b1ca58910b6fad6d&_e=T-NiFz9yIIEZMD2V6pSQvZaPjVUKstntNZ-R3Q9Un9qTMTl9vAAhGpWXr8xAa7oS9jf1DhTxnkplYsaDTg7XdiKYaZvRPd-qfTRl_I8jIdHXGtTYRmFlmeroua3VNKBOgvq3I4L0iey3i84y3hqy-OFNAa4JCPoOzOpSZrkcsRqjzrNupaijbagFZ50uPxBCDoyJWmk2vCEJkYEI7-b2zRfXhUxo916fCsRvPKURsyzhjYH4BFic8_94oloVdw0FCZYj14H6oAgdcTX5ji72mD_xYJoUemoKmxHZb4_ACzeLof0TbDwwgvYqVOIvx7bL)
---
It’s been a year filled with significant accomplishments and milestones for Katie Britt. During the 118th Congress, the Senator worked tirelessly to invest in Alabama and its small businesses while also addressing America’s border crisis, supporting Alabama families, and strengthening national security.

“Each and every day I serve as U.S. Senator for the great state of Alabama, I fight to grow opportunity for hardworking families and preserve the American Dream for generations to come,” said Britt. “As I reflect on my first Congress, I’m proud to say that I’ve kept my promise to put Alabama first throughout the past two years, and I look forward to building on our important work in the 119th Congress.”

Britt detailed her recent efforts to better both her state and the country in a statement released Tuesday.

“From being a responsible steward of Alabamians’ taxpayer dollars and returning them home to invest in our state; to pushing back on the Biden Administration’s reckless agenda; to introducing bipartisan solutions addressing child care, maternal health, and youth mental health; to combating America’s border crisis and strengthening interior immigration enforcement; to ensuring our warfighters remain the best equipped, trained, and prepared in the world and their families have the support they need; to fighting for Main Street America—I have made sure Alabamians’ voices are heard,” Britt noted. “Our people, values, and interests have a strong seat at the table in the Senate, and we are just getting started.”
---
[**READ MORE >>**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=8f3b8466648f4d67b1ca58910b6fad6d&_e=T-NiFz9yIIEZMD2V6pSQvZaPjVUKstntNZ-R3Q9Un9qTMTl9vAAhGpWXr8xAa7oS9jf1DhTxnkplYsaDTg7XdiKYaZvRPd-qfTRl_I8jIdHXGtTYRmFlmeroua3VNKBOgvq3I4L0iey3i84y3hqy-KnC0s5Ybqjs7C2MlkN2tXJlUiU5BHHUjwGwU_HgBoRiviIuIpfmvmvWCiqg5QQVIaD_uxLrlQ6_5Dtuui6cxhZoQV3w744CR4S4pvGC9pjAG22dbTHApvG9NN1GWCy9LgbO39mbNVAMRSAKOt50acyZqFeb8AgM-dchDgz7lpsL)
---
| | **Report: U.S. Sen. Katie Britt ‘becoming one of the most powerful senators in the Trump Era’**
---

Citing politicos and leaders on Capitol Hill, the non-profit news organization NOTUS recently hailed Alabama’s junior U.S. Senator Katie Britt as “a young rising star of the Republican Party” slated to be a key advisor to President-elect Donald Trump in his upcoming administration.

Britt received Trump’s endorsement in her 2022 Senate bid after he rescinded his endorsement for her opponent and former MAGA loyalist, Mo Brooks. Britt initially declined to endorse any candidate before the 2024 Republican primary, saying her appointment to the GOP Advisory Council was conditional on her remaining neutral. However, three months before Alabama’s March primary election, Britt came out in full-throated support of the now President-elect.

Britt took office in January 2023. Since then, she has made waves as a staunch Trump ally leading up to his November election. The two shared passing compliments after an Alabama Supreme Court on in-vitro fertilization (IVF), with Trump crediting Britt for educating him on the importance of IVF.

With President-elect Donald Trump assuming office in January, Congress should overhaul guestworker programs like H-1B visas, according to U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery).

Britt told 1819 News on Tuesday, “Working alongside President Trump and his team, my top priority starting in January is securing the border and enforcing immigration laws across our nation’s interior. We must replace catch-and-release with detain-and-deport. Some of the first actions I will take in the 119th Congress are reintroducing the Laken Riley Act, WALL Act, and the Keep Our Communities Safe Act.”

Katie Britt reflects on a year of legislative achievements for Alabama It’s been a year filled with significant accomplishments and milestones for Katie Britt. During the 118th Congress, the Senator worked tirelessly to invest in Alabama and its small businesses while also addressing America’s border crisis, supporting Alabama families, and strengthening national security. “Each and every day I serve as U.S. Senator for the great state of Alabama, I fight to grow opportunity for hardworking families and preserve the American Dream for generations to come,” said Britt. “As I reflect on my first Congress, I’m proud to say that I’ve kept my promise to put Alabama first throughout the past two years, and I look forward to building on our important work in the 119th Congress.” Britt detailed her recent efforts to better both her state and the country in a statement released Tuesday. “From being a responsible steward of Alabamians’ taxpayer dollars and returning them home to invest in our state; to pushing back on the Biden Administration’s reckless agenda; to introducing bipartisan solutions addressing child care, maternal health, and youth mental health; to combating America’s border crisis and strengthening interior immigration enforcement; to ensuring our warfighters remain the best equipped, trained, and prepared in the world and their families have the support they need; to fighting for Main Street America—I have made sure Alabamians’ voices are heard,” Britt noted. “Our people, values, and interests have a strong seat at the table in the Senate, and we are just getting started.” | | Report: U.S. Sen.
